```text
1	import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3	import {
4	  Between,
5	  FindOptionsWhere,
6	  In,
7	  LessThanOrEqual,
8	  MoreThanOrEqual,
9	  Repository,
10	} from 'typeorm';
11	import {
12	  Client,
13	  Detection,
14	  DetectionState,
15	  InvoiceProposal,
16	  InvoiceProposalState,
17	  Meeting,
18	  MeetingState,
19	  Task,
20	  TaskState,
21	} from '../../entities';
22	import { AuditService } from '../audit/audit.service';
23	import {
24	  AuditEventDto,
25	  CalendarColorKey,
26	  CalendarEventDto,
27	  DashboardSummaryDto,
28	  LeakStripDto,
29	} from './dto/dashboard.dto';
30	
31	const MONTH_NAMES = [
32	  'January',
33	  'February',
34	  'March',
35	  'April',
36	  'May',
37	  'June',
38	  'July',
39	  'August',
40	  'September',
41	  'October',
42	  'November',
43	  'December',
44	];
45	
46	// Meeting states whose work is still recoverable (not yet SENT / SKIPPED) and
47	// that do NOT already carry a proposal (INVOICE_PROPOSED is counted in the
48	// in-review bucket instead, so it is excluded here to avoid double counting).
49	const UNBILLED_MEETING_STATES: MeetingState[] = [
50	  MeetingState.DETECTED,
51	  MeetingState.AWAITING_TRANSCRIPT,
52	  MeetingState.TRANSCRIPT_ATTACHED,
53	  MeetingState.CLIENT_MATCHED,
54	];
55	
56	@Injectable()
57	export class DashboardService {
58	  constructor(
59	    @InjectRepository(Meeting)
60	    private readonly meetings: Repository<Meeting>,
61	    @InjectRepository(Client)
62	    private readonly clients: Repository<Client>,
63	    @InjectRepository(InvoiceProposal)
64	    private readonly proposals: Repository<InvoiceProposal>,
65	    @InjectRepository(Detection)
66	    private readonly detections: Repository<Detection>,
67	    @InjectRepository(Task)
68	    private readonly tasks: Repository<Task>,
69	    private readonly audit: AuditService,
70	  ) {}
71	
72	  private static round2(n: number): number {
73	    return Math.round((n + Number.EPSILON) * 100) / 100;
74	  }
75	
76	  // Colour token for the calendar view, derived purely from meeting state.
77	  private colorKeyFor(m: Meeting): CalendarColorKey {
78	    if (m.isPersonal) return 'gray';
79	    switch (m.state) {
80	      case MeetingState.SENT:
81	        return 'teal'; // billed
82	      case MeetingState.INVOICE_PROPOSED:
83	        return 'amber'; // proposal in review
84	      case MeetingState.UNKNOWN_ATTENDEE:
85	        return 'purple'; // unknown attendee
86	      case MeetingState.SKIPPED:
87	        return 'gray'; // skipped
88	      default:
89	        return 'amber-outline'; // awaiting (detected / awaiting transcript / attached / matched)
90	    }
91	  }
92	
93	  // Best-effort £ estimate of a single unbilled meeting from its client's rate.
94	  private estimateMeetingValue(m: Meeting, client?: Client): number {
95	    const bp = client?.billingProfile;
96	    if (!bp || bp.rate == null) return 0;
97	    const rate = Number(bp.rate);
98	    const hours = Number(m.durationHours);
99	    if (!Number.isFinite(rate) || !Number.isFinite(hours)) return 0;
100	    if (bp.rate_unit === 'HOUR') return rate * hours;
101	    if (bp.rate_unit === 'DAY') return rate * (hours / 8); // ~8h working day
102	    return 0; // FIXED / unknown — not estimable per meeting
103	  }
104	
105	  private async clientsById(ids: string[]): Promise<Map<string, Client>> {
106	    const unique = [...new Set(ids.filter(Boolean))];
107	    if (unique.length === 0) return new Map();
108	    const rows = await this.clients.find({ where: { id: In(unique) } });
109	    return new Map(rows.map((c) => [c.id, c]));
110	  }
111	
112	  // GET /dashboard/calendar — colour-coded events with client + proposal links.
113	  async calendar(from?: string, to?: string): Promise<CalendarEventDto[]> {
114	    const where: FindOptionsWhere<Meeting> = {};
115	    if (from && to) {
116	      where.start = Between(new Date(from), new Date(to));
117	    } else if (from) {
118	      where.start = MoreThanOrEqual(new Date(from));
119	    } else if (to) {
120	      where.start = LessThanOrEqual(new Date(to));
121	    }
122	
123	    const meetings = await this.meetings.find({
124	      where,
125	      order: { start: 'ASC' },
126	    });
127	    if (meetings.length === 0) return [];
128	
129	    const clientMap = await this.clientsById(
130	      meetings.map((m) => m.clientId ?? '').filter(Boolean),
131	    );
132	
133	    // Map each meeting to its most recent proposal (prefer non-rejected).
134	    const meetingIds = meetings.map((m) => m.id);
135	    const proposalRows = await this.proposals.find({
136	      where: { meetingId: In(meetingIds) },
137	      order: { createdAt: 'DESC' },
138	    });
139	    const proposalByMeeting = new Map<string, string>();
140	    for (const p of proposalRows) {
141	      if (!p.meetingId) continue;
142	      const existing = proposalByMeeting.get(p.meetingId);
143	      if (!existing) {
144	        proposalByMeeting.set(p.meetingId, p.id);
145	      } else if (p.state !== InvoiceProposalState.REJECTED) {
146	        // A newer non-rejected proposal wins over an older rejected one.
147	        proposalByMeeting.set(p.meetingId, p.id);
148	      }
149	    }
150	
151	    return meetings.map((m) => ({
152	      id: m.id,
153	      title: m.title,
154	      start: m.start.toISOString(),
155	      end: m.end.toISOString(),
156	      state: m.state,
157	      colorKey: this.colorKeyFor(m),
158	      clientName: m.clientId ? (clientMap.get(m.clientId)?.name ?? null) : null,
159	      proposalId: proposalByMeeting.get(m.id) ?? null,
160	    }));
161	  }
162	
163	  // GET /dashboard/leak-strip — "£2,880 was walking away" this month.
164	  async leakStrip(): Promise<LeakStripDto> {
165	    const [openDetections, inReviewProposals, unbilledMeetings] =
166	      await Promise.all([
167	        this.detections.find({ where: { state: DetectionState.OPEN } }),
168	        this.proposals.find({
169	          where: { state: InvoiceProposalState.IN_REVIEW },
170	        }),
171	        this.meetings.find({
172	          where: {
173	            state: In(UNBILLED_MEETING_STATES),
174	            isPersonal: false,
175	          },
176	        }),
177	      ]);
178	
179	    const detectionGbp = openDetections.reduce(
180	      (sum, d) => sum + Number(d.valueGbp),
181	      0,
182	    );
183	    const reviewGbp = inReviewProposals.reduce(
184	      (sum, p) => sum + Number(p.total),
185	      0,
186	    );
187	
188	    const meetingClientMap = await this.clientsById(
189	      unbilledMeetings.map((m) => m.clientId ?? '').filter(Boolean),
190	    );
191	    const meetingGbp = unbilledMeetings.reduce(
192	      (sum, m) =>
193	        sum +
194	        this.estimateMeetingValue(
195	          m,
196	          m.clientId ? meetingClientMap.get(m.clientId) : undefined,
197	        ),
198	      0,
199	    );
200	
201	    const breakdown = [
202	      {
203	        source: 'Ledger detections',
204	        gbp: DashboardService.round2(detectionGbp),
205	        count: openDetections.length,
206	      },
207	      {
208	        source: 'Invoices in review',
209	        gbp: DashboardService.round2(reviewGbp),
210	        count: inReviewProposals.length,
211	      },
212	      {
213	        source: 'Unbilled meetings',
214	        gbp: DashboardService.round2(meetingGbp),
215	        count: unbilledMeetings.length,
216	      },
217	    ];
218	
219	    // Label the strip with the month of the most recent unbilled meeting so
220	    // the demo reads "June 2026"; fall back to the current month.
221	    let labelDate = new Date();
222	    if (unbilledMeetings.length > 0) {
223	      labelDate = unbilledMeetings.reduce(
224	        (latest, m) => (m.start > latest ? m.start : latest),
225	        unbilledMeetings[0].start,
226	      );
227	    }
228	    const monthLabel = `${MONTH_NAMES[labelDate.getMonth()]} ${labelDate.getFullYear()}`;
229	
230	    return {
231	      monthLabel,
232	      recoverableGbp: DashboardService.round2(
233	        detectionGbp + reviewGbp + meetingGbp,
234	      ),
235	      breakdown,
236	    };
237	  }
238	
239	  // GET /dashboard/audit — the audit trail feed (newest first).
240	  async auditTrail(limit = 100): Promise<AuditEventDto[]> {
241	    const events = await this.audit.list(limit);
242	    return events.map((e) => ({
243	      id: e.id,
244	      actor: e.actor,
245	      action: e.action,
246	      summary: e.summary,
247	      subjectType: e.subjectType,
248	      subjectId: e.subjectId,
249	      inputs: e.inputs,
250	      createdAt: e.createdAt.toISOString(),
251	    }));
252	  }
253	
254	  // GET /dashboard/summary — the headline stats row.
255	  async summary(): Promise<DashboardSummaryDto> {
256	    const now = new Date();
257	    const monthStart = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1);
258	    const monthEnd = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() + 1, 1);
259	
260	    const [openTasks, clientRows, invoicesSentThisMonth, clientsCount] =
261	      await Promise.all([
262	        this.tasks.count({ where: { state: TaskState.OPEN } }),
263	        this.clients.find(),
264	        this.proposals.count({
265	          where: {
266	            state: InvoiceProposalState.SENT,
267	            updatedAt: Between(monthStart, monthEnd),
268	          },
269	        }),
270	        this.clients.count(),
271	      ]);
272	
273	    const unbilledGbp = clientRows.reduce(
274	      (sum, c) => sum + Number(c.unbilledExposureGbp),
275	      0,
276	    );
277	
278	    return {
279	      openTasks,
280	      unbilledGbp: DashboardService.round2(unbilledGbp),
281	      invoicesSentThisMonth,
282	      clientsCount,
283	    };
284	  }
285	}
286

 `./api/src/modules/llm/llm.service.ts`

```text
1	import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk';
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { loadConfig } from '../../config/env';
5	import {
6	  TranscriptParsedSchema,
7	  TranscriptParsedLLM,
8	  ContractParsedSchema,
9	  ContractParsedLLM,
10	  AgreementClassificationSchema,
11	  AgreementClassificationLLM,
12	  MatchProposalsSchema,
13	  MatchProposalsLLM,
14	} from './schemas';
15	
16	// The LLM edge. Parses documents into strict JSON and PROPOSES fuzzy matches.
17	// It never decides billed/unbilled and never sends. Every output is zod-validated
18	// here; malformed output is retried once, then surfaced as an error the caller
19	// turns into a Task (never a silent guess).
20	const MODEL = 'claude-sonnet-5';
21	
22	@Injectable()
23	export class LlmService {
24	  private readonly log = new Logger('LlmService');
25	  private readonly client: Anthropic;
26	
27	  constructor() {
28	    this.client = new Anthropic({ apiKey: loadConfig().anthropicApiKey });
29	  }
30	
31	  private extractJson(text: string): unknown {
32	    // Tolerate ```json fences or prose around the object.
33	    const fenced = text.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
34	    const raw = fenced ? fenced[1] : text;
35	    const start = raw.indexOf('{');
36	    const end = raw.lastIndexOf('}');
37	    if (start === -1 || end === -1) throw new Error('LLM returned no JSON object');
38	    return JSON.parse(raw.slice(start, end + 1));
39	  }
40	
41	  private async complete<S extends z.ZodTypeAny>(
42	    system: string,
43	    user: string,
44	    schema: S,
45	    maxTokens = 2000,
46	  ): Promise<z.infer<S>> {
47	    let lastErr: unknown;
48	    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 2; attempt++) {
49	      const res = await this.client.messages.create({
50	        model: MODEL,
51	        max_tokens: maxTokens,
52	        system,
53	        messages: [
54	          {
55	            role: 'user',
56	            content:
57	              attempt === 0
58	                ? user
59	                : `${user}\n\nYour previous reply was not valid JSON for the schema. Reply with ONLY the JSON object, no prose, no code fences.`,
60	          },
61	        ],
62	      });
63	      const block = res.content.find((c) => c.type === 'text');
64	      const text = block && block.type === 'text' ? block.text : '';
65	      try {
66	        return schema.parse(this.extractJson(text));
67	      } catch (e) {
68	        lastErr = e;
69	        this.log.warn(`LLM output failed validation (attempt ${attempt + 1}): ${String(e).slice(0, 200)}`);
70	      }
71	    }
72	    throw new Error(`LLM output invalid after retry: ${String(lastErr).slice(0, 300)}`);
73	  }
74	
75	  // --- Transcript -> scope items + action points ----------------------------
76	  async parseTranscript(rawText: string): Promise<TranscriptParsedLLM> {
77	    const system =
78	      'You extract EXTRA billable scope from a freelancer consulting-meeting transcript. ' +
79	      'The meeting time itself is ALREADY billed separately from the calendar (do not re-bill it). ' +
80	      'So a scope_item is billable=true ONLY when it is ADDITIONAL work agreed BEYOND the meeting: ' +
81	      'a new deliverable, an out-of-scope request ("can you also…"), or follow-up work promised on ' +
82	      'the call. Anything that was simply discussed or reviewed DURING the meeting is covered by the ' +
83	      'meeting time — mark it billable=false. For every scope_item, evidence_quote MUST be the VERBATIM ' +
84	      'transcript line that agrees the extra work. Estimate est_hours conservatively. Never invent quotes. ' +
85	      'Return strict JSON. It is correct and common for scope_items to be empty.';
86	    const user =
87	      'Transcript:\n"""\n' +
88	      rawText.slice(0, 45000) +
89	      '\n"""\n\nReturn JSON: {"summary": string|null, "action_points": string[], ' +
90	      '"scope_items": [{"description": string, "est_hours": number, "evidence_quote": string, "billable": boolean}]}. ' +
91	      'Only extra work agreed BEYOND the meeting is billable=true.';
92	    return this.complete(system, user, TranscriptParsedSchema, 2500);
93	  }
94	
95	  // --- Contract -> rate/terms/clauses with citations ------------------------
96	  async parseContract(rawText: string): Promise<ContractParsedLLM> {
97	    const system =
98	      'You extract billing terms from a consulting contract. Return strict JSON. ' +
99	      'Cite each clause by its reference (e.g. "Clause 3.1") and quote its verbatim text. ' +
100	      'rate_unit is HOUR, DAY or FIXED. currency is an ISO code. If a value is absent, use null.';
101	    const user =
102	      'Contract:\n"""\n' +
103	      rawText.slice(0, 45000) +
104	      '\n"""\n\nReturn JSON: {"rate": number|null, "rate_unit": "HOUR"|"DAY"|"FIXED"|null, ' +
105	      '"currency": string, "payment_terms": string|null, "scope_summary": string|null, ' +
106	      '"clauses": [{"ref": string, "text": string}]}';
107	    return this.complete(system, user, ContractParsedSchema, 2500);
108	  }
109	
110	  // --- Email -> agreement classification (ONLY queued addresses) ------------
111	  async classifyAgreement(
112	    from: string,
113	    subject: string,
114	    body: string,
115	  ): Promise<AgreementClassificationLLM> {
116	    const system =
117	      'You decide whether an email from a prospective client indicates they AGREE to ' +
118	      'proceed with an engagement (e.g. "let\'s go ahead", "happy to proceed", "send the ' +
119	      'contract"). Return strict JSON. If agreement is true, evidence_quote MUST be a ' +
120	      'verbatim sentence from the email. If false, evidence_quote is an empty string. ' +
121	      'Be conservative: pleasantries or "let me think" are NOT agreement.';
122	    const user =
123	      `From: ${from}\nSubject: ${subject}\n\nBody:\n"""\n${body.slice(0, 8000)}\n"""\n\n` +
124	      'Return JSON: {"agreement": boolean, "evidence_quote": string, "reasoning": string}';
125	    return this.complete(system, user, AgreementClassificationSchema, 800);
126	  }
127	
128	  // --- Fuzzy client-match PROPOSALS (never decisions) -----------------------
129	  async proposeClientMatches(
130	    attendees: { email: string; name?: string }[],
131	    clients: { id: string; name: string; emails: string[] }[],
132	  ): Promise<MatchProposalsLLM> {
133	    const system =
134	      'You PROPOSE which known client a meeting\'s attendees might belong to, when there is ' +
135	      'no exact email match (e.g. a personal Gmail whose display name matches a client contact). ' +
136	      'Return strict JSON with a confidence 0..1 and a reason. Propose only plausible matches; ' +
137	      'an empty list is correct when nothing is plausible. You never decide — a human confirms.';
138	    const user =
139	      `Attendees: ${JSON.stringify(attendees)}\n\nKnown clients: ${JSON.stringify(clients)}\n\n` +
140	      'Return JSON: {"proposals": [{"client_id": string, "client_name": string, "confidence": number, "reason": string}]}';
141	    return this.complete(system, user, MatchProposalsSchema, 1200);
142	  }
143	
144	  async health(): Promise<boolean> {
145	    try {
146	      await this.client.messages.create({
147	        model: MODEL,
148	        max_tokens: 8,
149	        messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Reply with the single word: ok' }],
150	      });
151	      return true;
152	    } catch (e) {
153	      this.log.warn(`Anthropic health check failed: ${String(e).slice(0, 160)}`);
154	      return false;
155	    }
156	  }
157	}
158
```

1	import { Entity, Column, Index } from 'typeorm';
2	import { BaseEntity } from './base.entity';
3	import { MeetingState } from './enums';
4	import { MatchProposal } from './shapes';
5	
6	export interface MeetingAttendee {
7	  email: string;
8	  name?: string;
9	  organizer?: boolean;
10	}
11	
12	@Entity('meetings')
13	export class Meeting extends BaseEntity {
14	  @Index({ unique: true })
15	  @Column({ type: 'varchar' })
16	  gcalEventId!: string; // stable id from calendar (or synthesised for .ics)
17	
18	  @Column({ type: 'varchar' })
19	  title!: string;
20	
21	  @Column({ type: 'timestamptz' })
22	  start!: Date;
23	
24	  @Column({ type: 'timestamptz' })
25	  end!: Date;
26	
27	  // Duration in hours (denormalised for the engine's maths).
28	  @Column({ type: 'numeric', precision: 6, scale: 2 })
29	  durationHours!: number;
30	
31	  @Column({ type: 'jsonb', default: () => "'[]'" })
32	  attendees!: MeetingAttendee[];
33	
34	  @Index()
35	  @Column({ type: 'uuid', nullable: true })
36	  clientId!: string | null;
37	
38	  @Index()
39	  @Column({ type: 'enum', enum: MeetingState, default: MeetingState.DETECTED })
40	  state!: MeetingState;
41	
42	  @Column({ type: 'uuid', nullable: true })
43	  transcriptId!: string | null;
44	
45	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', nullable: true })
46	  skipReason!: string | null;
47	
48	  // Fuzzy match proposals from the LLM (surfaced in CONFIRM_CLIENT_MATCH).
49	  @Column({ type: 'jsonb', nullable: true })
50	  matchProposals!: MatchProposal[] | null;
51	
52	  // 'personal' meetings (no external attendees) are auto-skipped.
53	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false })
54	  isPersonal!: boolean;
55	
56	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', default: 'ics' })
57	  source!: string; // 'google' | 'ics'
58	}
59
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./api/src/modules/proposals/proposals.service.ts`

```text
1	import {
2	  BadRequestException,
3	  Injectable,
4	  Logger,
5	  NotFoundException,
6	} from '@nestjs/common';
7	import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
8	import { In, Repository } from 'typeorm';
9	import {
10	  AuditActor,
11	  Client,
12	  Contract,
13	  Detection,
14	  InvoiceProposal,
15	  InvoiceProposalState,
16	  Meeting,
17	  MeetingState,
18	  Task,
19	  TaskRefType,
20	  TaskState,
21	  TaskType,
22	  Transcript,
23	  ProposalLine,
24	} from '../../entities';
25	import { XeroService } from '../xero/xero.service';
26	import { AuditService } from '../audit/audit.service';
27	import type { WriteInvoiceEvidence, XeroLineItem } from '../xero/xero-api';
28	import {
29	  ProposalActionResultDto,
30	  ProposalDetailDto,
31	  ProposalSummaryDto,
32	} from './dto/proposal-response.dto';
33	import { ProposalLineDto } from './dto/proposal-line.dto';
34	
35	const UK_VAT_PCT = 20;
36	
37	function round2(n: number): number {
38	  return Math.round((n + Number.EPSILON) * 100) / 100;
39	}
40	
41	@Injectable()
42	export class ProposalsService {
43	  private readonly log = new Logger('ProposalsService');
44	
45	  constructor(
46	    @InjectRepository(InvoiceProposal)
47	    private readonly proposals: Repository<InvoiceProposal>,
48	    @InjectRepository(Meeting)
49	    private readonly meetings: Repository<Meeting>,
50	    @InjectRepository(Detection)
51	    private readonly detections: Repository<Detection>,
52	    @InjectRepository(Client)
53	    private readonly clients: Repository<Client>,
54	    @InjectRepository(Contract)
55	    private readonly contracts: Repository<Contract>,
56	    @InjectRepository(Task)
57	    private readonly tasks: Repository<Task>,
58	    @InjectRepository(Transcript)
59	    private readonly transcripts: Repository<Transcript>,
60	    private readonly xero: XeroService,
61	    private readonly audit: AuditService,
62	  ) {}
63	
64	  // ---- Reads ---------------------------------------------------------------
65	
66	  async list(state?: InvoiceProposalState): Promise<ProposalSummaryDto[]> {
67	    const where = state ? { state } : {};
68	    const rows = await this.proposals.find({
69	      where,
70	      order: { createdAt: 'DESC' },
71	    });
72	    const clientIds = [...new Set(rows.map((r) => r.clientId).filter(Boolean))];
73	    const clientRows = clientIds.length
74	      ? await this.clients.find({ where: { id: In(clientIds) } })
75	      : [];
76	    const nameById = new Map(clientRows.map((c) => [c.id, c.name]));
77	    return rows.map((p) => this.toSummary(p, nameById.get(p.clientId) ?? 'Unknown client'));
78	  }
79	
80	  async detail(id: string): Promise<ProposalDetailDto> {
81	    const p = await this.proposals.findOne({ where: { id } });
82	    if (!p) throw new NotFoundException(`Proposal ${id} not found`);
83	
84	    const client = await this.clients.findOne({ where: { id: p.clientId } });
85	    const summary = this.toSummary(p, client?.name ?? 'Unknown client');
86	
87	    // Evidence chain: meeting + transcript, or detection; plus the contract clause.
88	    let meetingEv: ProposalDetailDto['evidence']['meeting'] = null;
89	    let transcriptEv: ProposalDetailDto['evidence']['transcript'] = null;
90	    let detectionEv: ProposalDetailDto['evidence']['detection'] = null;
91	    let contractEv: ProposalDetailDto['evidence']['contract'] = null;
92	
93	    if (p.meetingId) {
94	      const meeting = await this.meetings.findOne({ where: { id: p.meetingId } });
95	      if (meeting) {
96	        meetingEv = {
97	          id: meeting.id,
98	          title: meeting.title,
99	          start: meeting.start instanceof Date ? meeting.start.toISOString() : String(meeting.start),
100	          end: meeting.end instanceof Date ? meeting.end.toISOString() : String(meeting.end),
101	          durationHours: Number(meeting.durationHours),
102	          state: meeting.state,
103	          attendees: (meeting.attendees ?? []).map((a) => a.email),
104	        };
105	        const transcript = meeting.transcriptId
106	          ? await this.transcripts.findOne({ where: { id: meeting.transcriptId } })
107	          : await this.transcripts.findOne({ where: { meetingId: meeting.id } });
108	        if (transcript) {
109	          const scopeQuotes = (transcript.parsed?.scope_items ?? [])
110	            .filter((s) => s.billable)
111	            .map((s) => s.evidence_quote);
112	          transcriptEv = {
113	            id: transcript.id,
114	            summary: transcript.parsed?.summary ?? null,
115	            scopeQuotes,
116	            excerpt: (transcript.rawText ?? '').slice(0, 600),
117	          };
118	        }
119	      }
120	    }
121	
122	    if (p.detectionId) {
123	      const detection = await this.detections.findOne({ where: { id: p.detectionId } });
124	      if (detection) {
125	        detectionEv = {
126	          id: detection.id,
127	          type: detection.type,
128	          valueGbp: Number(detection.valueGbp),
129	          summary: detection.evidence?.summary ?? '',
130	        };
131	      }
132	    }
133	
134	    const contract = await this.contracts.findOne({ where: { clientId: p.clientId } });
135	    if (contract) {
136	      const firstClause = contract.parsed?.clauses?.[0] ?? null;
137	      contractEv = {
138	        contractId: contract.id,
139	        clauseLabel: firstClause?.ref ?? null,
140	        clauseText: firstClause?.text ?? null,
141	      };
142	    }
143	
144	    let xeroStatus: string | null = null;
145	    if (p.xeroInvoiceId) {
146	      try {
147	        const inv = await this.xero.getInvoice(p.xeroInvoiceId);
148	        xeroStatus = inv?.Status ?? null;
149	      } catch (err) {
150	        // Xero may not be live — never break the read.
151	        this.log.warn(`getInvoice failed for ${p.xeroInvoiceId}: ${errMsg(err)}`);
152	      }
153	    }
154	
155	    return {
156	      ...summary,
157	      lines: (p.lines ?? []) as unknown as ProposalLineDto[],
158	      evidence: {
159	        meeting: meetingEv,
160	        transcript: transcriptEv,
161	        detection: detectionEv,
162	        contract: contractEv,
163	      },
164	      xeroStatus,
165	      xeroError: null,
166	    };
167	  }
168	
169	  // ---- Writes --------------------------------------------------------------
170	
171	  /** POST /proposals/:id/approve — authorise + send to Xero. */
172	  async approve(id: string): Promise<ProposalActionResultDto> {
173	    return this.writeToXero(id, true);
174	  }
175	
176	  /** POST /proposals/:id/save-draft — create a DRAFT in Xero, stay IN_REVIEW. */
177	  async saveDraft(id: string): Promise<ProposalActionResultDto> {
178	    return this.writeToXero(id, false);
179	  }
180	
181	  private async writeToXero(id: string, authorise: boolean): Promise<ProposalActionResultDto> {
182	    const p = await this.proposals.findOne({ where: { id } });
183	    if (!p) throw new NotFoundException(`Proposal ${id} not found`);
184	    if (p.state === InvoiceProposalState.REJECTED) {
185	      throw new BadRequestException(`Proposal ${id} was rejected and cannot be written to Xero`);
186	    }
187	
188	    const client = await this.clients.findOne({ where: { id: p.clientId } });
189	    const contract = await this.contracts.findOne({ where: { clientId: p.clientId } });
190	
191	    // Ensure a stable idempotency reference exists (rule 6 of BUILD_SPEC).
192	    if (!p.reference) {
193	      const seed = p.meetingId ?? p.detectionId ?? p.id;
194	      p.reference = `ROBYN-${seed.replace(/-/g, '').slice(0, 12)}`;
195	    }
196	
197	    const accountCode = await this.defaultAccountCode();
198	    const lineItems: XeroLineItem[] = (p.lines ?? []).map((l) => ({
199	      Description: l.description,
200	      Quantity: Number(l.quantity),
201	      UnitAmount: Number(l.unit_amount),
202	      AccountCode: l.account_code ?? accountCode,
203	      ...(l.tax_type ? { TaxType: l.tax_type } : {}),
204	    }));
205	
206	    const decisionNote = this.buildDecisionNote(p, client, authorise);
207	    const evidence = await this.buildEvidence(p, contract);
208	
209	    try {
210	      const result = await this.xero.writeInvoice({
211	        clientName: client?.name ?? 'Client',
212	        clientEmail: client?.emails?.[0],
213	        existingContactId: client?.xeroContactId ?? undefined,
214	        reference: p.reference,
215	        lines: lineItems,
216	        currency: p.currency ?? 'GBP',
217	        authorise,
218	        decisionNote,
219	        evidence,
220	      });
221	
222	      p.xeroInvoiceId = result.invoiceId;
223	      p.xeroInvoiceNumber = result.invoiceNumber;
224	      p.xeroDeepLink = result.deepLink;
225	
226	      if (authorise) {
227	        p.state = InvoiceProposalState.SENT;
228	      } else if (p.state === InvoiceProposalState.DRAFT) {
229	        // A saved draft is now awaiting a human's approve — surface it for review.
230	        p.state = InvoiceProposalState.IN_REVIEW;
231	      }
232	      await this.proposals.save(p);
233	
234	      if (authorise) {
235	        await this.resolveReviewTask(p.id, 'Approved and sent to Xero');
236	        await this.markMeetingSent(p.meetingId);
237	      }
238	
239	      await this.audit.record({
240	        actor: authorise ? AuditActor.HUMAN : AuditActor.ROBYN,
241	        action: authorise ? 'proposal.approved' : 'proposal.saved_draft',
242	        summary: authorise
243	          ? `Approved proposal ${p.reference} for ${client?.name ?? 'client'} — AUTHORISED in Xero (${result.deepLink})`
244	          : `Saved proposal ${p.reference} for ${client?.name ?? 'client'} as a Xero DRAFT (${result.deepLink})`,
245	        subjectType: 'proposal',
246	        subjectId: p.id,
247	        inputs: {
248	          authorise,
249	          xeroInvoiceId: result.invoiceId,
250	          xeroInvoiceNumber: result.invoiceNumber,
251	          total: Number(p.total),
252	          alreadyExisted: result.alreadyExisted,
253	        },
254	      });
255	
256	      return {
257	        id: p.id,
258	        state: p.state,
259	        xeroWritten: true,
260	        xeroInvoiceId: p.xeroInvoiceId,
261	        xeroInvoiceNumber: p.xeroInvoiceNumber,
262	        xeroDeepLink: p.xeroDeepLink,
263	        xeroError: null,
264	        subtotal: Number(p.subtotal),
265	        taxTotal: Number(p.taxTotal),
266	        total: Number(p.total),
267	        message: authorise
268	          ? 'Invoice authorised and sent to Xero.'
269	          : 'Draft invoice created in Xero. Still awaiting your approval to send.',
270	      };
271	    } catch (err) {
272	      // Xero may be down / creds pending: keep local state, surface the error,
273	      // record it, and return a normal (non-500) response.
274	      const message = errMsg(err);
275	      if (p.state === InvoiceProposalState.DRAFT) {
276	        p.state = InvoiceProposalState.IN_REVIEW;
277	      }
278	      await this.proposals.save(p);
279	      // Keep the REVIEW_INVOICE task OPEN so the human can retry.
280	      if (p.state === InvoiceProposalState.IN_REVIEW) {
281	        await this.raiseReviewTaskIfMissing(p, client?.name ?? 'client');
282	      }
283	      await this.audit.record({
284	        actor: AuditActor.XERO,
285	        action: authorise ? 'proposal.approve_failed' : 'proposal.save_draft_failed',
286	        summary: `Xero write failed for proposal ${p.reference} (${client?.name ?? 'client'}): ${message}`,
287	        subjectType: 'proposal',
288	        subjectId: p.id,
289	        inputs: { authorise, error: message },
290	      });
291	
292	      return {
293	        id: p.id,
294	        state: p.state,
295	        xeroWritten: false,
296	        xeroInvoiceId: p.xeroInvoiceId ?? null,
297	        xeroInvoiceNumber: p.xeroInvoiceNumber ?? null,
298	        xeroDeepLink: p.xeroDeepLink ?? null,
299	        xeroError: message,
300	        subtotal: Number(p.subtotal),
301	        taxTotal: Number(p.taxTotal),
302	        total: Number(p.total),
303	        message: `Xero write failed — proposal kept in review. ${message}`,
304	      };
305	    }
306	  }
307	
308	  /** POST /proposals/:id/reject */
309	  async reject(id: string, reason: string): Promise<ProposalActionResultDto> {
310	    const p = await this.proposals.findOne({ where: { id } });
311	    if (!p) throw new NotFoundException(`Proposal ${id} not found`);
312	    if (p.state === InvoiceProposalState.SENT) {
313	      throw new BadRequestException(`Proposal ${id} was already sent to Xero and cannot be rejected`);
314	    }
315	
316	    p.state = InvoiceProposalState.REJECTED;
317	    await this.proposals.save(p);
318	    await this.resolveReviewTask(p.id, `Rejected: ${reason}`);
319	
320	    await this.audit.record({
321	      actor: AuditActor.HUMAN,
322	      action: 'proposal.rejected',
323	      summary: `Rejected proposal ${p.reference ?? p.id}: ${reason}`,
324	      subjectType: 'proposal',
325	      subjectId: p.id,
326	      inputs: { reason },
327	    });
328	
329	    return {
330	      id: p.id,
331	      state: p.state,
332	      xeroWritten: false,
333	      xeroInvoiceId: p.xeroInvoiceId ?? null,
334	      xeroInvoiceNumber: p.xeroInvoiceNumber ?? null,
335	      xeroDeepLink: p.xeroDeepLink ?? null,
336	      xeroError: null,
337	      subtotal: Number(p.subtotal),
338	      taxTotal: Number(p.taxTotal),
339	      total: Number(p.total),
340	      message: 'Proposal rejected.',
341	    };
342	  }
343	
344	  /** PATCH /proposals/:id/lines — edit lines, recompute totals. */
345	  async patchLines(id: string, lines: ProposalLineDto[]): Promise<ProposalActionResultDto> {
346	    const p = await this.proposals.findOne({ where: { id } });
347	    if (!p) throw new NotFoundException(`Proposal ${id} not found`);
348	    if (p.state === InvoiceProposalState.SENT) {
349	      throw new BadRequestException(`Proposal ${id} was already sent to Xero and cannot be edited`);
350	    }
351	    if (p.state === InvoiceProposalState.REJECTED) {
352	      throw new BadRequestException(`Proposal ${id} was rejected and cannot be edited`);
353	    }
354	
355	    // Recompute each line_amount deterministically, then the running totals.
356	    const rebuilt: ProposalLine[] = lines.map((l) => {
357	      const quantity = Number(l.quantity);
358	      const unit_amount = Number(l.unit_amount);
359	      return {
360	        description: l.description,
361	        quantity,
362	        unit_amount,
363	        account_code: l.account_code,
364	        tax_type: l.tax_type,
365	        line_amount: round2(quantity * unit_amount),
366	        provenance: (l.provenance ?? []).map((pr) => ({
367	          kind: pr.kind,
368	          label: pr.label,
369	          detail: pr.detail,
370	          source_ref: pr.source_ref,
371	        })),
372	      };
373	    });
374	
375	    // Preserve the original tax treatment (0% stays 0%, 20% stays 20%).
376	    const prevSubtotal = Number(p.subtotal);
377	    const prevTax = Number(p.taxTotal);
378	    const taxRatePct = prevSubtotal > 0 ? (prevTax / prevSubtotal) * 100 : UK_VAT_PCT;
379	
380	    const subtotal = round2(rebuilt.reduce((s, l) => s + l.line_amount, 0));
381	    const taxTotal = round2((subtotal * taxRatePct) / 100);
382	    const total = round2(subtotal + taxTotal);
383	
384	    p.lines = rebuilt;
385	    p.subtotal = subtotal;
386	    p.taxTotal = taxTotal;
387	    p.total = total;
388	    await this.proposals.save(p);
389	
390	    await this.audit.record({
391	      actor: AuditActor.HUMAN,
392	      action: 'proposal.lines_edited',
393	      summary: `Edited lines on proposal ${p.reference ?? p.id}: new total ${total} ${p.currency}`,
394	      subjectType: 'proposal',
395	      subjectId: p.id,
396	      inputs: { lineCount: rebuilt.length, subtotal, taxTotal, total },
397	    });
398	
399	    return {
400	      id: p.id,
401	      state: p.state,
402	      xeroWritten: false,
403	      xeroInvoiceId: p.xeroInvoiceId ?? null,
404	      xeroInvoiceNumber: p.xeroInvoiceNumber ?? null,
405	      xeroDeepLink: p.xeroDeepLink ?? null,
406	      xeroError: null,
407	      subtotal,
408	      taxTotal,
409	      total,
410	      message: 'Lines updated and totals recomputed.',
411	    };
412	  }
413	
414	  // ---- Helpers -------------------------------------------------------------
415	
416	  private toSummary(p: InvoiceProposal, clientName: string): ProposalSummaryDto {
417	    return {
418	      id: p.id,
419	      clientId: p.clientId,
420	      clientName,
421	      source: p.meetingId ? 'meeting' : 'detection',
422	      meetingId: p.meetingId,
423	      detectionId: p.detectionId,
424	      currency: p.currency ?? 'GBP',
425	      subtotal: Number(p.subtotal),
426	      taxTotal: Number(p.taxTotal),
427	      total: Number(p.total),
428	      state: p.state,
429	      policyResult: {
430	        auto: p.policyResult?.auto ?? false,
431	        reasons: p.policyResult?.reasons ?? [],
432	      },
433	      lineCount: (p.lines ?? []).length,
434	      autoSent: p.autoSent,
435	      reference: p.reference,
436	      xeroInvoiceId: p.xeroInvoiceId,
437	      xeroInvoiceNumber: p.xeroInvoiceNumber,
438	      xeroDeepLink: p.xeroDeepLink,
439	      createdAt: p.createdAt instanceof Date ? p.createdAt.toISOString() : String(p.createdAt),
440	    };
441	  }
442	
443	  private buildDecisionNote(
444	    p: InvoiceProposal,
445	    client: Client | null,
446	    authorise: boolean,
447	  ): string {
448	    const lineParts = (p.lines ?? []).map((l) => {
449	      const labels = (l.provenance ?? []).map((pr) => pr.label).filter(Boolean).join(', ');
450	      return labels ? `${l.description} [${labels}]` : l.description;
451	    });
452	    const reasons = (p.policyResult?.reasons ?? []).join('; ');
453	    const tail = authorise
454	      ? `Autonomy ${client?.autonomyEnabled ? 'ON → auto-sent' : 'OFF → human approved'}.`
455	      : 'Saved as a draft for human review.';
456	    return [
457	      `Robyn invoice ${p.reference ?? p.id} for ${client?.name ?? 'client'}.`,
458	      lineParts.length ? `Lines: ${lineParts.join('; ')}.` : '',
459	      reasons ? `Policy: ${reasons}.` : '',
460	      tail,
461	    ]
462	      .filter(Boolean)
463	      .join(' ')
464	      .slice(0, 2400);
465	  }
466	
467	  private async buildEvidence(
468	    p: InvoiceProposal,
469	    contract: Contract | null,
470	  ): Promise<WriteInvoiceEvidence[]> {
471	    const evidence: WriteInvoiceEvidence[] = [];
472	
473	    // Transcript excerpt (calendar-sourced proposals).
474	    if (p.meetingId) {
475	      const meeting = await this.meetings.findOne({ where: { id: p.meetingId } });
476	      const transcript = meeting?.transcriptId
477	        ? await this.transcripts.findOne({ where: { id: meeting.transcriptId } })
478	        : await this.transcripts.findOne({ where: { meetingId: p.meetingId } });
479	      if (transcript) {
480	        const quotes = (transcript.parsed?.scope_items ?? [])
481	          .filter((s) => s.billable)
482	          .map((s) => `- ${s.description}: "${s.evidence_quote}"`)
483	          .join('\n');
484	        const body = [
485	          transcript.parsed?.summary ? `Summary: ${transcript.parsed.summary}` : '',
486	          quotes ? `Billable scope:\n${quotes}` : '',
487	          `Excerpt:\n${(transcript.rawText ?? '').slice(0, 1200)}`,
488	        ]
489	          .filter(Boolean)
490	          .join('\n\n');
491	        evidence.push({ filename: 'robyn-transcript-excerpt.txt', text: body });
492	      }
493	    }
494	
495	    // Contract clause (the rate citation).
496	    if (contract) {
497	      const clauses = (contract.parsed?.clauses ?? [])
498	        .map((c) => `${c.ref}: ${c.text}`)
499	        .join('\n');
500	      const body = [
501	        contract.title ? `Contract: ${contract.title}` : '',
502	        clauses || (contract.rawText ?? '').slice(0, 1200),
503	      ]
504	        .filter(Boolean)
505	        .join('\n\n');
506	      if (body.trim()) {
507	        evidence.push({ filename: 'robyn-contract-clause.txt', text: body });
508	      }
509	    }
510	
511	    return evidence;
512	  }
513	
514	  private async defaultAccountCode(): Promise<string> {
515	    try {
516	      return await this.xero.defaultSalesAccountCode();
517	    } catch {
518	      return '200';
519	    }
520	  }
521	
522	  private async resolveReviewTask(proposalId: string, resolution: string): Promise<void> {
523	    const task = await this.tasks.findOne({
524	      where: {
525	        type: TaskType.REVIEW_INVOICE,
526	        refId: proposalId,
527	        state: TaskState.OPEN,
528	      },
529	    });
530	    if (!task) return;
531	    task.state = TaskState.RESOLVED;
532	    task.resolvedAt = new Date();
533	    task.resolution = resolution;
534	    await this.tasks.save(task);
535	  }
536	
537	  private async raiseReviewTaskIfMissing(p: InvoiceProposal, clientName: string): Promise<void> {
538	    const dedupeKey = `${TaskType.REVIEW_INVOICE}:${p.id}`;
539	    // dedupeKey is globally unique — reuse (and reopen) any existing row.
540	    const existing = await this.tasks.findOne({ where: { dedupeKey } });
541	    if (existing) {
542	      if (existing.state !== TaskState.OPEN) {
543	        existing.state = TaskState.OPEN;
544	        existing.resolvedAt = null;
545	        existing.resolution = null;
546	        await this.tasks.save(existing);
547	      }
548	      return;
549	    }
550	    const task = this.tasks.create({
551	      type: TaskType.REVIEW_INVOICE,
552	      refType: TaskRefType.PROPOSAL,
553	      refId: p.id,
554	      state: TaskState.OPEN,
555	      title: `Review invoice for ${clientName}`,
556	      summary: `Proposal ${p.reference ?? p.id} needs review (£${Number(p.total)}).`,
557	      context: {
558	        proposalId: p.id,
559	        clientName,
560	        total: Number(p.total),
561	        currency: p.currency,
562	      },
563	      dedupeKey,
564	    });
565	    await this.tasks.save(task);
566	  }
567	
568	  private async markMeetingSent(meetingId: string | null): Promise<void> {
569	    if (!meetingId) return;
570	    const meeting = await this.meetings.findOne({ where: { id: meetingId } });
571	    if (!meeting) return;
572	    meeting.state = MeetingState.SENT;
573	    await this.meetings.save(meeting);
574	  }
575	}
576	
577	function errMsg(err: unknown): string {
578	  if (err instanceof Error) return err.message;
579	  return String(err);
580	}
581

1	import { Entity, Column, Index } from 'typeorm';
2	import { BaseEntity } from './base.entity';
3	import { ConnectionKind, ConnectionStatus } from './enums';
4	
5	// Integration health, surfaced truthfully on the Connections panel. One row
6	// per integration kind. Never faked — LIVE vs FALLBACK is the honest state.
7	@Entity('connection_states')
8	export class ConnectionState extends BaseEntity {
9	  @Index({ unique: true })
10	  @Column({ type: 'enum', enum: ConnectionKind })
11	  kind!: ConnectionKind;
12	
13	  @Column({ type: 'enum', enum: ConnectionStatus, default: ConnectionStatus.DOWN })
14	  status!: ConnectionStatus;
15	
16	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', nullable: true })
17	  label!: string | null; // org name / mailbox / calendar id
18	
19	  @Column({ type: 'text', nullable: true })
20	  detail!: string | null; // human explanation of the current status
21	
22	  @Column({ type: 'timestamptz', nullable: true })
23	  lastSyncAt!: Date | null;
24	
25	  @Column({ type: 'timestamptz', nullable: true })
26	  nextPollAt!: Date | null;
27	}
28

 `./api/src/modules/detections/detections.service.ts`

```text
1	import { BadRequestException, Injectable, Logger, NotFoundException } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3	import { In, Repository } from 'typeorm';
4	import { promises as fs } from 'node:fs';
5	import * as path from 'node:path';
6	
7	import {
8	  AuditActor,
9	  Client,
10	  Detection,
11	  DetectionState,
12	  DetectionType,
13	  DetectionEvidence,
14	  InvoiceProposal,
15	  InvoiceProposalState,
16	  ProposalLine,
17	  ProvenanceKind,
18	  Task,
19	  TaskRefType,
20	  TaskState,
21	  TaskType,
22	} from '../../entities';
23	import { XeroService } from '../xero/xero.service';
24	import { AuditService } from '../audit/audit.service';
25	import {
26	  DetectionActionResultDto,
27	  DetectionDto,
28	  DetectionProposeResultDto,
29	  RunDetectorsResultDto,
30	} from './dto/detection-response.dto';
31	
32	const UK_VAT_PCT = 20;
33	
34	function round2(n: number): number {
35	  return Math.round((n + Number.EPSILON) * 100) / 100;
36	}
37	
38	function errMsg(err: unknown): string {
39	  return err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
40	}
41	
42	// A detector's proposed row before it is persisted (dedupe + audit happen once,
43	// centrally, in persistCandidates).
44	interface Candidate {
45	  type: DetectionType;
46	  clientId: string | null;
47	  valueGbp: number;
48	  evidence: DetectionEvidence;
49	  dedupeKey: string;
50	}
51	
52	// Loop 3: the three deterministic ledger detectors. Every detector reads Xero
53	// when it is live and falls back to LOCAL Postgres/seed data when it is not, so
54	// the recovery loop always demos. The detectors PROPOSE money to recover; they
55	// never write to Xero. Each new detection records an AuditEvent, and re-running
56	// is idempotent via the unique Detection.dedupeKey.
57	@Injectable()
58	export class DetectionsService {
59	  private readonly log = new Logger('DetectionsService');
60	
61	  constructor(
62	    @InjectRepository(Detection)
63	    private readonly detections: Repository<Detection>,
64	    @InjectRepository(Client)
65	    private readonly clients: Repository<Client>,
66	    @InjectRepository(InvoiceProposal)
67	    private readonly proposals: Repository<InvoiceProposal>,
68	    @InjectRepository(Task)
69	    private readonly tasks: Repository<Task>,
70	    private readonly xero: XeroService,
71	    private readonly audit: AuditService,
72	  ) {}
73	
74	  // ---- Run the three detectors --------------------------------------------
75	
76	  async runDetectors(): Promise<RunDetectorsResultDto> {
77	    const ranAt = new Date();
78	    const clients = await this.clients.find();
79	
80	    // Probe Xero once. Even when it reports LIVE each call is still wrapped, so
81	    // a mid-run failure degrades to the local path rather than 500-ing.
82	    let xeroLive = false;
83	    try {
84	      xeroLive = (await this.xero.health()).ok;
85	    } catch (err) {
86	      this.log.warn(`Xero health probe failed: ${errMsg(err)}`);
87	    }
88	
89	    const candidates: Candidate[] = [];
90	    const usedXero = { value: false };
91	    const usedLocal = { value: false };
92	
93	    for (const detect of [
94	      () => this.detectQuoteNotInvoiced(clients, xeroLive, usedXero, usedLocal),
95	      () => this.detectRetainerStopped(clients, xeroLive, usedXero, usedLocal),
96	      () => this.detectExpenseNotRecharged(clients, usedLocal),
97	    ]) {
98	      try {
99	        candidates.push(...(await detect()));
100	      } catch (err) {
101	        // A detector must never sink the whole run.
102	        this.log.warn(`Detector failed: ${errMsg(err)}`);
103	      }
104	    }
105	
106	    const { created, skipped } = await this.persistCandidates(candidates);
107	
108	    const counts = {
109	      QUOTE_NOT_INVOICED: created.filter((d) => d.type === DetectionType.QUOTE_NOT_INVOICED).length,
110	      RETAINER_STOPPED: created.filter((d) => d.type === DetectionType.RETAINER_STOPPED).length,
111	      EXPENSE_NOT_RECHARGED: created.filter((d) => d.type === DetectionType.EXPENSE_NOT_RECHARGED).length,
112	    };
113	
114	    const source =
115	      usedXero.value && usedLocal.value ? 'mixed' : usedXero.value ? 'xero' : 'local';
116	
117	    const nameById = new Map(clients.map((c) => [c.id, c.name]));
118	    const detections = created.map((d) => this.toDto(d, nameById.get(d.clientId ?? '') ?? 'Unknown client', null));
119	
120	    await this.audit.record({
121	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
122	      action: 'detections.run',
123	      summary:
124	        `Ledger detectors ran (${source}): ${created.length} new detection(s), ${skipped} already known ` +
125	        `(quotes ${counts.QUOTE_NOT_INVOICED}, retainers ${counts.RETAINER_STOPPED}, expenses ${counts.EXPENSE_NOT_RECHARGED}).`,
126	      subjectType: 'detection',
127	      inputs: { source, created: created.length, skipped, counts },
128	    });
129	
130	    return {
131	      source,
132	      created: created.length,
133	      skipped,
134	      counts,
135	      detections,
136	      ranAt: ranAt.toISOString(),
137	      message:
138	        created.length > 0
139	          ? `Found ${created.length} new recoverable item(s) worth £${round2(created.reduce((s, d) => s + Number(d.valueGbp), 0))}.`
140	          : 'No new leaks found. Everything billable is accounted for.',
141	    };
142	  }
143	
144	  // ---- Detector 1: accepted quote never invoiced --------------------------
145	
146	  private async detectQuoteNotInvoiced(
147	    clients: Client[],
148	    xeroLive: boolean,
149	    usedXero: { value: boolean },
150	    usedLocal: { value: boolean },
151	  ): Promise<Candidate[]> {
152	    // Gather accepted quotes from Xero, else from a local seed fixture.
153	    type QuoteRow = {
154	      id: string;
155	      number: string;
156	      contactName: string;
157	      total: number;
158	      reference: string;
159	    };
160	    let quotes: QuoteRow[] = [];
161	    let source: 'xero' | 'local' = 'local';
162	
163	    if (xeroLive) {
164	      try {
165	        const raw = await this.xero.listQuotes('ACCEPTED');
166	        quotes = raw.map((q) => ({
167	          id: q.QuoteID ?? q.QuoteNumber ?? '',
168	          number: q.QuoteNumber ?? q.QuoteID ?? '',
169	          contactName: q.Contact?.Name ?? '',
170	          total: Number(q.Total ?? 0),
171	          reference: q.Reference ?? '',
172	        }));
173	        source = 'xero';
174	        usedXero.value = true;
175	      } catch (err) {
176	        this.log.warn(`listQuotes failed, using local quote fixture: ${errMsg(err)}`);
177	      }
178	    }
179	    if (source === 'local') {
180	      const rawFixtures = await this.readJsonFixture(['quotes.json']);
181	      quotes = rawFixtures
182	        // Keep ACCEPTED rows; if no status field is present, assume seedable.
183	        .filter((r) => {
184	          const st = this.str(r, 'status', 'Status');
185	          return st ? st.toUpperCase() === 'ACCEPTED' : true;
186	        })
187	        .map((r) => ({
188	          id: this.str(r, 'quoteId', 'QuoteID', 'id', 'quoteNumber', 'number'),
189	          number: this.str(r, 'quoteNumber', 'QuoteNumber', 'number', 'id'),
190	          contactName: this.str(r, 'contactName', 'clientName', 'ContactName', 'name'),
191	          total: this.num(r, 'total', 'Total', 'amount', 'value'),
192	          reference: this.str(r, 'reference', 'Reference'),
193	        }));
194	      if (quotes.length > 0) usedLocal.value = true;
195	    }
196	
197	    if (quotes.length === 0) return [];
198	
199	    // Which quotes are already invoiced? Reference strings from live ACCREC
200	    // invoices + local proposals; a quote is invoiced if its number/reference
201	    // shows up in one of them.
202	    const invoicedRefs = new Set<string>();
203	    if (xeroLive) {
204	      try {
205	        const { invoices } = await this.xero.listInvoices(['SUBMITTED', 'AUTHORISED', 'PAID', 'DRAFT']);
206	        for (const inv of invoices) {
207	          if (inv.Reference) invoicedRefs.add(inv.Reference.toLowerCase());
208	        }
209	        usedXero.value = true;
210	      } catch (err) {
211	        this.log.warn(`listInvoices failed while checking quotes: ${errMsg(err)}`);
212	      }
213	    }
214	    const localProposals = await this.proposals.find();
215	    for (const p of localProposals) {
216	      if (p.reference) invoicedRefs.add(p.reference.toLowerCase());
217	    }
218	
219	    const isInvoiced = (q: QuoteRow): boolean => {
220	      const needles = [q.number, q.reference].map((s) => s.toLowerCase()).filter(Boolean);
221	      for (const ref of invoicedRefs) {
222	        if (needles.some((n) => ref.includes(n))) return true;
223	      }
224	      return false;
225	    };
226	
227	    const out: Candidate[] = [];
228	    for (const q of quotes) {
229	      if (isInvoiced(q)) continue;
230	      const clientId = this.resolveClientIdByName(clients, q.contactName);
231	      out.push({
232	        type: DetectionType.QUOTE_NOT_INVOICED,
233	        clientId,
234	        valueGbp: round2(q.total),
235	        dedupeKey: `${DetectionType.QUOTE_NOT_INVOICED}:${q.id || q.number}`,
236	        evidence: {
237	          summary:
238	            `Accepted quote ${q.number || q.id} for ${q.contactName || 'a client'} (£${round2(q.total)}) ` +
239	            `was never turned into an invoice.`,
240	          source,
241	          quoteId: q.id,
242	          quoteNumber: q.number,
243	          contactName: q.contactName,
244	          total: round2(q.total),
245	          reference: q.reference || null,
246	        },
247	      });
248	    }
249	    return out;
250	  }
251	
252	  // ---- Detector 2: retainer cadence broke this month ----------------------
253	
254	  private async detectRetainerStopped(
255	    clients: Client[],
256	    xeroLive: boolean,
257	    usedXero: { value: boolean },
258	    usedLocal: { value: boolean },
259	  ): Promise<Candidate[]> {
260	    const now = new Date();
261	    const gapMonth = monthKey(now); // e.g. "2026-07"
262	    const gapLabel = monthLabel(now);
263	
264	    // Retainer clients: cadence mentions "retainer" or "month".
265	    const retainerClients = clients.filter((c) => {
266	      const cadence = (c.billingProfile?.cadence ?? '').toLowerCase();
267	      return cadence.includes('retainer') || cadence.includes('month');
268	    });
269	    if (retainerClients.length === 0) return [];
270	
271	    // Local SENT history is the reliable seed-backed cadence signal.
272	    const clientIds = retainerClients.map((c) => c.id);
273	    const sent = await this.proposals.find({
274	      where: { clientId: In(clientIds), state: InvoiceProposalState.SENT },
275	    });
276	    const monthsByClient = new Map<string, Set<string>>();
277	    for (const p of sent) {
278	      const created = p.createdAt instanceof Date ? p.createdAt : new Date(p.createdAt);
279	      const set = monthsByClient.get(p.clientId) ?? new Set<string>();
280	      set.add(monthKey(created));
281	      monthsByClient.set(p.clientId, set);
282	    }
283	
284	    // When Xero is live, corroborate with the payments feed (best-effort).
285	    let paymentCount: number | null = null;
286	    if (xeroLive) {
287	      try {
288	        paymentCount = (await this.xero.listPayments()).length;
289	        usedXero.value = true;
290	      } catch (err) {
291	        this.log.warn(`listPayments failed for retainer cadence: ${errMsg(err)}`);
292	      }
293	    }
294	
295	    const out: Candidate[] = [];
296	    for (const c of retainerClients) {
297	      const months = monthsByClient.get(c.id) ?? new Set<string>();
298	      const priorMonths = [...months].filter((m) => m < gapMonth).sort();
299	      // Need an established cadence (>=2 prior invoiced months) with none this month.
300	      if (priorMonths.length < 2) continue;
301	      if (months.has(gapMonth)) continue;
302	
303	      const expected = Number(c.billingProfile?.rate ?? 0);
304	      const source: 'xero' | 'local' = paymentCount !== null ? 'xero' : 'local';
305	      if (source === 'xero') usedXero.value = true;
306	      else usedLocal.value = true;
307	
308	      out.push({
309	        type: DetectionType.RETAINER_STOPPED,
310	        clientId: c.id,
311	        valueGbp: round2(expected),
312	        dedupeKey: `${DetectionType.RETAINER_STOPPED}:${c.id}:${gapMonth}`,
313	        evidence: {
314	          summary:
315	            `${c.name} has invoiced a retainer in ${priorMonths.length} prior month(s) but no invoice was ` +
316	            `raised for ${gapLabel}. Expected £${round2(expected)}.`,
317	          source,
318	          expectedGbp: round2(expected),
319	          gapMonth,
320	          gapLabel,
321	          cadence: c.billingProfile?.cadence ?? null,
322	          invoicedMonths: priorMonths,
323	          lastInvoicedMonth: priorMonths[priorMonths.length - 1] ?? null,
324	          ...(paymentCount !== null ? { xeroPaymentsSeen: paymentCount } : {}),
325	        },
326	      });
327	    }
328	    return out;
329	  }
330	
331	  // ---- Detector 3: billable expense never recharged -----------------------
332	
333	  private async detectExpenseNotRecharged(
334	    clients: Client[],
335	    usedLocal: { value: boolean },
336	  ): Promise<Candidate[]> {
337	    // There is no Xero expense read in this project, so recharge detection is
338	    // driven from local seed data: billable expenses that never made it onto an
339	    // invoice. Read defensively so a hand-written fixture still loads.
340	    const rows = await this.readJsonFixture(['expenses.json']);
341	    if (rows.length === 0) return [];
342	
343	    const out: Candidate[] = [];
344	    for (const r of rows) {
345	      const billable = this.bool(r, 'billable', 'isBillable', 'rechargeable') ?? true;
346	      const invoiced = this.bool(r, 'invoiced', 'recharged', 'onInvoice') ?? false;
347	      if (!billable || invoiced) continue;
348	
349	      const id = this.str(r, 'id', 'expenseId', 'reference', 'Reference');
350	      const amount = this.num(r, 'amount', 'Amount', 'total', 'value', 'gbp');
351	      const description = this.str(r, 'description', 'Description', 'name', 'label') || 'Billable expense';
352	      const clientName = this.str(r, 'clientName', 'contactName', 'client', 'name');
353	      const clientId = this.str(r, 'clientId') || this.resolveClientIdByName(clients, clientName);
354	
355	      out.push({
356	        type: DetectionType.EXPENSE_NOT_RECHARGED,
357	        clientId: clientId || null,
358	        valueGbp: round2(amount),
359	        dedupeKey: `${DetectionType.EXPENSE_NOT_RECHARGED}:${id || `${description}:${amount}`}`,
360	        evidence: {
361	          summary:
362	            `Billable expense "${description}" (£${round2(amount)})${clientName ? ` for ${clientName}` : ''} ` +
363	            `was never recharged to the client.`,
364	          source: 'local',
365	          expenseId: id || null,
366	          description,
367	          amount: round2(amount),
368	          clientName: clientName || null,
369	        },
370	      });
371	    }
372	    if (out.length > 0) usedLocal.value = true;
373	    return out;
374	  }
375	
376	  // ---- Persist candidates idempotently ------------------------------------
377	
378	  private async persistCandidates(
379	    candidates: Candidate[],
380	  ): Promise<{ created: Detection[]; skipped: number }> {
381	    const created: Detection[] = [];
382	    let skipped = 0;
383	
384	    for (const c of candidates) {
385	      const existing = await this.detections.findOne({ where: { dedupeKey: c.dedupeKey } });
386	      if (existing) {
387	        skipped += 1;
388	        continue;
389	      }
390	      // Semantic guard: never open a second active detection of the same type
391	      // for the same client (e.g. one "retainer stopped" per client at a time).
392	      // This keeps re-runs idempotent even against seed rows whose dedupeKey
393	      // was minted differently. Detections with no client fall back to the key.
394	      if (c.clientId) {
395	        const active = await this.detections.findOne({
396	          where: [
397	            { type: c.type, clientId: c.clientId, state: DetectionState.OPEN },
398	            { type: c.type, clientId: c.clientId, state: DetectionState.PROPOSED },
399	          ],
400	        });
401	        if (active) {
402	          skipped += 1;
403	          continue;
404	        }
405	      }
406	      const row = this.detections.create({
407	        type: c.type,
408	        clientId: c.clientId,
409	        valueGbp: round2(c.valueGbp),
410	        evidence: c.evidence,
411	        state: DetectionState.OPEN,
412	        xeroInvoiceId: null,
413	        dedupeKey: c.dedupeKey,
414	      });
415	      const saved = await this.detections.save(row);
416	      created.push(saved);
417	
418	      await this.audit.record({
419	        actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
420	        action: 'detection.created',
421	        summary: `${c.type} detected (£${round2(c.valueGbp)}): ${c.evidence.summary}`,
422	        subjectType: 'detection',
423	        subjectId: saved.id,
424	        inputs: { type: c.type, valueGbp: round2(c.valueGbp), source: c.evidence.source, dedupeKey: c.dedupeKey },
425	      });
426	    }
427	
428	    return { created, skipped };
429	  }
430	
431	  // ---- List ---------------------------------------------------------------
432	
433	  async list(state?: DetectionState, type?: DetectionType): Promise<DetectionDto[]> {
434	    const where: { state?: DetectionState; type?: DetectionType } = {};
435	    if (state) where.state = state;
436	    if (type) where.type = type;
437	    const rows = await this.detections.find({ where, order: { createdAt: 'DESC' } });
438	
439	    const clientIds = [...new Set(rows.map((r) => r.clientId).filter((v): v is string => !!v))];
440	    const clientRows = clientIds.length
441	      ? await this.clients.find({ where: { id: In(clientIds) } })
442	      : [];
443	    const nameById = new Map(clientRows.map((c) => [c.id, c.name]));
444	
445	    // Link any proposal built from these detections (for the drill-down).
446	    const detectionIds = rows.map((r) => r.id);
447	    const proposalRows = detectionIds.length
448	      ? await this.proposals.find({ where: { detectionId: In(detectionIds) } })
449	      : [];
450	    const proposalByDetection = new Map(proposalRows.map((p) => [p.detectionId as string, p.id]));
451	
452	    return rows.map((d) =>
453	      this.toDto(
454	        d,
455	        d.clientId ? nameById.get(d.clientId) ?? 'Unknown client' : 'Unmatched',
456	        proposalByDetection.get(d.id) ?? null,
457	      ),
458	    );
459	  }
460	
461	  // ---- Propose: build an invoice proposal from a detection ----------------
462	
463	  async propose(id: string): Promise<DetectionProposeResultDto> {
464	    const detection = await this.detections.findOne({ where: { id } });
465	    if (!detection) throw new NotFoundException(`Detection ${id} not found`);
466	
467	    // Idempotent: if we already proposed, return the existing proposal.
468	    const already = await this.proposals.findOne({ where: { detectionId: detection.id } });
469	    if (already) {
470	      return this.proposeResult(detection, already, null, 'This detection was already turned into a proposal.');
471	    }
472	
473	    // A proposal must belong to a client (the invoice recipient). An unmatched
474	    // detection has to be tied to a client before it can be invoiced.
475	    if (!detection.clientId) {
476	      throw new BadRequestException(
477	        `Detection ${id} is not matched to a client, so it cannot be turned into an invoice yet.`,
478	      );
479	    }
480	
481	    const client = await this.clients.findOne({ where: { id: detection.clientId } });
482	    const value = round2(Number(detection.valueGbp));
483	    const subtotal = value;
484	    const taxTotal = round2((subtotal * UK_VAT_PCT) / 100);
485	    const total = round2(subtotal + taxTotal);
486	
487	    const accountCode = await this.defaultAccountCode();
488	    const line: ProposalLine = {
489	      description: detection.evidence?.summary ?? `${detection.type} recovery`,
490	      quantity: 1,
491	      unit_amount: value,
492	      account_code: accountCode,
493	      line_amount: value,
494	      provenance: [
495	        {
496	          kind: ProvenanceKind.LEDGER,
497	          label: detection.type,
498	          detail: detection.evidence?.summary ?? '',
499	          source_ref: detection.id,
500	        },
501	      ],
502	    };
503	
504	    const reference = `ROBYN-DET-${detection.id.slice(0, 8)}`;
505	    const proposal = this.proposals.create({
506	      meetingId: null,
507	      detectionId: detection.id,
508	      clientId: detection.clientId,
509	      lines: [line],
510	      currency: 'GBP',
511	      subtotal,
512	      taxTotal,
513	      total,
514	      policyResult: {
515	        auto: false,
516	        reasons: [
517	          `Ledger detection (${detection.type}) — a human confirms before this is invoiced.`,
518	        ],
519	      },
520	      state: InvoiceProposalState.IN_REVIEW,
521	      reference,
522	      autoSent: false,
523	    });
524	    const savedProposal = await this.proposals.save(proposal);
525	
526	    detection.state = DetectionState.PROPOSED;
527	    // xeroInvoiceId intentionally stays null — nothing is written to Xero here.
528	    await this.detections.save(detection);
529	
530	    const taskId = await this.raiseReviewTask(savedProposal, client?.name ?? 'client', total);
531	
532	    await this.audit.record({
533	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
534	      action: 'detection.proposed',
535	      summary:
536	        `Built proposal ${reference} from ${detection.type} for ${client?.name ?? 'unmatched client'} ` +
537	        `(£${total} incl. VAT). Raised REVIEW_INVOICE for the human.`,
538	      subjectType: 'detection',
539	      subjectId: detection.id,
540	      inputs: { proposalId: savedProposal.id, reference, total, taskId },
541	    });
542	
543	    return this.proposeResult(detection, savedProposal, taskId, `Proposal ${reference} is ready for your review.`);
544	  }
545	
546	  // ---- Dismiss ------------------------------------------------------------
547	
548	  async dismiss(id: string, reason?: string): Promise<DetectionActionResultDto> {
549	    const detection = await this.detections.findOne({ where: { id } });
550	    if (!detection) throw new NotFoundException(`Detection ${id} not found`);
551	
552	    detection.state = DetectionState.DISMISSED;
553	    await this.detections.save(detection);
554	
555	    await this.audit.record({
556	      actor: AuditActor.HUMAN,
557	      action: 'detection.dismissed',
558	      summary:
559	        `Dismissed ${detection.type} (£${round2(Number(detection.valueGbp))})` +
560	        (reason ? `: ${reason}` : '.'),
561	      subjectType: 'detection',
562	      subjectId: detection.id,
563	      inputs: { reason: reason ?? null },
564	    });
565	
566	    return {
567	      id: detection.id,
568	      state: detection.state,
569	      message: 'Detection dismissed.',
570	    };
571	  }
572	
573	  // ---- Helpers ------------------------------------------------------------
574	
575	  private toDto(d: Detection, clientName: string, proposalId: string | null): DetectionDto {
576	    return {
577	      id: d.id,
578	      type: d.type,
579	      clientId: d.clientId,
580	      clientName,
581	      valueGbp: Number(d.valueGbp),
582	      summary: d.evidence?.summary ?? '',
583	      source: (d.evidence?.source as string) ?? 'local',
584	      evidence: (d.evidence ?? {}) as Record<string, unknown>,
585	      state: d.state,
586	      proposalId,
587	      xeroInvoiceId: d.xeroInvoiceId,
588	      createdAt: d.createdAt instanceof Date ? d.createdAt.toISOString() : String(d.createdAt),
589	    };
590	  }
591	
592	  private proposeResult(
593	    detection: Detection,
594	    proposal: InvoiceProposal,
595	    taskId: string | null,
596	    message: string,
597	  ): DetectionProposeResultDto {
598	    return {
599	      detectionId: detection.id,
600	      detectionState: detection.state,
601	      proposalId: proposal.id,
602	      proposalReference: proposal.reference,
603	      subtotal: Number(proposal.subtotal),
604	      taxTotal: Number(proposal.taxTotal),
605	      total: Number(proposal.total),
606	      taskId,
607	      message,
608	    };
609	  }
610	
611	  private async raiseReviewTask(
612	    proposal: InvoiceProposal,
613	    clientName: string,
614	    total: number,
615	  ): Promise<string | null> {
616	    const dedupeKey = `${TaskType.REVIEW_INVOICE}:${proposal.id}`;
617	    const existing = await this.tasks.findOne({ where: { dedupeKey } });
618	    if (existing) return existing.id;
619	
620	    const task = this.tasks.create({
621	      type: TaskType.REVIEW_INVOICE,
622	      refType: TaskRefType.PROPOSAL,
623	      refId: proposal.id,
624	      state: TaskState.OPEN,
625	      title: `Review invoice for ${clientName}`,
626	      summary: `Ledger recovery proposal ${proposal.reference ?? proposal.id} needs review (£${round2(total)}).`,
627	      context: {
628	        proposalId: proposal.id,
629	        detectionId: proposal.detectionId,
630	        clientName,
631	        total: round2(total),
632	        currency: proposal.currency,
633	        actionEndpoint: `/api/proposals/${proposal.id}/approve`,
634	        rejectEndpoint: `/api/proposals/${proposal.id}/reject`,
635	      },
636	      dedupeKey,
637	    });
638	    const saved = await this.tasks.save(task);
639	    return saved.id;
640	  }
641	
642	  private async defaultAccountCode(): Promise<string> {
643	    try {
644	      return await this.xero.defaultSalesAccountCode();
645	    } catch {
646	      return '200';
647	    }
648	  }
649	
650	  private resolveClientIdByName(clients: Client[], name: string): string | null {
651	    const needle = (name ?? '').trim().toLowerCase();
652	    if (!needle) return null;
653	    const match = clients.find(
654	      (c) => c.name.trim().toLowerCase() === needle || c.name.trim().toLowerCase().includes(needle),
655	    );
656	    return match?.id ?? null;
657	  }
658	
659	  // --- Local seed fixture reader (mirrors the email fixture pattern) --------
660	  // Looks for detector source rows the seed writes under seed/data/detections/.
661	  // Each file is a single object or an array; missing files return [].
662	  private async readJsonFixture(fileNames: string[]): Promise<Record<string, unknown>[]> {
663	    const dir = await this.resolveFixtureDir();
664	    if (!dir) return [];
665	    const out: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];
666	    for (const name of fileNames) {
667	      try {
668	        const raw = await fs.readFile(path.join(dir, name), 'utf8');
669	        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
670	        const records = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [parsed];
671	        for (const rec of records) {
672	          if (rec && typeof rec === 'object') out.push(rec as Record<string, unknown>);
673	        }
674	      } catch {
675	        // missing / unreadable fixture — treat as empty
676	      }
677	    }
678	    return out;
679	  }
680	
681	  private async resolveFixtureDir(): Promise<string | null> {
682	    const candidates = [
683	      path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'seed/data/detections'),
684	      path.resolve(process.cwd(), '../seed/data/detections'),
685	      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../seed/data/detections'),
686	      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../../seed/data/detections'),
687	    ];
688	    for (const c of candidates) {
689	      try {
690	        const st = await fs.stat(c);
691	        if (st.isDirectory()) return c;
692	      } catch {
693	        // try next
694	      }
695	    }
696	    return null;
697	  }
698	
699	  private str(r: Record<string, unknown>, ...keys: string[]): string {
700	    for (const k of keys) {
701	      const v = r[k];
702	      if (typeof v === 'string' && v.trim().length > 0) return v.trim();
703	      if (typeof v === 'number') return String(v);
704	    }
705	    return '';
706	  }
707	
708	  private num(r: Record<string, unknown>, ...keys: string[]): number {
709	    for (const k of keys) {
710	      const v = r[k];
711	      if (typeof v === 'number' && !Number.isNaN(v)) return v;
712	      if (typeof v === 'string') {
713	        const n = Number(v.replace(/[^0-9.\-]/g, ''));
714	        if (!Number.isNaN(n) && v.trim() !== '') return n;
715	      }
716	    }
717	    return 0;
718	  }
719	
720	  private bool(r: Record<string, unknown>, ...keys: string[]): boolean | null {
721	    for (const k of keys) {
722	      const v = r[k];
723	      if (typeof v === 'boolean') return v;
724	      if (typeof v === 'string') {
725	        const s = v.trim().toLowerCase();
726	        if (['true', 'yes', '1'].includes(s)) return true;
727	        if (['false', 'no', '0'].includes(s)) return false;
728	      }
729	    }
730	    return null;
731	  }
732	}
733	
734	// --- month helpers -----------------------------------------------------------
735	function monthKey(d: Date): string {
736	  return `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}`;
737	}
738	
739	function monthLabel(d: Date): string {
740	  return d.toLocaleString('en-GB', { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' });
741	}
742
```

 `./api/src/config/env.ts`

```text
1	// Central env access. Required secrets are asserted non-empty at boot with
2	// named errors so a misconfigured process dies at startup, not mid-demo.
3	// Values are read from api/.env (loaded by @nestjs/config in AppModule).
4	
5	export class MissingEnvError extends Error {
6	  constructor(name: string) {
7	    super(
8	      `MissingEnv: ${name} is empty — set it in api/.env. Robyn refuses to boot ` +
9	        `without it rather than fail obscurely later.`,
10	    );
11	    this.name = 'MissingEnvError';
12	  }
13	}
14	
15	function req(name: string): string {
16	  const v = process.env[name];
17	  if (!v || v.trim() === '') throw new MissingEnvError(name);
18	  return v.trim();
19	}
20	
21	function opt(name: string, fallback = ''): string {
22	  const v = process.env[name];
23	  return v && v.trim() !== '' ? v.trim() : fallback;
24	}
25	
26	export interface RobynConfig {
27	  port: number;
28	  databaseUrl: string;
29	  anthropicApiKey: string;
30	  xero: {
31	    clientId: string;
32	    clientSecret: string;
33	    scopes: string; // XERO_SCOPES override (empty => broad-then-granular fallback)
34	    paymentAccountCode: string; // optional; needed only for Payments writes
35	  };
36	  imap: {
37	    host: string;
38	    port: number;
39	    user: string;
40	    password: string;
41	    configured: boolean;
42	  };
43	  google: {
44	    clientId: string;
45	    clientSecret: string;
46	    configured: boolean;
47	  };
48	}
49	
50	let cached: RobynConfig | null = null;
51	
52	// Assert the hard-required secrets. Xero + Anthropic + DB are mandatory; IMAP
53	// and Google are optional (documented .ics / fixture-mailbox fallbacks exist).
54	export function loadConfig(): RobynConfig {
55	  if (cached) return cached;
56	  const imapHost = opt('IMAP_HOST');
57	  const imapUser = opt('IMAP_USER');
58	  const imapPassword = opt('IMAP_PASSWORD');
59	  const googleClientId = opt('GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID');
60	  const googleClientSecret = opt('GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET');
61	
62	  cached = {
63	    port: Number(opt('PORT', '4000')),
64	    databaseUrl: req('DATABASE_URL'),
65	    anthropicApiKey: req('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'),
66	    xero: {
67	      clientId: req('XERO_CLIENT_ID'),
68	      clientSecret: req('XERO_CLIENT_SECRET'),
69	      scopes: opt('XERO_SCOPES'),
70	      paymentAccountCode: opt('XERO_PAYMENT_ACCOUNT_CODE'),
71	    },
72	    imap: {
73	      host: imapHost,
74	      port: Number(opt('IMAP_PORT', '993')),
75	      user: imapUser,
76	      password: imapPassword,
77	      configured: Boolean(imapHost && imapUser && imapPassword),
78	    },
79	    google: {
80	      clientId: googleClientId,
81	      clientSecret: googleClientSecret,
82	      configured: Boolean(googleClientId && googleClientSecret),
83	    },
84	  };
85	  return cached;
86	}
87

_**Agent (claude-fable-5 2026-07-05 00:14:20Z)**_

The study fleet is running. Here's the answer you need before you sleep:

## You need to configure nothing — sleep well

- **Google credentials: already handled.** I lifted `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` and `GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET` straight from `myMan_backend_core/.env` into Robyn's `api/.env` (file-to-file, never printed). No `google-services.json` exists or is needed — that's an Android/Firebase artifact; a web-server OAuth flow needs exactly the two values I copied plus a redirect URI.
- **No Google Cloud Console changes needed either.** myMan's registered dev redirect URI is `http://localhost:3000/api/v1/calendar-providers/google/callback` — port 3000 is exactly where Robyn's web app runs, so I'm mirroring that precise path in Robyn's frontend and reusing the registration as-is.
- **Your one action, tomorrow morning, not tonight:** click "Connect Google" on the Connections page and sign in with the same Google account you use with myMan. The OAuth consent can only happen with you at the keyboard.

Two small caveats to be aware of (no action needed):

1. **Gmail scope**: myMan's OAuth app has only ever consented calendar scopes. I'll request `gmail.readonly` in the same consent — as a test user on that app you'll see an "unverified app" warning to click through. If Google refuses the restricted scope outright, the build degrades gracefully: calendar goes fully live, email stays on the honest fixture fallback, and it's a 2-minute console tweak later, not a code change.
2. Don't run the myMan dev frontend while demoing Robyn — both want port 3000.

The chat agent and web search run on the `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` already in the env (web search is Anthropic's built-in tool, no extra key), and charts need no new services.

## Overnight plan (running now)

1. **Study** (in progress): 5 parallel readers producing porting blueprints from myMan's OAuth backend, the calendar UI you called perfect, content-studio's settings patterns, plus Robyn's own integration points and chart/chat data feasibility.
2. **Google OAuth + calendar/gmail sync** into Robyn's api with the `:3000` callback mirror, Connections panel flipping to LIVE truthfully.
3. **Calendar rebuild**: week view + side month mini, Google-Calendar clean, keeping Robyn's paid/unpaid colour coding and evidence panel.
4. **Agentic chat**: read-only finance tools over your real data + web search, streaming chat in a right-side panel with a bubble, and a Settings section (system prompt editor, MCP/tools, skills) modeled on content-studio.
5. **Dashboard rework**: compact one-line task tiles with progressive-disclosure dialogs, Xero-dashboard-style charts (invoices owed buckets, cash in/out, money Robyn found), light mode as default. One note: the image you mentioned didn't come through in your message — I'm working from the real Xero dashboard layout (invoices owed / bills to pay / cash in-out bars); drop the image in the morning if you want something different.
6. **QA sweep in Chrome + gate-labelled commits**, demoable at every checkpoint, pushed by morning.
