 `/Users/devansh/devanshkaria_dev_ecosystem/myMan_backend_core/src/modules/calendar-sync/calendar-sync.service.ts`

```text
1	import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3	import { MoreThanOrEqual, Repository } from 'typeorm';
4	import { ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';
5	import { google } from 'googleapis';
6	import { Client } from '@microsoft/microsoft-graph-client';
7	import { ConfidentialClientApplication } from '@azure/msal-node';
8	import {
9	  CalendarProvider,
10	  CalendarProviderType,
11	  SyncStatus,
12	} from '../calendar-providers/entities/calendar-provider.entity';
13	import {
14	  CalendarEvent,
15	  EventStatus,
16	} from '../calendar-events/entities/calendar-event.entity';
17	
18	@Injectable()
19	export class CalendarSyncService {
20	  private readonly logger = new Logger(CalendarSyncService.name);
21	
22	  constructor(
23	    @InjectRepository(CalendarProvider)
24	    private calendarProviderRepository: Repository<CalendarProvider>,
25	    @InjectRepository(CalendarEvent)
26	    private calendarEventRepository: Repository<CalendarEvent>,
27	    private configService: ConfigService,
28	  ) {}
29	
30	  /**
31	   * Sync events for a specific calendar provider
32	   */
33	  async syncProvider(providerId: string): Promise<void> {
34	    const provider = await this.calendarProviderRepository.findOne({
35	      where: { id: providerId, isDeleted: false },
36	    });
37	
38	    if (!provider) {
39	      throw new Error(`Provider ${providerId} not found`);
40	    }
41	
42	    if (!provider.isActive) {
43	      this.logger.warn(`Provider ${providerId} is not active, skipping sync`);
44	      return;
45	    }
46	
47	    try {
48	      // Update sync status
49	      await this.updateSyncStatus(provider.id, SyncStatus.SYNCING);
50	
51	      if (provider.providerType === CalendarProviderType.GOOGLE) {
52	        await this.syncGoogleCalendar(provider);
53	      } else if (provider.providerType === CalendarProviderType.MICROSOFT) {
54	        await this.syncMicrosoftCalendar(provider);
55	      }
56	
57	      // Update last synced time and status
58	      await this.calendarProviderRepository.update(provider.id, {
59	        lastSyncedAt: new Date(),
60	        syncStatus: SyncStatus.ACTIVE,
61	        syncError: null,
62	      });
63	
64	      this.logger.log(`Successfully synced provider ${providerId}`);
65	    } catch (error) {
66	      this.logger.error(`Failed to sync provider ${providerId}:`, error);
67	      await this.calendarProviderRepository.update(provider.id, {
68	        syncStatus: SyncStatus.ERROR,
69	        syncError: error.message,
70	      });
71	      throw error;
72	    }
73	  }
74	
75	  /**
76	   * Sync all active calendar providers
77	   */
78	  async syncAllProviders(): Promise<void> {
79	    const providers = await this.calendarProviderRepository.find({
80	      where: { isActive: true, isDeleted: false },
81	    });
82	
83	    this.logger.log(`Starting sync for ${providers.length} providers`);
84	
85	    for (const provider of providers) {
86	      try {
87	        await this.syncProvider(provider.id);
88	      } catch (error) {
89	        // Continue with next provider even if one fails
90	        this.logger.error(`Failed to sync provider ${provider.id}`, error);
91	      }
92	    }
93	
94	    this.logger.log('Completed sync for all providers');
95	  }
96	
97	  /**
98	   * Sync Google Calendar events
99	   */
100	  private async syncGoogleCalendar(provider: CalendarProvider): Promise<void> {
101	    // Check if token is expired and refresh if needed
102	    if (this.isTokenExpired(provider.tokenExpiresAt)) {
103	      await this.refreshGoogleToken(provider);
104	      // Reload provider with new token
105	      const updatedProvider = await this.calendarProviderRepository.findOne({
106	        where: { id: provider.id },
107	      });
108	      provider = updatedProvider;
109	    }
110	
111	    const oauth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
112	      this.configService.get('GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID'),
113	      this.configService.get('GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET'),
114	    );
115	
116	    oauth2Client.setCredentials({
117	      access_token: provider.accessToken,
118	      refresh_token: provider.refreshToken,
119	    });
120	
121	    const calendar = google.calendar({ version: 'v3', auth: oauth2Client });
122	
123	    // Prepare sync parameters
124	    const syncParams: any = {
125	      calendarId: provider.providerAccountId,
126	      maxResults: 250,
127	      singleEvents: true,
128	      orderBy: 'startTime',
129	      timeMin: new Date().toISOString(), // Only future events
130	    };
131	
132	    // Use sync token for incremental sync if available
133	    if (provider.syncToken) {
134	      syncParams.syncToken = provider.syncToken;
135	      delete syncParams.timeMin; // Can't use timeMin with syncToken
136	    }
137	
138	    const isFullSync = !provider.syncToken;
139	
140	    try {
141	      const response = await calendar.events.list(syncParams);
142	      const events = response.data.items || [];
143	      const syncedExternalIds = new Set<string>();
144	
145	      // Process events
146	      for (const event of events) {
147	        if (event.id) {
148	          syncedExternalIds.add(event.id);
149	        }
150	        await this.processGoogleEvent(provider, event);
151	      }
152	
153	      // Full sync only returns current events — remove local future events missing from Google
154	      if (isFullSync) {
155	        await this.removeStaleLocalEvents(provider, syncedExternalIds);
156	      }
157	
158	      // Save new sync token for next incremental sync
159	      if (response.data.nextSyncToken) {
160	        await this.calendarProviderRepository.update(provider.id, {
161	          syncToken: response.data.nextSyncToken,
162	        });
163	      }
164	
165	      this.logger.log(
166	        `Synced ${events.length} events for Google provider ${provider.id}`,
167	      );
168	    } catch (error) {
169	      // If sync token is invalid, do a full sync
170	      if (error.code === 410 || error.message?.includes('Sync token')) {
171	        this.logger.warn(
172	          `Sync token invalid for provider ${provider.id}, performing full sync`,
173	        );
174	        await this.calendarProviderRepository.update(provider.id, {
175	          syncToken: null,
176	        });
177	        // Retry without sync token
178	        return this.syncGoogleCalendar(provider);
179	      }
180	      throw error;
181	    }
182	  }
183	
184	  /**
185	   * Sync Microsoft Calendar events
186	   */
187	  private async syncMicrosoftCalendar(
188	    provider: CalendarProvider,
189	  ): Promise<void> {
190	    // Check if token is expired and refresh if needed
191	    if (this.isTokenExpired(provider.tokenExpiresAt)) {
192	      await this.refreshMicrosoftToken(provider);
193	      // Reload provider with new token
194	      const updatedProvider = await this.calendarProviderRepository.findOne({
195	        where: { id: provider.id },
196	      });
197	      provider = updatedProvider;
198	    }
199	
200	    const client = Client.init({
201	      authProvider: (done) => {
202	        done(null, provider.accessToken);
203	      },
204	    });
205	
206	    try {
207	      // Fetch events from Microsoft Graph
208	      const response = await client
209	        .api(`/me/calendars/${provider.providerAccountId}/events`)
210	        .select(
211	          'id,subject,bodyPreview,start,end,location,attendees,isAllDay,isCancelled,recurrence,lastModifiedDateTime',
212	        )
213	        .filter(`start/dateTime ge '${new Date().toISOString()}'`) // Only future events
214	        .top(250)
215	        .orderby('start/dateTime')
216	        .get();
217	
218	      const events = response.value || [];
219	      const syncedExternalIds = new Set<string>();
220	
221	      // Process events
222	      for (const event of events) {
223	        if (event.id) {
224	          syncedExternalIds.add(event.id);
225	        }
226	        await this.processMicrosoftEvent(provider, event);
227	      }
228	
229	      // Microsoft sync is always a full future-events fetch — reconcile deletions
230	      await this.removeStaleLocalEvents(provider, syncedExternalIds);
231	
232	      this.logger.log(
233	        `Synced ${events.length} events for Microsoft provider ${provider.id}`,
234	      );
235	    } catch (error) {
236	      this.logger.error(
237	        `Failed to sync Microsoft calendar for provider ${provider.id}`,
238	        error,
239	      );
240	      throw error;
241	    }
242	  }
243	
244	  /**
245	   * Process a Google Calendar event
246	   */
247	  private async processGoogleEvent(
248	    provider: CalendarProvider,
249	    event: any,
250	  ): Promise<void> {
251	    const existingEvent = await this.calendarEventRepository.findOne({
252	      where: {
253	        calendarProviderId: provider.id,
254	        externalEventId: event.id,
255	      },
256	    });
257	
258	    // Deleted in Google Calendar — soft-delete locally (incremental sync path)
259	    if (event.status === 'cancelled') {
260	      if (existingEvent && !existingEvent.isDeleted) {
261	        await this.calendarEventRepository.update(existingEvent.id, {
262	          isDeleted: true,
263	          status: EventStatus.CANCELLED,
264	          externalUpdatedAt: event.updated,
265	          rawData: event,
266	        });
267	        this.logger.debug(`Soft-deleted cancelled Google event ${event.id}`);
268	      }
269	      return;
270	    }
271	
272	    // Skip events without start time
273	    if (!event.start?.dateTime && !event.start?.date) {
274	      return;
275	    }
276	
277	    // Color fallback: use event color if available, otherwise use calendar color
278	    const eventColor = event.colorId ? this.mapGoogleColorIdToHex(event.colorId) : (provider.calendarColor || null);
279	
280	    const eventData = {
281	      calendarProviderId: provider.id,
282	      externalEventId: event.id,
283	      title: event.summary || 'Untitled Event',
284	      description: event.description || null,
285	      startTime: new Date(event.start.dateTime || event.start.date),
286	      endTime: new Date(event.end.dateTime || event.end.date),
287	      location: event.location || null,
288	      attendees: event.attendees || null,
289	      isAllDay: !!event.start.date, // All-day events use 'date' instead of 'dateTime'
290	      recurrenceRule: event.recurrence?.join(', ') || null,
291	      status: this.mapGoogleEventStatus(event.status),
292	      eventColor: eventColor,
293	      rawData: event,
294	      externalUpdatedAt: event.updated,
295	    };
296	
297	    if (existingEvent) {
298	      // Update existing event if it has changed
299	      if (existingEvent.externalUpdatedAt !== event.updated) {
300	        await this.calendarEventRepository.update(existingEvent.id, eventData);
301	        this.logger.debug(`Updated event ${event.id}`);
302	      }
303	    } else {
304	      // Create new event
305	      const newEvent = this.calendarEventRepository.create(eventData);
306	      await this.calendarEventRepository.save(newEvent);
307	      this.logger.debug(`Created event ${event.id}`);
308	    }
309	  }
310	
311	  /**
312	   * Process a Microsoft Calendar event
313	   */
314	  private async processMicrosoftEvent(
315	    provider: CalendarProvider,
316	    event: any,
317	  ): Promise<void> {
318	    const existingEvent = await this.calendarEventRepository.findOne({
319	      where: {
320	        calendarProviderId: provider.id,
321	        externalEventId: event.id,
322	      },
323	    });
324	
325	    // Deleted/cancelled in Microsoft Calendar — soft-delete locally
326	    if (event.isCancelled) {
327	      if (existingEvent && !existingEvent.isDeleted) {
328	        await this.calendarEventRepository.update(existingEvent.id, {
329	          isDeleted: true,
330	          status: EventStatus.CANCELLED,
331	          externalUpdatedAt: event.lastModifiedDateTime,
332	          rawData: event,
333	        });
334	        this.logger.debug(`Soft-deleted cancelled Microsoft event ${event.id}`);
335	      }
336	      return;
337	    }
338	
339	    // Color fallback: use event color if available, otherwise use calendar color
340	    const eventColor = event.color || provider.calendarColor || null;
341	
342	    const eventData = {
343	      calendarProviderId: provider.id,
344	      externalEventId: event.id,
345	      title: event.subject || 'Untitled Event',
346	      description: event.bodyPreview || null,
347	      startTime: new Date(event.start.dateTime),
348	      endTime: new Date(event.end.dateTime),
349	      location: event.location?.displayName || null,
350	      attendees: event.attendees || null,
351	      isAllDay: event.isAllDay || false,
352	      recurrenceRule: event.recurrence ? JSON.stringify(event.recurrence) : null,
353	      status: event.isCancelled ? EventStatus.CANCELLED : EventStatus.CONFIRMED,
354	      eventColor: eventColor,
355	      rawData: event,
356	      externalUpdatedAt: event.lastModifiedDateTime,
357	    };
358	
359	    if (existingEvent) {
360	      // Update existing event if it has changed
361	      if (existingEvent.externalUpdatedAt !== event.lastModifiedDateTime) {
362	        await this.calendarEventRepository.update(existingEvent.id, eventData);
363	        this.logger.debug(`Updated event ${event.id}`);
364	      }
365	    } else {
366	      // Create new event
367	      const newEvent = this.calendarEventRepository.create(eventData);
368	      await this.calendarEventRepository.save(newEvent);
369	      this.logger.debug(`Created event ${event.id}`);
370	    }
371	  }
372	
373	  /**
374	   * Refresh Google OAuth token
375	   */
376	  private async refreshGoogleToken(provider: CalendarProvider): Promise<void> {
377	    this.logger.log(`Refreshing Google token for provider ${provider.id}`);
378	
379	    const oauth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
380	      this.configService.get('GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID'),
381	      this.configService.get('GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET'),
382	    );
383	
384	    oauth2Client.setCredentials({
385	      refresh_token: provider.refreshToken,
386	    });
387	
388	    try {
389	      const { credentials } = await oauth2Client.refreshAccessToken();
390	
391	      await this.calendarProviderRepository.update(provider.id, {
392	        accessToken: credentials.access_token,
393	        tokenExpiresAt: new Date(credentials.expiry_date),
394	      });
395	
396	      this.logger.log(`Successfully refreshed Google token for provider ${provider.id}`);
397	    } catch (error) {
398	      this.logger.error(`Failed to refresh Google token for provider ${provider.id}`, error);
399	      throw error;
400	    }
401	  }
402	
403	  /**
404	   * Refresh Microsoft OAuth token
405	   */
406	  private async refreshMicrosoftToken(
407	    provider: CalendarProvider,
408	  ): Promise<void> {
409	    this.logger.log(`Refreshing Microsoft token for provider ${provider.id}`);
410	
411	    const msalClient = new ConfidentialClientApplication({
412	      auth: {
413	        clientId: this.configService.get('MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID'),
414	        authority: `https://login.microsoftonline.com/${this.configService.get('MICROSOFT_TENANT_ID')}`,
415	        clientSecret: this.configService.get('MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET'),
416	      },
417	    });
418	
419	    try {
420	      // Microsoft uses the account ID stored in refreshToken field
421	      const silentRequest = {
422	        scopes: ['https://graph.microsoft.com/Calendars.Read'],
423	        account: { homeAccountId: provider.refreshToken } as any,
424	      };
425	
426	      const response = await msalClient.acquireTokenSilent(silentRequest);
427	
428	      await this.calendarProviderRepository.update(provider.id, {
429	        accessToken: response.accessToken,
430	        tokenExpiresAt: response.expiresOn,
431	      });
432	
433	      this.logger.log(`Successfully refreshed Microsoft token for provider ${provider.id}`);
434	    } catch (error) {
435	      this.logger.error(`Failed to refresh Microsoft token for provider ${provider.id}`, error);
436	      throw error;
437	    }
438	  }
439	
440	  /**
441	   * Check if token is expired
442	   */
443	  private isTokenExpired(expiresAt: Date): boolean {
444	    if (!expiresAt) return false;
445	    // Consider token expired 5 minutes before actual expiry
446	    const bufferTime = 5 * 60 * 1000; // 5 minutes in milliseconds
447	    return new Date().getTime() > new Date(expiresAt).getTime() - bufferTime;
448	  }
449	
450	  /**
451	   * Update sync status for a provider
452	   */
453	  private async updateSyncStatus(
454	    providerId: string,
455	    status: SyncStatus,
456	  ): Promise<void> {
457	    await this.calendarProviderRepository.update(providerId, {
458	      syncStatus: status,
459	    });
460	  }
461	
462	  /**
463	   * Soft-delete local future events that no longer exist on the remote calendar.
464	   * Used after full sync when the API returns the current event set only.
465	   */
466	  private async removeStaleLocalEvents(
467	    provider: CalendarProvider,
468	    syncedExternalIds: Set<string>,
469	  ): Promise<void> {
470	    const now = new Date();
471	    const localEvents = await this.calendarEventRepository.find({
472	      where: {
473	        calendarProviderId: provider.id,
474	        isDeleted: false,
475	        startTime: MoreThanOrEqual(now),
476	      },
477	    });
478	
479	    for (const localEvent of localEvents) {
480	      if (!syncedExternalIds.has(localEvent.externalEventId)) {
481	        await this.calendarEventRepository.update(localEvent.id, {
482	          isDeleted: true,
483	        });
484	        this.logger.debug(
485	          `Soft-deleted stale event ${localEvent.externalEventId} for provider ${provider.id}`,
486	        );
487	      }
488	    }
489	  }
490	
491	  /**
492	   * Map Google event status to our EventStatus enum
493	   */
494	  private mapGoogleEventStatus(status: string): EventStatus {
495	    switch (status) {
496	      case 'confirmed':
497	        return EventStatus.CONFIRMED;
498	      case 'tentative':
499	        return EventStatus.TENTATIVE;
500	      case 'cancelled':
501	        return EventStatus.CANCELLED;
502	      default:
503	        return EventStatus.CONFIRMED;
504	    }
505	  }
506	
507	  /**
508	   * Map Google Calendar color ID to hex color
509	   * Based on Google Calendar's standard color palette
510	   */
511	  private mapGoogleColorIdToHex(colorId: string): string | null {
512	    const colorMap: Record<string, string> = {
513	      '1': '#7986CB', // Lavender
514	      '2': '#33B679', // Sage
515	      '3': '#8E24AA', // Grape
516	      '4': '#E67C73', // Flamingo
517	      '5': '#F6BF26', // Banana
518	      '6': '#F4511E', // Tangerine
519	      '7': '#039BE5', // Peacock
520	      '8': '#616161', // Graphite
521	      '9': '#3F51B5', // Blueberry
522	      '10': '#0B8043', // Basil
523	      '11': '#D50000', // Tomato
524	    };
525	
526	    return colorMap[colorId] || null;
527	  }
528	}
529
```
</details></tool-use>

1	import {
2	  Entity,
3	  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
4	  Column,
5	  CreateDateColumn,
6	  UpdateDateColumn,
7	  OneToMany,
8	} from 'typeorm';
9	import { CalendarEvent } from '../../calendar-events/entities/calendar-event.entity';
10	
11	export enum CalendarProviderType {
12	  GOOGLE = 'google',
13	  MICROSOFT = 'microsoft',
14	}
15	
16	export enum SyncStatus {
17	  ACTIVE = 'active',
18	  SYNCING = 'syncing',
19	  ERROR = 'error',
20	  INACTIVE = 'inactive',
21	}
22	
23	@Entity('calendar_providers')
24	export class CalendarProvider {
25	  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn('uuid')
26	  id: string;
27	
28	  @Column({
29	    type: 'enum',
30	    enum: CalendarProviderType,
31	  })
32	  providerType: CalendarProviderType;
33	
34	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 255 })
35	  providerAccountId: string;
36	
37	  @Column({ type: 'text' })
38	  accessToken: string;
39	
40	  @Column({ type: 'text', nullable: true })
41	  refreshToken: string;
42	
43	  @Column({ type: 'timestamp', nullable: true })
44	  tokenExpiresAt: Date;
45	
46	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 255 })
47	  calendarName: string;
48	
49	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false })
50	  isPrimary: boolean; // Mark primary calendar for each provider type
51	
52	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 100, nullable: true })
53	  calendarColor: string; // Calendar color for UI
54	
55	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: true })
56	  isActive: boolean;
57	
58	  @Column({ type: 'timestamp', nullable: true })
59	  lastSyncedAt: Date;
60	
61	  @Column({
62	    type: 'enum',
63	    enum: SyncStatus,
64	    default: SyncStatus.ACTIVE,
65	  })
66	  syncStatus: SyncStatus;
67	
68	  @Column({ type: 'text', nullable: true })
69	  syncError: string;
70	
71	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 500, nullable: true })
72	  syncToken: string; // For incremental sync
73	
74	  @OneToMany(() => CalendarEvent, (event) => event.calendarProvider)
75	  events: CalendarEvent[];
76	
77	  @CreateDateColumn()
78	  createdAt: Date;
79	
80	  @UpdateDateColumn()
81	  updatedAt: Date;
82	
83	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false })
84	  isDeleted: boolean;
85	}

 `./api/src/modules/email/email.service.ts`

```text
1	import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3	import { In, Repository } from 'typeorm';
4	import { promises as fs } from 'node:fs';
5	import * as path from 'node:path';
6	
7	import {
8	  PotentialClient,
9	  PotentialClientState,
10	  Task,
11	  TaskType,
12	  TaskState,
13	  TaskRefType,
14	  ConnectionState,
15	  ConnectionKind,
16	  ConnectionStatus,
17	  AuditActor,
18	  AgreementEvidence,
19	} from '../../entities';
20	import { LlmService } from '../llm/llm.service';
21	import { AuditService } from '../audit/audit.service';
22	import { loadConfig } from '../../config/env';
23	import { EmailPollResultDto, DetectedAgreementDto } from './dto/email-poll.dto';
24	
25	// A normalised inbound message — the same shape whether it came from live IMAP
26	// or the fixture mailbox, so the classify path never branches on source.
27	interface InboundMessage {
28	  from: string;
29	  subject: string;
30	  body: string;
31	  date: string | null; // ISO if known
32	  messageId: string;
33	}
34	
35	const POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 30 * 60 * 1000; // 30 minutes
36	
37	// Loop 2 DETECT. Reads NEW messages FROM queued potential-client addresses ONLY
38	// (IMAP when configured, else the seeded fixture mailbox), classifies each for
39	// agreement via the LLM edge, and on agreement flips the PotentialClient to
40	// AGREEMENT_DETECTED + raises a CONFIRM_AGREEMENT task. It never promotes a
41	// client and never reads a non-queued sender — that scope widening is a bug.
42	@Injectable()
43	export class EmailService {
44	  private readonly log = new Logger('EmailService');
45	
46	  constructor(
47	    @InjectRepository(PotentialClient)
48	    private readonly pcRepo: Repository<PotentialClient>,
49	    @InjectRepository(Task)
50	    private readonly taskRepo: Repository<Task>,
51	    @InjectRepository(ConnectionState)
52	    private readonly connRepo: Repository<ConnectionState>,
53	    private readonly llm: LlmService,
54	    private readonly audit: AuditService,
55	  ) {}
56	
57	  // --- Public entry: run one poll cycle ------------------------------------
58	  async poll(): Promise<EmailPollResultDto> {
59	    const cfg = loadConfig();
60	    const now = new Date();
61	    const nextPollAt = new Date(now.getTime() + POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
62	
63	    const queued = await this.pcRepo.find({
64	      where: {
65	        state: In([PotentialClientState.QUEUED, PotentialClientState.WATCHING]),
66	      },
67	    });
68	
69	    let mode: ConnectionStatus = cfg.imap.configured
70	      ? ConnectionStatus.LIVE
71	      : ConnectionStatus.FALLBACK;
72	    let messagesRead = 0;
73	    let agreementsDetected = 0;
74	    let tasksRaised = 0;
75	    const detected: DetectedAgreementDto[] = [];
76	
77	    // In fallback we read every fixture file once, then filter per potential
78	    // client to the queued senders. This never touches a non-queued address.
79	    let fixtureMessages: InboundMessage[] | null = null;
80	    if (!cfg.imap.configured) {
81	      fixtureMessages = await this.readFixtureMailbox();
82	    }
83	
84	    for (const pc of queued) {
85	      const addrs = (pc.emails ?? [])
86	        .map((e) => this.normaliseAddress(e))
87	        .filter((e) => e.length > 0);
88	      if (addrs.length === 0) {
89	        pc.lastPolledAt = now;
90	        await this.pcRepo.save(pc);
91	        continue;
92	      }
93	
94	      let msgs: InboundMessage[] = [];
95	      if (cfg.imap.configured) {
96	        try {
97	          msgs = await this.readImapForSenders(cfg, addrs, pc.lastPolledAt);
98	        } catch (err) {
99	          // IMAP was configured but unreachable — keep local state, surface the
100	          // reason on the connection row, do NOT crash the poll.
101	          mode = ConnectionStatus.DOWN;
102	          const reason = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
103	          this.log.warn(`IMAP read failed for potential-client ${pc.id}: ${reason}`);
104	          await this.audit.record({
105	            actor: AuditActor.SYSTEM,
106	            action: 'email.imap_error',
107	            summary: `IMAP read failed while polling ${pc.displayName}: ${reason.slice(0, 200)}`,
108	            subjectType: 'potential_client',
109	            subjectId: pc.id,
110	          });
111	          msgs = [];
112	        }
113	      } else {
114	        msgs = (fixtureMessages ?? [])
115	          .filter((m) => addrs.includes(this.normaliseAddress(m.from)))
116	          .filter((m) => this.isNewMessage(m, pc.lastPolledAt));
117	      }
118	
119	      messagesRead += msgs.length;
120	
121	      for (const m of msgs) {
122	        let cls;
123	        try {
124	          cls = await this.llm.classifyAgreement(m.from, m.subject, m.body);
125	        } catch (err) {
126	          const reason = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
127	          this.log.warn(`Agreement classification failed for ${pc.id}: ${reason}`);
128	          await this.audit.record({
129	            actor: AuditActor.LLM,
130	            action: 'email.classify_error',
131	            summary: `Agreement classification failed for ${pc.displayName}: ${reason.slice(0, 200)}`,
132	            subjectType: 'potential_client',
133	            subjectId: pc.id,
134	            inputs: { from: m.from, subject: m.subject },
135	          });
136	          continue; // never guess — skip this message
137	        }
138	
139	        if (!cls.agreement) {
140	          await this.audit.record({
141	            actor: AuditActor.LLM,
142	            action: 'email.classified_no_agreement',
143	            summary: `No agreement in message from ${pc.displayName} ("${m.subject}").`,
144	            subjectType: 'potential_client',
145	            subjectId: pc.id,
146	            inputs: { from: m.from, subject: m.subject, reasoning: cls.reasoning },
147	          });
148	          continue;
149	        }
150	
151	        // Agreement detected — the money-adjacent transition. Record evidence,
152	        // flip state, raise the confirm task (idempotent), audit both edges.
153	        const quote =
154	          cls.evidence_quote && cls.evidence_quote.trim().length > 0
155	            ? cls.evidence_quote.trim()
156	            : m.subject || 'Agreement indicated in email';
157	        const evidence: AgreementEvidence = {
158	          email_msg_id: m.messageId,
159	          quote,
160	          from: m.from,
161	          subject: m.subject,
162	          received_at: m.date ?? now.toISOString(),
163	        };
164	
165	        pc.state = PotentialClientState.AGREEMENT_DETECTED;
166	        pc.evidence = evidence;
167	        await this.pcRepo.save(pc);
168	        agreementsDetected += 1;
169	
170	        await this.audit.record({
171	          actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
172	          action: 'email.agreement_detected',
173	          summary: `Agreement detected from ${pc.displayName}: "${quote}"`,
174	          subjectType: 'potential_client',
175	          subjectId: pc.id,
176	          inputs: {
177	            from: m.from,
178	            subject: m.subject,
179	            quote,
180	            reasoning: cls.reasoning,
181	            mode,
182	          },
183	        });
184	
185	        const taskId = await this.raiseConfirmAgreementTask(pc, evidence);
186	        if (taskId) tasksRaised += 1;
187	
188	        detected.push({
189	          potentialClientId: pc.id,
190	          displayName: pc.displayName,
191	          from: m.from,
192	          subject: m.subject,
193	          quote,
194	          taskId: taskId ?? undefined,
195	        });
196	
197	        break; // one agreement per potential client is enough
198	      }
199	
200	      pc.lastPolledAt = now;
201	      await this.pcRepo.save(pc);
202	    }
203	
204	    const detail = this.connectionDetail(cfg, mode);
205	    await this.upsertEmailConnection(mode, cfg, detail, now, nextPollAt);
206	
207	    await this.audit.record({
208	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
209	      action: 'email.poll',
210	      summary:
211	        `Email poll (${mode}): ${queued.length} queued, ${messagesRead} message(s) read, ` +
212	        `${agreementsDetected} agreement(s), ${tasksRaised} task(s) raised.`,
213	      subjectType: 'connection_state',
214	      inputs: {
215	        mode,
216	        polledCount: queued.length,
217	        messagesRead,
218	        agreementsDetected,
219	        tasksRaised,
220	      },
221	    });
222	
223	    return {
224	      mode,
225	      detail,
226	      polledCount: queued.length,
227	      messagesRead,
228	      agreementsDetected,
229	      tasksRaised,
230	      detected,
231	      polledAt: now.toISOString(),
232	      nextPollAt: nextPollAt.toISOString(),
233	    };
234	  }
235	
236	  // --- Task raise (idempotent by dedupeKey) --------------------------------
237	  private async raiseConfirmAgreementTask(
238	    pc: PotentialClient,
239	    evidence: AgreementEvidence,
240	  ): Promise<string | null> {
241	    const dedupeKey = `${TaskType.CONFIRM_AGREEMENT}:${pc.id}`;
242	    const existing = await this.taskRepo.findOne({
243	      where: { dedupeKey, state: TaskState.OPEN },
244	    });
245	    if (existing) return null;
246	
247	    const task = this.taskRepo.create({
248	      type: TaskType.CONFIRM_AGREEMENT,
249	      refType: TaskRefType.POTENTIAL_CLIENT,
250	      refId: pc.id,
251	      state: TaskState.OPEN,
252	      title: `Confirm new client: ${pc.displayName}`,
253	      summary: `${pc.displayName} agreed to proceed: "${evidence.quote}"`,
254	      context: {
255	        potentialClientId: pc.id,
256	        displayName: pc.displayName,
257	        quote: evidence.quote,
258	        from: evidence.from,
259	        subject: evidence.subject,
260	        emailMsgId: evidence.email_msg_id,
261	        receivedAt: evidence.received_at,
262	        actionEndpoint: `/api/potential-clients/${pc.id}/confirm`,
263	        dismissEndpoint: `/api/potential-clients/${pc.id}/dismiss`,
264	      },
265	      dedupeKey,
266	    });
267	    const saved = await this.taskRepo.save(task);
268	
269	    await this.audit.record({
270	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
271	      action: 'task.raised',
272	      summary: `Raised CONFIRM_AGREEMENT task for ${pc.displayName}.`,
273	      subjectType: 'task',
274	      subjectId: saved.id,
275	      inputs: { type: TaskType.CONFIRM_AGREEMENT, potentialClientId: pc.id },
276	    });
277	    return saved.id;
278	  }
279	
280	  // --- ConnectionState upsert (one EMAIL row) ------------------------------
281	  private async upsertEmailConnection(
282	    status: ConnectionStatus,
283	    cfg: ReturnType<typeof loadConfig>,
284	    detail: string,
285	    lastSyncAt: Date,
286	    nextPollAt: Date,
287	  ): Promise<void> {
288	    let row = await this.connRepo.findOne({ where: { kind: ConnectionKind.EMAIL } });
289	    if (!row) {
290	      row = this.connRepo.create({ kind: ConnectionKind.EMAIL });
291	    }
292	    row.status = status;
293	    row.label = cfg.imap.configured ? cfg.imap.user : 'fixture mailbox';
294	    row.detail = detail;
295	    row.lastSyncAt = lastSyncAt;
296	    row.nextPollAt = nextPollAt;
297	    await this.connRepo.save(row);
298	  }
299	
300	  private connectionDetail(
301	    cfg: ReturnType<typeof loadConfig>,
302	    status: ConnectionStatus,
303	  ): string {
304	    if (status === ConnectionStatus.LIVE) {
305	      return `Connected to IMAP mailbox ${cfg.imap.user}. Reads only queued client senders.`;
306	    }
307	    if (status === ConnectionStatus.DOWN) {
308	      return `IMAP configured for ${cfg.imap.user} but unreachable this poll. Local state kept; no messages read.`;
309	    }
310	    return 'No IMAP credentials — reading the seeded fixture mailbox (seed/data/mailbox). Reads only queued client senders.';
311	  }
312	
313	  // --- Fixture mailbox reader ----------------------------------------------
314	  // Each *.json file is either a single message object or an array of them.
315	  // Field names are read defensively so a hand-written fixture still loads.
316	  private async readFixtureMailbox(): Promise<InboundMessage[]> {
317	    const dir = await this.resolveFixtureDir();
318	    if (!dir) {
319	      this.log.warn('Fixture mailbox directory not found — treating as empty.');
320	      return [];
321	    }
322	    let files: string[];
323	    try {
324	      files = (await fs.readdir(dir)).filter((f) => f.toLowerCase().endsWith('.json'));
325	    } catch {
326	      return [];
327	    }
328	
329	    const out: InboundMessage[] = [];
330	    for (const f of files) {
331	      const full = path.join(dir, f);
332	      try {
333	        const raw = await fs.readFile(full, 'utf8');
334	        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
335	        const records = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [parsed];
336	        for (const rec of records) {
337	          const msg = this.normaliseRecord(rec, f);
338	          if (msg) out.push(msg);
339	        }
340	      } catch (err) {
341	        this.log.warn(`Skipping unreadable fixture ${f}: ${String(err).slice(0, 160)}`);
342	      }
343	    }
344	    return out;
345	  }
346	
347	  private async resolveFixtureDir(): Promise<string | null> {
348	    const candidates = [
349	      path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'seed/data/mailbox'),
350	      path.resolve(process.cwd(), '../seed/data/mailbox'),
351	      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../seed/data/mailbox'),
352	      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../../seed/data/mailbox'),
353	    ];
354	    for (const c of candidates) {
355	      try {
356	        const st = await fs.stat(c);
357	        if (st.isDirectory()) return c;
358	      } catch {
359	        // try next
360	      }
361	    }
362	    return null;
363	  }
364	
365	  private normaliseRecord(rec: unknown, file: string): InboundMessage | null {
366	    if (!rec || typeof rec !== 'object') return null;
367	    const r = rec as Record<string, unknown>;
368	    const str = (...keys: string[]): string => {
369	      for (const k of keys) {
370	        const v = r[k];
371	        if (typeof v === 'string' && v.trim().length > 0) return v;
372	      }
373	      return '';
374	    };
375	    const from = str('from', 'From', 'sender');
376	    if (!from) return null;
377	    const dateRaw = str('date', 'received_at', 'receivedAt', 'Date');
378	    return {
379	      from,
380	      subject: str('subject', 'Subject'),
381	      body: str('body', 'text', 'Body', 'html'),
382	      date: dateRaw ? this.toIso(dateRaw) : null,
383	      messageId: str('messageId', 'message_id', 'id', 'Message-ID') || `${file}:${from}`,
384	    };
385	  }
386	
387	  // --- IMAP reader (queued senders ONLY) -----------------------------------
388	  // Live path: one search per queued address, SINCE lastPolledAt. The search is
389	  // scoped to a specific sender so a non-queued address is never fetched.
390	  private async readImapForSenders(
391	    cfg: ReturnType<typeof loadConfig>,
392	    addrs: string[],
393	    since: Date | null,
394	  ): Promise<InboundMessage[]> {
395	    // Lazy imports so the OpenAPI export / non-IMAP boot never loads them.
396	    const { ImapFlow } = await import('imapflow');
397	    const { simpleParser } = await import('mailparser');
398	
399	    const client = new ImapFlow({
400	      host: cfg.imap.host,
401	      port: cfg.imap.port,
402	      secure: true,
403	      auth: { user: cfg.imap.user, pass: cfg.imap.password },
404	      logger: false,
405	    });
406	
407	    const out: InboundMessage[] = [];
408	    await client.connect();
409	    try {
410	      const lock = await client.getMailboxLock('INBOX');
411	      try {
412	        for (const addr of addrs) {
413	          const query: { from: string; since?: Date } = { from: addr };
414	          if (since) query.since = since;
415	          const uids = await client.search(query, { uid: true });
416	          if (!uids || uids.length === 0) continue;
417	          for await (const msg of client.fetch(
418	            uids,
419	            { envelope: true, source: true },
420	            { uid: true },
421	          )) {
422	            let subject = msg.envelope?.subject ?? '';
423	            let body = '';
424	            let messageId = msg.envelope?.messageId ?? '';
425	            let date: string | null = msg.envelope?.date
426	              ? msg.envelope.date.toISOString()
427	              : null;
428	            if (msg.source) {
429	              const parsed = await simpleParser(msg.source);
430	              if (parsed.subject) subject = parsed.subject;
431	              body = parsed.text ?? '';
432	              if (parsed.messageId) messageId = parsed.messageId;
433	              if (parsed.date) date = parsed.date.toISOString();
434	            }
435	            if (!messageId) messageId = `${addr}:${msg.uid}`;
436	            out.push({ from: addr, subject, body, date, messageId });
437	          }
438	        }
439	      } finally {
440	        lock.release();
441	      }
442	    } finally {
443	      await client.logout().catch(() => undefined);
444	    }
445	    return out;
446	  }
447	
448	  // --- helpers --------------------------------------------------------------
449	  private normaliseAddress(raw: string): string {
450	    if (!raw) return '';
451	    const angled = raw.match(/<([^>]+)>/);
452	    const addr = angled ? angled[1] : raw;
453	    return addr.trim().toLowerCase();
454	  }
455	
456	  private isNewMessage(m: InboundMessage, lastPolledAt: Date | null): boolean {
457	    if (!lastPolledAt) return true;
458	    if (!m.date) return true; // undateable fixture — treat as new
459	    const t = Date.parse(m.date);
460	    if (Number.isNaN(t)) return true;
461	    return t > lastPolledAt.getTime();
462	  }
463	
464	  private toIso(raw: string): string {
465	    const t = Date.parse(raw);
466	    return Number.isNaN(t) ? raw : new Date(t).toISOString();
467	  }
468	}
469
```
</details></tool-use>

1	"use client";
2	
3	import { useState } from "react";
4	import { toast } from "sonner";
5	import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
6	import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
7	import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
8	import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
9	import {
10	  useGetAgentConfigQuery,
11	  useUpdateAgentConfigMutation,
12	  useLazyGetDefaultPromptTemplateQuery,
13	} from "@/managers/apiManager";
14	import { AgentConfig } from "@/interfaces/contentStudioInterface";
15	
16	const PLACEHOLDERS = [
17	  "{{persona}}",
18	  "{{format_guide}}",
19	  "{{platform_matrix}}",
20	  "{{workflow}}",
21	  "{{skills_block}}",
22	  "{{custom_instructions}}",
23	  "{{extra_context}}",
24	  "{{count}}",
25	  "{{platforms}}",
26	];
27	
28	function Editor({ config }: { config: AgentConfig }) {
29	  const [persona, setPersona] = useState(config.persona ?? "");
30	  const [customInstructions, setCustomInstructions] = useState(config.customInstructions ?? "");
31	  const [overrideEnabled, setOverrideEnabled] = useState(
32	    !!config.promptTemplateOverride?.trim(),
33	  );
34	  const [overrideText, setOverrideText] = useState(config.promptTemplateOverride ?? "");
35	
36	  const [update, { isLoading: saving }] = useUpdateAgentConfigMutation();
37	  const [loadDefault, { isFetching: loadingDefault }] = useLazyGetDefaultPromptTemplateQuery();
38	
39	  const save = async () => {
40	    if (!persona.trim()) {
41	      toast.error("Persona can't be empty");
42	      return;
43	    }
44	    try {
45	      await update({
46	        persona,
47	        customInstructions,
48	        // Empty string clears the override → back to the structured prompt.
49	        promptTemplateOverride: overrideEnabled ? overrideText : "",
50	      }).unwrap();
51	      toast.success("System prompt saved");
52	    } catch (e: any) {
53	      toast.error(e?.data?.message ?? "Failed to save");
54	    }
55	  };
56	
57	  const fillDefaultTemplate = async () => {
58	    try {
59	      const res = await loadDefault().unwrap();
60	      setOverrideText(res.template);
61	    } catch {
62	      toast.error("Could not load the default template");
63	    }
64	  };
65	
66	  return (
67	    <div className="space-y-6">
68	      <div>
69	        <Label htmlFor="persona">Persona / voice</Label>
70	        <Textarea
71	          id="persona"
72	          value={persona}
73	          onChange={(e) => setPersona(e.target.value)}
74	          rows={6}
75	          className="mt-1 text-sm"
76	          placeholder="Who the agent writes as, and in what voice."
77	        />
78	        <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
79	          Injected at the top of the system prompt.
80	        </p>
81	      </div>
82	
83	      <div>
84	        <Label htmlFor="custom-instructions">Custom instructions</Label>
85	        <Textarea
86	          id="custom-instructions"
87	          value={customInstructions}
88	          onChange={(e) => setCustomInstructions(e.target.value)}
89	          rows={5}
90	          className="mt-1 text-sm"
91	          placeholder="Extra rules the agent should always follow (e.g. 'Always link the repo. No emojis on LinkedIn.')"
92	        />
93	        <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
94	          Appended to the prompt. The format guide, platform rules, and tool-calling workflow are
95	          generated automatically.
96	        </p>
97	      </div>
98	
99	      <div className="rounded-lg border p-4">
100	        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
101	          <div>
102	            <Label htmlFor="override-toggle" className="font-medium">
103	              Advanced: full template override
104	            </Label>
105	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
106	              Replace the whole system prompt. You must keep the tool-calling workflow and
107	              placeholders intact, or generation may break.
108	            </p>
109	          </div>
110	          <Switch
111	            id="override-toggle"
112	            checked={overrideEnabled}
113	            onCheckedChange={setOverrideEnabled}
114	          />
115	        </div>
116	
117	        {overrideEnabled && (
118	          <div className="mt-4 space-y-2">
119	            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
120	              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
121	                Placeholders:{" "}
122	                {PLACEHOLDERS.map((p) => (
123	                  <code key={p} className="mr-1 rounded bg-muted px-1 text-[10px]">
124	                    {p}
125	                  </code>
126	                ))}
127	              </span>
128	              <Button
129	                variant="outline"
130	                size="sm"
131	                disabled={loadingDefault}
132	                onClick={fillDefaultTemplate}
133	              >
134	                {loadingDefault ? "Loading…" : "Load default template"}
135	              </Button>
136	            </div>
137	            <Textarea
138	              value={overrideText}
139	              onChange={(e) => setOverrideText(e.target.value)}
140	              rows={14}
141	              className="mt-1 font-mono text-xs"
142	              placeholder="Load the default template to start from the built-in structure, then edit."
143	            />
144	          </div>
145	        )}
146	      </div>
147	
148	      <div className="flex justify-end">
149	        <Button onClick={save} disabled={saving}>
150	          {saving ? "Saving…" : "Save system prompt"}
151	        </Button>
152	      </div>
153	    </div>
154	  );
155	}
156	
157	export function SystemPromptTab() {
158	  const { data: config, isLoading } = useGetAgentConfigQuery();
159	
160	  if (isLoading || !config) {
161	    return (
162	      <div className="flex h-40 items-center justify-center">
163	        <div className="h-6 w-6 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent" />
164	      </div>
165	    );
166	  }
167	  // key on id so the editor re-inits if the config row is replaced.
168	  return <Editor key={config.id} config={config} />;
169	}
170

```text
1	import { Calendar, CalendarEvent } from "@/interfaces/calendarInterface";
2	
3	export const HOUR_HEIGHT = 48;
4	export const HOURS_IN_DAY = 24;
5	
6	export function toDateKey(date: Date): string {
7	  const year = date.getFullYear();
8	  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
9	  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
10	  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
11	}
12	
13	export function getWeekStart(date: Date): Date {
14	  const start = new Date(date);
15	  start.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
16	  start.setDate(start.getDate() - start.getDay());
17	  return start;
18	}
19	
20	export function getWeekDays(date: Date): Date[] {
21	  const start = getWeekStart(date);
22	  return Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, index) => {
23	    const day = new Date(start);
24	    day.setDate(start.getDate() + index);
25	    return day;
26	  });
27	}
28	
29	export function getWeekDateRange(date: Date, bufferDays = 14) {
30	  const weekStart = getWeekStart(date);
31	  const weekEnd = new Date(weekStart);
32	  weekEnd.setDate(weekStart.getDate() + 6);
33	
34	  const start = new Date(weekStart);
35	  start.setDate(weekStart.getDate() - bufferDays);
36	
37	  const end = new Date(weekEnd);
38	  end.setDate(weekEnd.getDate() + bufferDays);
39	
40	  return {
41	    startDate: toDateKey(start),
42	    endDate: toDateKey(end),
43	  };
44	}
45	
46	export function isSameDay(a: Date, b: Date): boolean {
47	  return toDateKey(a) === toDateKey(b);
48	}
49	
50	export function isToday(date: Date): boolean {
51	  return isSameDay(date, new Date());
52	}
53	
54	export function getCalendarColor(
55	  calendars: Calendar[],
56	  providerId: string
57	): string {
58	  return calendars.find((c) => c.id === providerId)?.calendarColor || "#3b82f6";
59	}
60	
61	export function getEventColor(
62	  event: CalendarEvent,
63	  calendars: Calendar[]
64	): string {
65	  return event.eventColor || getCalendarColor(calendars, event.calendarProviderId);
66	}
67	
68	export function eventOverlapsDate(event: CalendarEvent, date: Date): boolean {
69	  const dateKey = toDateKey(date);
70	  const eventStartKey = toDateKey(new Date(event.startTime));
71	  const eventEndKey = toDateKey(new Date(event.endTime));
72	  return dateKey >= eventStartKey && dateKey <= eventEndKey;
73	}
74	
75	export function formatHourLabel(hour: number): string {
76	  if (hour === 0) return "12 AM";
77	  if (hour === 12) return "12 PM";
78	  if (hour < 12) return `${hour} AM`;
79	  return `${hour - 12} PM`;
80	}
81	
82	export function formatTimeShort(date: Date): string {
83	  const hours = date.getHours();
84	  const minutes = date.getMinutes();
85	  const period = hours >= 12 ? "pm" : "am";
86	  const displayHour = hours === 0 ? 12 : hours > 12 ? hours - 12 : hours;
87	  if (minutes === 0) {
88	    return `${displayHour}${period}`;
89	  }
90	  return `${displayHour}:${minutes.toString().padStart(2, "0")}${period}`;
91	}
92	
93	export function formatEventTimeRange(
94	  event: CalendarEvent,
95	  date: Date
96	): string {
97	  if (event.isAllDay) return "All day";
98	
99	  const dateKey = toDateKey(date);
100	  const eventStart = new Date(event.startTime);
101	  const eventEnd = new Date(event.endTime);
102	  const eventStartKey = toDateKey(eventStart);
103	  const eventEndKey = toDateKey(eventEnd);
104	
105	  if (dateKey === eventStartKey && dateKey === eventEndKey) {
106	    return `${formatTimeShort(eventStart)} – ${formatTimeShort(eventEnd)}`;
107	  }
108	  if (dateKey === eventStartKey) {
109	    return `${formatTimeShort(eventStart)} →`;
110	  }
111	  if (dateKey === eventEndKey) {
112	    return `→ ${formatTimeShort(eventEnd)}`;
113	  }
114	  return "All day";
115	}
116	
117	export function getWeekTitle(date: Date): string {
118	  const weekDays = getWeekDays(date);
119	  const start = weekDays[0];
120	  const end = weekDays[6];
121	  const monthNames = [
122	    "January",
123	    "February",
124	    "March",
125	    "April",
126	    "May",
127	    "June",
128	    "July",
129	    "August",
130	    "September",
131	    "October",
132	    "November",
133	    "December",
134	  ];
135	
136	  if (start.getMonth() === end.getMonth()) {
137	    return `${monthNames[start.getMonth()]} ${start.getDate()} – ${end.getDate()}, ${start.getFullYear()}`;
138	  }
139	
140	  return `${monthNames[start.getMonth()]} ${start.getDate()} – ${monthNames[end.getMonth()]} ${end.getDate()}, ${end.getFullYear()}`;
141	}
142	
143	export function hexToRgba(hex: string, alpha: number): string {
144	  const normalized = hex.replace("#", "");
145	  if (normalized.length !== 6) {
146	    return `rgba(59, 130, 246, ${alpha})`;
147	  }
148	
149	  const r = parseInt(normalized.slice(0, 2), 16);
150	  const g = parseInt(normalized.slice(2, 4), 16);
151	  const b = parseInt(normalized.slice(4, 6), 16);
152	  return `rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})`;
153	}
154

3	  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
4	  Column,
5	  CreateDateColumn,
6	  UpdateDateColumn,
7	  ManyToOne,
8	  JoinColumn,
9	} from 'typeorm';

11	
12	export enum EventStatus {
13	  CONFIRMED = 'confirmed',
14	  TENTATIVE = 'tentative',
15	  CANCELLED = 'cancelled',
16	}
17	
18	@Entity('calendar_events')
19	export class CalendarEvent {
20	  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn('uuid')
21	  id: string;
22	
23	  @ManyToOne(() => CalendarProvider, (provider) => provider.events, {
24	    onDelete: 'CASCADE',
25	  })
26	  @JoinColumn({ name: 'calendarProviderId' })
27	  calendarProvider: CalendarProvider;

29	  @Column({ type: 'uuid' })
30	  calendarProviderId: string;

33	  externalEventId: string;

71	
72	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false })
73	  createdLocally: boolean; // True if event was created in our app
74	
75	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false })
76	  needsSync: boolean; // True if local changes need to be synced to provider
77	
78	  /**
79	   * When true this event is treated as a bookable availability window for the
80	   * public booking flow (e.g. co-working days) instead of a busy block.
81	   * Preserved across calendar syncs because the sync upserts never write this
82	   * column, so a manual toggle survives re-sync.
83	   */
84	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false })
85	  openForBooking: boolean;
86	
87	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 100, nullable: true })
88	  eventColor: string; // Event color for UI
89	
90	  @CreateDateColumn()
91	  createdAt: Date;
92	
93	  @UpdateDateColumn()
94	  updatedAt: Date;
95	
96	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false })
97	  isDeleted: boolean;
98	}
99

1	import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { Cron, CronExpression } from '@nestjs/schedule';
3	import { CalendarSyncService } from './calendar-sync.service';
4	
5	@Injectable()
6	export class CalendarSyncScheduler {
7	  private readonly logger = new Logger(CalendarSyncScheduler.name);
8	
9	  constructor(private readonly calendarSyncService: CalendarSyncService) {}
10	
11	  /**
12	   * Sync all calendar providers every 15 minutes
13	   */
14	  @Cron('*/15 * * * *', {
15	    name: 'calendar-sync',
16	  })
17	  async handleCalendarSync(): Promise<void> {
18	    this.logger.log('Starting scheduled calendar sync');
19	
20	    try {
21	      await this.calendarSyncService.syncAllProviders();
22	      this.logger.log('Completed scheduled calendar sync');
23	    } catch (error) {
24	      this.logger.error('Failed to complete scheduled calendar sync', error);
25	    }
26	  }
27	}

1	"use client";
2	
3	import { useRef, useState } from "react";
4	import { Plus, Pencil, Trash2, Upload } from "lucide-react";
5	import { toast } from "sonner";
6	import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
7	import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
8	import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
9	import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
10	import {
11	  useGetAgentSkillsQuery,
12	  useUpdateAgentSkillMutation,
13	  useDeleteAgentSkillMutation,
14	  useImportAgentSkillMutation,
15	} from "@/managers/apiManager";
16	import { AgentSkill, PLATFORM_LABELS, SocialPlatform } from "@/interfaces/contentStudioInterface";
17	import { SkillDialog } from "@/components/content-studio/SkillDialog";
18	
19	export function SkillsTab() {
20	  const { data: skills, isLoading } = useGetAgentSkillsQuery();
21	  const [update] = useUpdateAgentSkillMutation();
22	  const [del] = useDeleteAgentSkillMutation();
23	  const [importSkill, { isLoading: importing }] = useImportAgentSkillMutation();
24	  const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = useState(false);
25	  const [editing, setEditing] = useState<AgentSkill | undefined>();
26	  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
27	
28	  const onImportFile = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
29	    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
30	    e.target.value = "";
31	    if (!file) return;
32	    try {
33	      const skill = await importSkill(file).unwrap();
34	      toast.success(`Imported skill "${skill.name}"`);
35	    } catch (err: any) {
36	      toast.error(err?.data?.message ?? "Failed to import skill");
37	    }
38	  };
39	
40	  const openNew = () => {
41	    setEditing(undefined);
42	    setDialogOpen(true);
43	  };
44	  const openEdit = (skill: AgentSkill) => {
45	    setEditing(skill);
46	    setDialogOpen(true);
47	  };
48	
49	  const toggleEnabled = async (skill: AgentSkill) => {
50	    try {
51	      await update({ id: skill.id, data: { enabled: !skill.enabled } }).unwrap();
52	    } catch (e: any) {
53	      toast.error(e?.data?.message ?? "Failed to update");
54	    }
55	  };
56	
57	  const remove = async (skill: AgentSkill) => {
58	    try {
59	      await del(skill.id).unwrap();
60	      toast.success("Skill deleted");
61	    } catch (e: any) {
62	      toast.error(e?.data?.message ?? "Failed to delete");
63	    }
64	  };
65	
66	  return (
67	    <div>
68	      <div className="mb-4 flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
69	        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
70	          Reusable instructions the agent loads on demand at generation time. Import a
71	          <code className="mx-1 rounded bg-muted px-1 text-xs">SKILL.md</code>,
72	          <code className="mx-1 rounded bg-muted px-1 text-xs">.skill</code>, or
73	          <code className="ml-1 rounded bg-muted px-1 text-xs">.zip</code> bundle.
74	        </p>
75	        <div className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-2">
76	          <input
77	            ref={fileInputRef}
78	            type="file"
79	            accept=".md,.skill,.zip,.markdown,text/markdown,application/zip"
80	            className="hidden"
81	            onChange={onImportFile}
82	          />
83	          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" disabled={importing} onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}>
84	            <Upload className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" /> {importing ? "Importing…" : "Import"}
85	          </Button>
86	          <Button size="sm" onClick={openNew}>
87	            <Plus className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" /> New skill
88	          </Button>
89	        </div>
90	      </div>
91	
92	      {isLoading ? (
93	        <div className="flex h-40 items-center justify-center">
94	          <div className="h-6 w-6 animate-spin rounded-full border-4 border-primary border-t-transparent" />
95	        </div>
96	      ) : !skills?.length ? (
97	        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-lg border-2 border-dashed py-16 text-center">
98	          <p className="font-medium">No skills yet</p>
99	          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
100	            Add a skill to teach the agent your formats and voice — write one, or import a
101	            SKILL.md / .skill / .zip.
102	          </p>
103	          <div className="mt-4 flex items-center gap-2">
104	            <Button variant="outline" disabled={importing} onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}>
105	              <Upload className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" /> Import
106	            </Button>
107	            <Button onClick={openNew}>
108	              <Plus className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" /> Create skill
109	            </Button>
110	          </div>
111	        </div>
112	      ) : (
113	        <div className="space-y-3">
114	          {skills.map((skill) => (
115	            <Card key={skill.id}>
116	              <CardContent className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 p-4">
117	                <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
118	                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
119	                    <h3 className="font-semibold">{skill.name}</h3>
120	                    {!skill.enabled && (
121	                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px]">
122	                        disabled
123	                      </Badge>
124	                    )}
125	                  </div>
126	                  <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-muted-foreground">{skill.description}</p>
127	                  <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-1">
128	                    {(skill.platforms?.length ? skill.platforms : ["all"]).map((p) => (
129	                      <Badge key={p} variant="secondary" className="text-[10px]">
130	                        {p === "all" ? "All platforms" : PLATFORM_LABELS[p as SocialPlatform] ?? p}
131	                      </Badge>
132	                    ))}
133	                  </div>
134	                </div>
135	                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
136	                  <Switch
137	                    checked={skill.enabled}
138	                    onCheckedChange={() => toggleEnabled(skill)}
139	                    aria-label="Toggle enabled"
140	                  />
141	                  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={() => openEdit(skill)}>
142	                    <Pencil className="h-4 w-4" />
143	                  </Button>
144	                  <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" onClick={() => remove(skill)}>
145	                    <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
146	                  </Button>
147	                </div>
148	              </CardContent>
149	            </Card>
150	          ))}
151	        </div>
152	      )}
153	
154	      {dialogOpen && (
155	        <SkillDialog
156	          key={editing?.id ?? "new"}
157	          skill={editing}
158	          open={dialogOpen}
159	          onOpenChange={setDialogOpen}
160	        />
161	      )}
162	    </div>
163	  );
164	}
165

 `./api/src/main.ts`

```text
1	import 'reflect-metadata';
2	import { NestFactory } from '@nestjs/core';
3	import { ValidationPipe } from '@nestjs/common';
4	import { SwaggerModule } from '@nestjs/swagger';
5	import { AppModule } from './app.module';
6	import { buildSwaggerConfig } from './swagger';
7	import { loadConfig } from './config/env';
8	
9	async function bootstrap() {
10	  process.env.ROBYN_SERVE = '1'; // enable side-effectful lifecycle hooks
11	  const config = loadConfig(); // asserts required secrets at boot
12	  const app = await NestFactory.create(AppModule, { cors: true });
13	
14	  app.setGlobalPrefix('api', { exclude: ['health'] });
15	  app.useGlobalPipes(
16	    new ValidationPipe({
17	      transform: true,
18	      whitelist: true,
19	      forbidNonWhitelisted: false,
20	      transformOptions: { enableImplicitConversion: true },
21	    }),
22	  );
23	
24	  const document = SwaggerModule.createDocument(app, buildSwaggerConfig());
25	  SwaggerModule.setup('api/docs', app, document);
26	
27	  await app.listen(config.port);
28	  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
29	  console.log(`Robyn API on http://localhost:${config.port}  (docs: /api/docs)`);
30	}
31	
32	bootstrap();
33
```
</details></tool-use>

 `/Users/devansh/devanshkaria_dev_ecosystem/devanshkaria_dev_dashboard/components/content-studio/SkillDialog.tsx`

```text
1	"use client";
2	
3	import { useState } from "react";
4	import { toast } from "sonner";
5	import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
6	import {
7	  Dialog,
8	  DialogContent,
9	  DialogFooter,
10	  DialogHeader,
11	  DialogTitle,
12	} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
13	import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
14	import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
15	import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
16	import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
17	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
18	import {
19	  useCreateAgentSkillMutation,
20	  useUpdateAgentSkillMutation,
21	} from "@/managers/apiManager";
22	import {
23	  AgentSkill,
24	  SOCIAL_PLATFORMS,
25	  SocialPlatform,
26	  PLATFORM_LABELS,
27	} from "@/interfaces/contentStudioInterface";
28	
29	interface SkillDialogProps {
30	  skill?: AgentSkill;
31	  open: boolean;
32	  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
33	}
34	
35	export function SkillDialog({ skill, open, onOpenChange }: SkillDialogProps) {
36	  const [name, setName] = useState(skill?.name ?? "");
37	  const [description, setDescription] = useState(skill?.description ?? "");
38	  const [instructions, setInstructions] = useState(skill?.instructions ?? "");
39	  const [platforms, setPlatforms] = useState<SocialPlatform[]>(
40	    (skill?.platforms as SocialPlatform[]) ?? [],
41	  );
42	  const [enabled, setEnabled] = useState(skill?.enabled ?? true);
43	
44	  const [create, { isLoading: creating }] = useCreateAgentSkillMutation();
45	  const [update, { isLoading: updating }] = useUpdateAgentSkillMutation();
46	  const saving = creating || updating;
47	
48	  const toggle = (p: SocialPlatform) =>
49	    setPlatforms((cur) => (cur.includes(p) ? cur.filter((x) => x !== p) : [...cur, p]));
50	
51	  const save = async () => {
52	    if (!name.trim() || !description.trim() || !instructions.trim()) {
53	      toast.error("Name, description, and instructions are required");
54	      return;
55	    }
56	    const payload = { name: name.trim(), description: description.trim(), instructions, platforms, enabled };
57	    try {
58	      if (skill) await update({ id: skill.id, data: payload }).unwrap();
59	      else await create(payload).unwrap();
60	      toast.success(skill ? "Skill updated" : "Skill created");
61	      onOpenChange(false);
62	    } catch (e: any) {
63	      toast.error(e?.data?.message ?? "Failed to save skill");
64	    }
65	  };
66	
67	  return (
68	    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
69	      <DialogContent className="max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto sm:max-w-lg">
70	        <DialogHeader>
71	          <DialogTitle>{skill ? "Edit skill" : "New skill"}</DialogTitle>
72	        </DialogHeader>
73	        <div className="space-y-4">
74	          <div>
75	            <Label htmlFor="skill-name">Name</Label>
76	            <Input
77	              id="skill-name"
78	              value={name}
79	              onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)}
80	              placeholder="e.g. X thread style"
81	              className="mt-1"
82	            />
83	          </div>
84	          <div>
85	            <Label htmlFor="skill-desc">Description (trigger)</Label>
86	            <Textarea
87	              id="skill-desc"
88	              value={description}
89	              onChange={(e) => setDescription(e.target.value)}
90	              rows={2}
91	              placeholder="What the agent sees by default — e.g. 'Use when writing X threads.'"
92	              className="mt-1"
93	            />
94	            <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
95	              Written as a trigger; the agent reads this first and loads the full instructions on demand.
96	            </p>
97	          </div>
98	          <div>
99	            <Label htmlFor="skill-instructions">Instructions</Label>
100	            <Textarea
101	              id="skill-instructions"
102	              value={instructions}
103	              onChange={(e) => setInstructions(e.target.value)}
104	              rows={8}
105	              placeholder="The full skill body — the agent loads this when relevant."
106	              className="mt-1 font-mono text-xs"
107	            />
108	          </div>
109	          <div>
110	            <Label>Platforms (empty = all)</Label>
111	            <div className="mt-1 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
112	              {SOCIAL_PLATFORMS.map((p) => (
113	                <button
114	                  key={p}
115	                  type="button"
116	                  onClick={() => toggle(p)}
117	                  className={cn(
118	                    "rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs",
119	                    platforms.includes(p)
120	                      ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary"
121	                      : "border-border text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted",
122	                  )}
123	                >
124	                  {PLATFORM_LABELS[p]}
125	                </button>
126	              ))}
127	            </div>
128	          </div>
129	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
130	            <Label htmlFor="skill-enabled">Enabled</Label>
131	            <Switch id="skill-enabled" checked={enabled} onCheckedChange={setEnabled} />
132	          </div>
133	        </div>
134	        <DialogFooter>
135	          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>
136	            Cancel
137	          </Button>
138	          <Button onClick={save} disabled={saving}>
139	            {saving ? "Saving…" : "Save"}
140	          </Button>
141	        </DialogFooter>
142	      </DialogContent>
143	    </Dialog>
144	  );
145	}
146
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./api/src/openapi.ts`

```text
1	// Export the OpenAPI spec to api/openapi.json WITHOUT starting the HTTP server.
2	// Run: pnpm --filter robyn-api openapi  (then web regenerates its types).
3	import 'reflect-metadata';
4	import { writeFileSync } from 'node:fs';
5	import { join } from 'node:path';
6	import { NestFactory } from '@nestjs/core';
7	import { SwaggerModule } from '@nestjs/swagger';
8	import { AppModule } from './app.module';
9	import { buildSwaggerConfig } from './swagger';
10	
11	async function main() {
12	  // Build the app context without a DB connection where possible; we still need
13	  // the module graph, so create the full app but never listen.
14	  const app = await NestFactory.create(AppModule, { logger: false });
15	  const document = SwaggerModule.createDocument(app, buildSwaggerConfig());
16	  const out = join(__dirname, '..', 'openapi.json');
17	  writeFileSync(out, JSON.stringify(document, null, 2));
18	  await app.close();
19	  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
20	  console.log(`openapi.json written to ${out}`);
21	  process.exit(0);
22	}
23	
24	main().catch((e) => {
25	  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
26	  console.error('openapi export failed:', e);
27	  process.exit(1);
28	});
29
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `/Users/devansh/devanshkaria_dev_ecosystem/myMan_backend_core/OAUTH_FIX_SUMMARY.md`

```text
1	# OAuth Callback Fix - Frontend-First Flow ✅
2	
3	## Problem Fixed
4	The OAuth callback was returning **401 Unauthorized** because the backend callback endpoint required Firebase authentication, but Google/Microsoft OAuth redirects can't include auth tokens.
5	
6	## Solution Implemented
7	**Frontend-First OAuth Flow** - OAuth now redirects to frontend instead of backend.
8	
9	---
10	
11	## What Changed
12	
13	### 1. **OAuth Redirect URIs** 
14	**Before:** `http://localhost:3000/api/v1/calendar-providers/google/callback` (backend)  
15	**After:** `http://localhost:3002/calendar/callback` (frontend)
16	
17	### 2. **Backend Changes**
18	- ✅ Removed `/calendar-providers/google/callback` endpoint
19	- ✅ Removed `/calendar-providers/microsoft/callback` endpoint
20	- ✅ Updated `getRedirectUri()` to return frontend URL
21	- ✅ Added provider info to OAuth state parameter
22	- ✅ Updated scopes to include write permissions
23	
24	### 3. **OAuth State Parameter**
25	Now includes provider information:
26	```json
27	{
28	  "provider": "google",
29	  "timestamp": 1234567890
30	}
31	```
32	
33	### 4. **Updated Scopes**
34	**Google:**
35	- ✅ `calendar.readonly` → `calendar.events` (for CRUD)
36	
37	**Microsoft:**
38	- ✅ `Calendars.Read` → `Calendars.ReadWrite` (for CRUD)
39	
40	---
41	
42	## New OAuth Flow
43	
44	### Step 1: Get Auth URL (Authenticated)
45	```typescript
46	GET /api/v1/calendar-providers/google/auth-url
47	Authorization: Bearer {firebase-token}
48	
49	Response: {
50	  "authUrl": "https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth?..."
51	}
52	```
53	
54	### Step 2: Redirect to OAuth Provider
55	```typescript
56	window.location.href = authUrl;
57	```
58	
59	### Step 3: OAuth Provider Redirects to Frontend
60	```
61	https://yourapp.com/calendar/callback?code=xxx&state={"provider":"google",...}
62	```
63	
64	### Step 4: Frontend Extracts Code
65	```typescript
66	const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
67	const code = params.get('code');
68	const state = JSON.parse(params.get('state'));
69	const provider = state.provider; // 'google' or 'microsoft'
70	```
71	
72	### Step 5: List Calendars (Authenticated)
73	```typescript
74	POST /api/v1/calendar-providers/google/list-calendars
75	Authorization: Bearer {firebase-token}
76	Body: { "code": "xxx" }
77	
78	Response: {
79	  "calendars": [...]
80	}
81	```
82	
83	### Step 6: Connect Calendars (Authenticated)
84	```typescript
85	POST /api/v1/calendar-providers/google/connect-multiple
86	Authorization: Bearer {firebase-token}
87	Body: {
88	  "code": "xxx",
89	  "calendarIds": ["primary", "work-id"]
90	}
91	
92	Response: [
93	  { "id": "provider-uuid-1", ... },
94	  { "id": "provider-uuid-2", ... }
95	]
96	```
97	
98	---
99	
100	## Required Configuration Updates
101	
102	### 1. Google Cloud Console
103	Update OAuth 2.0 redirect URIs:
104	
105	**Add:**
106	- `http://localhost:3002/calendar/callback` (development)
107	- `https://app.devanshkaria.dev/calendar/callback` (production)
108	
109	**Remove (optional):**
110	- Old backend callback URLs
111	
112	### 2. Microsoft Azure Portal
113	Update redirect URIs in App Registration:
114	
115	**Add:**
116	- `http://localhost:3002/calendar/callback` (development)
117	- `https://app.devanshkaria.dev/calendar/callback` (production)
118	
119	**Remove (optional):**
120	- Old backend callback URLs
121	
122	### 3. Environment Variables
123	No changes needed! The backend automatically uses `FRONTEND_URL_DEV` and `FRONTEND_URL_PROD` to construct redirect URIs.
124	
125	```env
126	# Already configured in .env
127	FRONTEND_URL_DEV=http://localhost:3002
128	FRONTEND_URL_PROD=https://app.devanshkaria.dev
129	```
130	
131	---
132	
133	## Benefits of This Approach
134	
135	### ✅ Security
136	- All backend endpoints remain authenticated
137	- No public callback endpoints
138	- State parameter prevents CSRF attacks
139	- Frontend controls the OAuth flow
140	
141	### ✅ User Experience
142	- No more 401 errors
143	- Cleaner error handling
144	- Frontend can show loading states
145	- Better control over redirects
146	
147	### ✅ Modern Best Practices
148	- Follows OAuth 2.0 recommendations for SPAs
149	- Separates concerns (frontend handles UI, backend handles data)
150	- Easier to debug and test
151	
152	---
153	
154	## Testing Checklist
155	
156	### ✅ Backend
157	- [x] Build succeeds
158	- [x] OAuth redirect URIs point to frontend
159	- [x] State parameter includes provider info
160	- [x] Callback endpoints removed
161	- [x] Scopes include write permissions
162	
163	### Frontend (To Do)
164	- [ ] Create `/calendar/callback` page
165	- [ ] Parse OAuth code and state from URL
166	- [ ] Call backend to list calendars
167	- [ ] Display calendar selector
168	- [ ] Call backend to connect selected calendars
169	- [ ] Handle errors gracefully
170	
171	---
172	
173	## Frontend Implementation Example
174	
175	```typescript
176	// /calendar/callback page
177	
178	import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
179	import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
180	
181	export default function CalendarCallback() {
182	  const navigate = useNavigate();
183	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
184	  const [error, setError] = useState(null);
185	
186	  useEffect(() => {
187	    handleOAuthCallback();
188	  }, []);
189	
190	  async function handleOAuthCallback() {
191	    try {
192	      // Extract code and state from URL
193	      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
194	      const code = params.get('code');
195	      const stateParam = params.get('state');
196	      const error = params.get('error');
197	
198	      if (error) {
199	        setError(error);
200	        setLoading(false);
201	        return;
202	      }
203	
204	      if (!code || !stateParam) {
205	        setError('Missing OAuth parameters');
206	        setLoading(false);
207	        return;
208	      }
209	
210	      // Parse state to get provider
211	      const state = JSON.parse(stateParam);
212	      const provider = state.provider; // 'google' or 'microsoft'
213	
214	      // List available calendars
215	      const response = await fetch(
216	        `/api/v1/calendar-providers/${provider}/list-calendars`,
217	        {
218	          method: 'POST',
219	          headers: {
220	            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
221	            'Authorization': `Bearer ${firebaseToken}`,
222	          },
223	          body: JSON.stringify({ code }),
224	        }
225	      );
226	
227	      const { calendars } = await response.json();
228	
229	      // Store for calendar selection
230	      sessionStorage.setItem('oauth-code', code);
231	      sessionStorage.setItem('oauth-provider', provider);
232	      sessionStorage.setItem('available-calendars', JSON.stringify(calendars));
233	
234	      // Navigate to calendar selection page
235	      navigate('/calendar/select');
236	    } catch (err) {
237	      setError(err.message);
238	    } finally {
239	      setLoading(false);
240	    }
241	  }
242	
243	  if (loading) return <div>Processing OAuth callback...</div>;
244	  if (error) return <div>Error: {error}</div>;
245	  return null;
246	}
247	```
248	
249	---
250

252	
253	### What Was Fixed
254	- ✅ 401 Unauthorized error on OAuth callback
255	- ✅ OAuth flow now works correctly
256	- ✅ All backend endpoints remain authenticated
257	
258	### What Changed
259	- OAuth redirects to frontend (`/calendar/callback`)
260	- Backend callback endpoints removed
261	- State parameter includes provider info
262	- Scopes updated for event CRUD

273

1	import { DocumentBuilder } from '@nestjs/swagger';

3	export function buildSwaggerConfig() {

5	    .setTitle('Robyn API')
6	    .setDescription(
7	      'Robyn turns a freelancer\'s calendar, contracts and transcripts into invoices in Xero. ' +

9	        'The LLM parses and proposes at the edges; it never decides and never sends.',

16	    .addTag('detections', 'Ledger detectors (loop 3)')
17	    .addTag('connections', 'Integration health + check-now')
18	    .addTag('dashboard', 'Aggregate feeds: calendar view, leak strip, audit')

20	    .build();

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./api/src/modules/audit/audit.service.ts`

```text
1	import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3	import { Repository } from 'typeorm';
4	import { AuditEvent, AuditActor } from '../../entities';
5	
6	export interface RecordAudit {
7	  actor: AuditActor;
8	  action: string;
9	  summary: string;
10	  subjectType?: string;
11	  subjectId?: string;
12	  inputs?: Record<string, unknown>;
13	}
14	
15	// Every state change, Xero write, policy decision and poll result goes through
16	// here. No silent mutations anywhere in the codebase.
17	@Injectable()
18	export class AuditService {
19	  constructor(
20	    @InjectRepository(AuditEvent)
21	    private readonly repo: Repository<AuditEvent>,
22	  ) {}
23	
24	  async record(e: RecordAudit): Promise<AuditEvent> {
25	    const ev = this.repo.create({
26	      actor: e.actor,
27	      action: e.action,
28	      summary: e.summary,
29	      subjectType: e.subjectType ?? null,
30	      subjectId: e.subjectId ?? null,
31	      inputs: e.inputs ?? null,
32	    });
33	    return this.repo.save(ev);
34	  }
35	
36	  async list(limit = 200): Promise<AuditEvent[]> {
37	    return this.repo.find({ order: { createdAt: 'DESC' }, take: limit });
38	  }
39	
40	  async listForSubject(subjectId: string, limit = 100): Promise<AuditEvent[]> {
41	    return this.repo.find({
42	      where: { subjectId },
43	      order: { createdAt: 'DESC' },
44	      take: limit,
45	    });
46	  }
47	}
48
```
</details></tool-use>
