 `/Users/devansh/devanshkaria_dev_ecosystem/devanshkaria_dev_dashboard/app/(authenticated)/content-studio/page.tsx`

```text
1	"use client";
2	
3	import { useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
4	import Link from "next/link";
5	import { Sparkles, Square, Settings2, Activity } from "lucide-react";
6	import { toast } from "sonner";
7	import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
8	import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
9	import {
10	  Select,
11	  SelectContent,
12	  SelectItem,
13	  SelectTrigger,
14	  SelectValue,
15	} from "@/components/ui/select";
16	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
17	import { useGetSocialDraftsQuery } from "@/managers/apiManager";
18	import { streamGeneration, StreamHandle } from "@/lib/streamGeneration";
19	import {
20	  SOCIAL_PLATFORMS,
21	  SocialDraft,
22	  SocialPlatform,
23	  PLATFORM_LABELS,
24	} from "@/interfaces/contentStudioInterface";
25	import {
26	  AgentActivityFeed,
27	  ActivityItem,
28	} from "@/components/content-studio/AgentActivityFeed";
29	import { PlatformColumn } from "@/components/content-studio/PlatformColumn";
30	
31	let activitySeq = 0;
32	
33	export default function ContentStudioPage() {
34	  const { data: draftsResp, refetch } = useGetSocialDraftsQuery({ limit: 100 });
35	  const persisted = draftsResp?.data ?? [];
36	
37	  const [theme, setTheme] = useState("");
38	  const [context, setContext] = useState("");
39	  const [count, setCount] = useState(3);
40	  const [provider, setProvider] = useState<"anthropic" | "gemini">("anthropic");
41	  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<SocialPlatform[]>([...SOCIAL_PLATFORMS]);
42	
43	  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);
44	  const [activity, setActivity] = useState<ActivityItem[]>([]);
45	  const [liveDrafts, setLiveDrafts] = useState<Record<string, SocialDraft>>({});
46	  const [feedOpen, setFeedOpen] = useState(true);
47	  const streamRef = useRef<StreamHandle | null>(null);
48	
49	  const merged = useMemo(() => {
50	    const map = new Map<string, SocialDraft>();
51	    for (const d of persisted) map.set(d.id, d);
52	    // Overlay live (SSE) drafts only until the persisted query catches up; once
53	    // persisted has the id, the server row wins (correct status / deletion).
54	    for (const id of Object.keys(liveDrafts)) {
55	      if (!map.has(id)) map.set(id, liveDrafts[id]);
56	    }
57	    return [...map.values()].filter((d) => !d.isDeleted);
58	  }, [persisted, liveDrafts]);
59	
60	  const draftsFor = (p: SocialPlatform) =>
61	    merged
62	      .filter((d) => d.platform === p)
63	      .sort((a, b) => +new Date(b.createdAt) - +new Date(a.createdAt));
64	
65	  const togglePlatform = (p: SocialPlatform) =>
66	    setSelected((cur) => (cur.includes(p) ? cur.filter((x) => x !== p) : [...cur, p]));
67	
68	  const pushActivity = (kind: ActivityItem["kind"], text: string) =>
69	    setActivity((cur) => [...cur, { id: `a${activitySeq++}`, kind, text }]);
70	
71	  const start = () => {
72	    if (!selected.length) {
73	      toast.error("Select at least one platform");
74	      return;
75	    }
76	    setGenerating(true);
77	    setActivity([]);
78	    setLiveDrafts({});
79	    setFeedOpen(true);
80	
81	    streamRef.current = streamGeneration(
82	      {
83	        theme: theme.trim() || undefined,
84	        context: context.trim() || undefined,
85	        platforms: selected,
86	        count,
87	        provider,
88	      },
89	      {
90	        onAgent: (e) => {
91	          if (e.event === "text") {
92	            const t = e.text.length > 220 ? `${e.text.slice(0, 220)}…` : e.text;
93	            pushActivity("text", t);
94	          } else pushActivity(e.event, e.summary);
95	        },
96	        onPost: (draft) => setLiveDrafts((cur) => ({ ...cur, [draft.id]: draft })),
97	        onImageReady: (draft, error) => {
98	          setLiveDrafts((cur) => ({ ...cur, [draft.id]: draft }));
99	          if (error) {
100	            pushActivity("tool_result", `Image failed: ${error}`);
101	            toast.error(`Image generation failed: ${error}`);
102	          }
103	        },
104	        onError: (message) => {
105	          pushActivity("tool_result", `Error: ${message}`);
106	          toast.error(message);
107	        },
108	        onComplete: () => {
109	          setGenerating(false);
110	          // Clear the transient overlay once fresh server state has loaded.
111	          Promise.resolve(refetch()).finally(() => setLiveDrafts({}));
112	        },
113	      },
114	    );
115	    streamRef.current.done.finally(() => setGenerating(false));
116	  };
117	
118	  const stop = () => {
119	    streamRef.current?.abort();
120	    setGenerating(false);
121	    // Aborted runs keep already-emitted drafts server-side; reconcile from persisted.
122	    Promise.resolve(refetch()).finally(() => setLiveDrafts({}));
123	  };
124	
125	  return (
126	    <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-6">
127	      {/* Header */}
128	      <div className="mb-5 flex flex-col gap-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
129	        <div>
130	          <h1 className="flex items-center gap-2 text-2xl font-bold">
131	            <Sparkles className="h-6 w-6 text-primary" /> Content Studio
132	          </h1>
133	          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
134	            Generate platform-native posts with the content agent. Drafts stream in live.
135	          </p>
136	        </div>
137	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
138	          <Button
139	            variant={feedOpen ? "secondary" : "outline"}
140	            size="sm"
141	            onClick={() => setFeedOpen((v) => !v)}
142	          >
143	            <Activity className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" /> Activity
144	          </Button>
145	          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" asChild>
146	            <Link href="/content-studio/settings">
147	              <Settings2 className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" /> Skills
148	            </Link>
149	          </Button>
150	        </div>
151	      </div>
152	
153	      {/* Generate bar */}
154	      <div className="mb-5 space-y-3 rounded-lg border bg-card p-4">
155	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 md:flex-row">
156	          <Input
157	            placeholder="Theme (optional) — e.g. 'shipping an MCP server'"
158	            value={theme}
159	            onChange={(e) => setTheme(e.target.value)}
160	            disabled={generating}
161	          />
162	          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
163	            <Select value={provider} onValueChange={(v) => setProvider(v as any)} disabled={generating}>
164	              <SelectTrigger className="w-full sm:w-[130px]">
165	                <SelectValue />
166	              </SelectTrigger>
167	              <SelectContent>
168	                <SelectItem value="anthropic">Anthropic</SelectItem>
169	                <SelectItem value="gemini">Gemini</SelectItem>
170	              </SelectContent>
171	            </Select>
172	            <Select
173	              value={String(count)}
174	              onValueChange={(v) => setCount(Number(v))}
175	              disabled={generating}
176	            >
177	              <SelectTrigger className="w-full sm:w-[110px]">
178	                <SelectValue />
179	              </SelectTrigger>
180	              <SelectContent>
181	                {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((n) => (
182	                  <SelectItem key={n} value={String(n)}>
183	                    {n} / platform
184	                  </SelectItem>
185	                ))}
186	              </SelectContent>
187	            </Select>
188	            {generating ? (
189	              <Button variant="destructive" onClick={stop}>
190	                <Square className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" /> Stop
191	              </Button>
192	            ) : (
193	              <Button onClick={start}>
194	                <Sparkles className="mr-1 h-4 w-4" /> Generate
195	              </Button>
196	            )}
197	          </div>
198	        </div>
199	
200	        <Input
201	          placeholder="Extra context for the agent (optional)"
202	          value={context}
203	          onChange={(e) => setContext(e.target.value)}
204	          disabled={generating}
205	        />
206	
207	        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
208	          {SOCIAL_PLATFORMS.map((p) => (
209	            <button
210	              key={p}
211	              type="button"
212	              disabled={generating}
213	              onClick={() => togglePlatform(p)}
214	              className={cn(
215	                "rounded-full border px-3 py-1 text-xs transition-colors",
216	                selected.includes(p)
217	                  ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary"
218	                  : "border-border text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted",
219	                generating && "opacity-60",
220	              )}
221	            >
222	              {PLATFORM_LABELS[p]}
223	            </button>
224	          ))}
225	        </div>
226	      </div>
227	
228	      {/* Board */}
229	      <div
230	        className={cn(
231	          "grid grid-cols-1 gap-4",
232	          feedOpen && "lg:grid-cols-[260px_minmax(0,1fr)]",
233	        )}
234	      >
235	        {feedOpen && (
236	          <div className="lg:sticky lg:top-4 lg:h-[calc(100vh-220px)]">
237	            <AgentActivityFeed
238	              items={activity}
239	              active={generating}
240	              onClose={() => setFeedOpen(false)}
241	            />
242	          </div>
243	        )}
244	
245	        <div className="grid min-w-0 grid-cols-1 gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4">
246	          {SOCIAL_PLATFORMS.map((p) => (
247	            <PlatformColumn
248	              key={p}
249	              platform={p}
250	              drafts={draftsFor(p)}
251	              generating={generating && selected.includes(p)}
252	            />
253	          ))}
254	        </div>
255	      </div>
256	    </div>
257	  );
258	}
259
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./api/src/modules/xero/xero-api.ts`

```text
1	// Typed Xero Accounting API resource helpers (ACCREC / receivables — Robyn
2	// invoices clients). Transport + auth live in xero-http.ts. Business decisions
3	// live in the engine and services; this file is I/O only.
4	//
5	// Idempotency discipline: every write does check-by-reference first. ACCREC
6	// invoices carry a unique-ish Reference we own, so we filter on it before create.
7	
8	import { xeroFetch, xeroRequest, assertElementOk, Pagination, resolveTenant } from './xero-http';
9	
10	// ---- Date helpers (YYYY-MM-DD in UTC) -------------------------------------
11	
12	function todayISO(): string {
13	  return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
14	}
15	
16	function addDaysISO(dateISO: string, days: number): string {
17	  const d = new Date(`${dateISO}T00:00:00Z`);
18	  d.setUTCDate(d.getUTCDate() + days);
19	  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
20	}
21	
22	// ---- Contacts -------------------------------------------------------------
23	
24	export interface XeroContact {
25	  ContactID: string;
26	  Name: string;
27	  EmailAddress?: string;
28	  ContactStatus?: string;
29	  IsCustomer?: boolean;
30	  IsSupplier?: boolean;
31	}
32	
33	export async function listContacts(page = 1, searchTerm?: string): Promise<XeroContact[]> {
34	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Contacts?: XeroContact[] }>('/Contacts', {
35	    query: { page, ...(searchTerm ? { SearchTerm: searchTerm } : {}) },
36	  });
37	  return res.Contacts ?? [];
38	}
39	
40	export async function findContactByEmail(email: string): Promise<XeroContact | null> {
41	  const where = `EmailAddress="${email.replace(/"/g, '')}"`;
42	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Contacts?: XeroContact[] }>('/Contacts', {
43	    query: { where, page: 1 },
44	  });
45	  return res.Contacts?.[0] ?? null;
46	}
47	
48	export async function findContactByName(name: string): Promise<XeroContact | null> {
49	  const where = `Name="${name.replace(/"/g, '')}"`;
50	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Contacts?: XeroContact[] }>('/Contacts', {
51	    query: { where, page: 1 },
52	  });
53	  return res.Contacts?.[0] ?? null;
54	}
55	
56	/** Idempotent: reuse an existing contact by email/name before creating. */
57	export async function ensureContact(
58	  name: string,
59	  email?: string,
60	): Promise<{ contact: XeroContact; created: boolean }> {
61	  if (email) {
62	    const byEmail = await findContactByEmail(email);
63	    if (byEmail) return { contact: byEmail, created: false };
64	  }
65	  const byName = await findContactByName(name);
66	  if (byName) return { contact: byName, created: false };
67	
68	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Contacts: XeroContact[] }>('/Contacts', {
69	    method: 'POST',
70	    json: { Contacts: [{ Name: name, ...(email ? { EmailAddress: email } : {}) }] },
71	    query: { summarizeErrors: 'false' },
72	    idempotencyKey: `contact:${name}:${email ?? ''}`.slice(0, 128),
73	  });
74	  return { contact: res.Contacts[0], created: true };
75	}
76	
77	// ---- Invoices (ACCREC) ----------------------------------------------------
78	
79	export interface XeroLineItem {
80	  Description: string;
81	  Quantity?: number;
82	  UnitAmount?: number;
83	  AccountCode?: string;
84	  TaxType?: string;
85	  LineAmount?: number;
86	  ItemCode?: string;
87	}
88	
89	export interface XeroInvoice {
90	  InvoiceID?: string;
91	  InvoiceNumber?: string;
92	  Type?: string;
93	  Contact?: { ContactID: string; Name?: string };
94	  Reference?: string;
95	  Status?: string;
96	  Date?: string;
97	  DueDate?: string;
98	  LineItems?: XeroLineItem[];
99	  LineAmountTypes?: string;
100	  SubTotal?: number;
101	  TotalTax?: number;
102	  Total?: number;
103	  AmountDue?: number;
104	  AmountPaid?: number;
105	  CurrencyCode?: string;
106	}
107	
108	export interface CreateInvoiceInput {
109	  contactId: string;
110	  reference: string; // our stable idempotency reference
111	  lineItems: XeroLineItem[];
112	  date?: string; // YYYY-MM-DD
113	  dueDate?: string;
114	  status?: 'DRAFT' | 'SUBMITTED' | 'AUTHORISED';
115	  lineAmountTypes?: 'Exclusive' | 'Inclusive' | 'NoTax';
116	  currencyCode?: string;
117	}
118	
119	/** Find an ACCREC invoice we previously created, by our Reference. */
120	export async function findInvoiceByReference(reference: string): Promise<XeroInvoice | null> {
121	  const where = `Type=="ACCREC" AND Reference=="${reference.replace(/"/g, '')}"`;
122	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Invoices?: XeroInvoice[] }>('/Invoices', {
123	    query: { where, page: 1 },
124	  });
125	  return res.Invoices?.[0] ?? null;
126	}
127	
128	export async function getInvoice(invoiceId: string): Promise<XeroInvoice | null> {
129	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Invoices?: XeroInvoice[] }>(`/Invoices/${invoiceId}`, {});
130	  return res.Invoices?.[0] ?? null;
131	}
132	
133	/** Idempotent create: returns the existing invoice if the Reference is taken. */
134	export async function createInvoice(
135	  input: CreateInvoiceInput,
136	): Promise<{ invoice: XeroInvoice; created: boolean }> {
137	  const existing = await findInvoiceByReference(input.reference);
138	  if (existing) return { invoice: existing, created: false };
139	
140	  // Xero rejects an AUTHORISED create with no DueDate; default to Net 14 from
141	  // the invoice date so both DRAFT and AUTHORISED writes always validate.
142	  const date = input.date ?? todayISO();
143	  const dueDate = input.dueDate ?? addDaysISO(date, 14);
144	
145	  const payload: XeroInvoice = {
146	    Type: 'ACCREC',
147	    Contact: { ContactID: input.contactId },
148	    Reference: input.reference,
149	    LineItems: input.lineItems,
150	    LineAmountTypes: input.lineAmountTypes ?? 'Exclusive',
151	    Status: input.status ?? 'DRAFT',
152	    Date: date,
153	    DueDate: dueDate,
154	    ...(input.currencyCode ? { CurrencyCode: input.currencyCode } : {}),
155	  };
156	
157	  const res = await xeroFetch<{
158	    Invoices: (XeroInvoice & {
159	      StatusAttributeString?: 'OK' | 'WARNING' | 'ERROR';
160	      ValidationErrors?: { Message?: string }[];
161	    })[];
162	  }>(
163	    '/Invoices',
164	    {
165	      method: 'POST',
166	      json: { Invoices: [payload] },
167	      query: { summarizeErrors: 'false' },
168	      idempotencyKey: `invoice:${input.reference}`.slice(0, 128),
169	    },
170	  );
171	  // summarizeErrors=false hides validation failures inside a 200 — assert the
172	  // element status so a bad write throws instead of returning a zero-GUID.
173	  const element = res.Invoices?.[0];
174	  if (!element) throw new Error('XeroInvoiceCreateFailed: no invoice element in response');
175	  assertElementOk(element, `create ACCREC invoice ${input.reference}`);
176	  return { invoice: element, created: true };
177	}
178	
179	/** Move a DRAFT/SUBMITTED invoice to AUTHORISED (raw API — MCP cannot). */
180	export async function authoriseInvoice(invoiceId: string): Promise<XeroInvoice> {
181	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Invoices: XeroInvoice[] }>(`/Invoices/${invoiceId}`, {
182	    method: 'POST',
183	    json: { Invoices: [{ InvoiceID: invoiceId, Status: 'AUTHORISED' }] },
184	  });
185	  return res.Invoices[0];
186	}
187	
188	export async function listInvoices(
189	  statuses?: string[],
190	  page = 1,
191	): Promise<{ invoices: XeroInvoice[]; pagination?: Pagination }> {
192	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Invoices?: XeroInvoice[]; pagination?: Pagination }>('/Invoices', {
193	    query: { page, ...(statuses ? { Statuses: statuses.join(',') } : {}), summaryOnly: 'false' },
194	  });
195	  return { invoices: res.Invoices ?? [], pagination: res.pagination };
196	}
197	
198	// ---- History & Notes (raw API only — no MCP tool) -------------------------
199	
200	export async function addHistoryNote(
201	  endpoint: 'Invoices' | 'Contacts' | 'Quotes',
202	  guid: string,
203	  details: string,
204	): Promise<void> {
205	  await xeroRequest(`/${endpoint}/${guid}/history`, {
206	    method: 'PUT',
207	    json: { HistoryRecords: [{ Details: details.slice(0, 2500) }] },
208	  });
209	}
210	
211	export async function getHistory(
212	  endpoint: 'Invoices' | 'Contacts' | 'Quotes',
213	  guid: string,
214	): Promise<Array<{ Changes?: string; DateUTC?: string; User?: string; Details?: string }>> {
215	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ HistoryRecords?: any[] }>(`/${endpoint}/${guid}/history`, {});
216	  return res.HistoryRecords ?? [];
217	}
218	
219	// ---- Attachments (raw API only — no MCP tool) -----------------------------
220	
221	const FORBIDDEN_FILENAME = /[<>:"/\\|?*\x00+]/;
222	
223	export async function uploadAttachment(
224	  endpoint: 'Invoices' | 'Contacts' | 'Quotes',
225	  guid: string,
226	  filename: string,
227	  bytes: Uint8Array,
228	  mimeType: string,
229	): Promise<void> {
230	  if (FORBIDDEN_FILENAME.test(filename)) {
231	    throw new Error(`InvalidAttachmentFilename: "${filename}" contains a forbidden character`);
232	  }
233	  await xeroRequest(`/${endpoint}/${guid}/Attachments/${filename}`, {
234	    method: 'PUT',
235	    body: bytes,
236	    contentType: mimeType,
237	  });
238	}
239	
240	export async function listAttachments(
241	  endpoint: 'Invoices' | 'Contacts' | 'Quotes',
242	  guid: string,
243	): Promise<Array<{ AttachmentID: string; FileName: string; MimeType: string; ContentLength: number }>> {
244	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Attachments?: any[] }>(`/${endpoint}/${guid}/Attachments/`, {});
245	  return res.Attachments ?? [];
246	}
247	
248	// ---- Payments (read for retainer cadence; write on demand) -----------------
249	
250	export interface XeroPayment {
251	  PaymentID?: string;
252	  Date?: string;
253	  Amount?: number;
254	  Reference?: string;
255	  Status?: string;
256	  Invoice?: { InvoiceID?: string; InvoiceNumber?: string };
257	}
258	
259	export async function listPayments(page = 1): Promise<XeroPayment[]> {
260	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Payments?: XeroPayment[] }>('/Payments', { query: { page } });
261	  return res.Payments ?? [];
262	}
263	
264	export async function createPayment(input: {
265	  invoiceId: string;
266	  accountCode: string;
267	  amount: number;
268	  date: string;
269	  reference: string;
270	}): Promise<XeroPayment> {
271	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Payments: XeroPayment[] }>('/Payments', {
272	    method: 'PUT',
273	    json: {
274	      Invoice: { InvoiceID: input.invoiceId },
275	      Account: { Code: input.accountCode },
276	      Date: input.date,
277	      Amount: input.amount,
278	      Reference: input.reference,
279	    },
280	    idempotencyKey: `payment:${input.reference}`.slice(0, 128),
281	  });
282	  return res.Payments[0];
283	}
284	
285	// ---- Quotes (loop-3 detector: accepted quote never invoiced) --------------
286	
287	export interface XeroQuote {
288	  QuoteID?: string;
289	  QuoteNumber?: string;
290	  Status?: string;
291	  Contact?: { ContactID: string; Name?: string };
292	  Total?: number;
293	  Date?: string;
294	  Reference?: string;
295	  LineItems?: XeroLineItem[];
296	}
297	
298	export async function listQuotes(status?: string, page = 1): Promise<XeroQuote[]> {
299	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Quotes?: XeroQuote[] }>('/Quotes', {
300	    query: { page, ...(status ? { Status: status } : {}) },
301	  });
302	  return res.Quotes ?? [];
303	}
304	
305	// ---- Accounts (revenue account codes for invoice lines) -------------------
306	
307	export interface XeroAccount {
308	  AccountID: string;
309	  Code: string;
310	  Name: string;
311	  Type: string;
312	  Class?: string;
313	  EnablePaymentsToAccount?: boolean;
314	}
315	
316	export async function listAccounts(): Promise<XeroAccount[]> {
317	  const res = await xeroFetch<{ Accounts?: XeroAccount[] }>('/Accounts', {});
318	  return res.Accounts ?? [];
319	}
320	
321	/** First sales/revenue account code, for ACCREC invoice lines. Falls back to 200. */
322	export async function defaultSalesAccountCode(): Promise<string> {
323	  try {
324	    const accounts = await listAccounts();
325	    const revenue = accounts.find(
326	      (a) => a.Type === 'REVENUE' || a.Class === 'REVENUE' || a.Code === '200',
327	    );
328	    return revenue?.Code ?? '200';
329	  } catch {
330	    return '200';
331	  }
332	}
333	
334	// ---- Reports: Aged Receivables by Contact (leak strip) --------------------
335	
336	export async function agedReceivablesByContact(contactId: string): Promise<any> {
337	  return xeroFetch<any>('/Reports/AgedReceivablesByContact', {
338	    query: { contactID: contactId },
339	  });
340	}
341	
342	// ---- Deep link ------------------------------------------------------------
343	
344	export async function invoiceDeepLink(invoiceId: string): Promise<string> {
345	  // The go.xero.com deep link for a receivable invoice (opens in the org UI).
346	  return `https://go.xero.com/app/invoicing/view/${invoiceId}`;
347	}
348	
349	// ---- Composed write: the money moment (G2) --------------------------------
350	// One idempotent path used by BOTH the auto-send loop and the manual approve
351	// flow. Ensures the contact, creates the ACCREC invoice (draft or authorised),
352	// writes Robyn's decision note to History, and attaches the evidence. Takes
353	// plain data and returns plain data — callers persist. Every step is safe to
354	// re-run (check-by-reference on the invoice, overwrite-by-filename on attachments).
355	
356	export interface WriteInvoiceEvidence {
357	  filename: string; // e.g. "robyn-evidence.txt" (no < > : " / \ | ? * +)
358	  text: string;
359	  mimeType?: string; // default text/plain
360	}
361	
362	export interface WriteInvoiceInput {
363	  clientName: string;
364	  clientEmail?: string;
365	  existingContactId?: string; // reuse if we already know it
366	  reference: string; // stable idempotency key -> Xero Reference
367	  lines: XeroLineItem[];
368	  currency?: string;
369	  date?: string;
370	  dueDate?: string;
371	  authorise: boolean; // false => leave DRAFT; true => AUTHORISED (sent)
372	  decisionNote: string; // Robyn's reasoning -> History & Notes
373	  evidence?: WriteInvoiceEvidence[]; // transcript excerpt + contract clause
374	}
375	
376	export interface WriteInvoiceResult {
377	  contactId: string;
378	  contactCreated: boolean;
379	  invoiceId: string;
380	  invoiceNumber: string | null;
381	  status: string | null;
382	  total: number | null;
383	  deepLink: string;
384	  alreadyExisted: boolean;
385	}
386	
387	export async function writeInvoice(input: WriteInvoiceInput): Promise<WriteInvoiceResult> {
388	  // 1. Contact (idempotent)
389	  let contactId = input.existingContactId ?? null;
390	  let contactCreated = false;
391	  if (!contactId) {
392	    const { contact, created } = await ensureContact(input.clientName, input.clientEmail);
393	    contactId = contact.ContactID;
394	    contactCreated = created;
395	  }
396	
397	  // 2. Invoice (idempotent by Reference)
398	  const { invoice, created } = await createInvoice({
399	    contactId,
400	    reference: input.reference,
401	    lineItems: input.lines,
402	    currencyCode: input.currency,
403	    date: input.date,
404	    dueDate: input.dueDate,
405	    status: input.authorise ? 'AUTHORISED' : 'DRAFT',
406	  });
407	  const invoiceId = invoice.InvoiceID as string;
408	
409	  // 3. If it existed as DRAFT but we now want it AUTHORISED, walk it up.
410	  let status = invoice.Status ?? null;
411	  if (input.authorise && status !== 'AUTHORISED' && status !== 'PAID') {
412	    const authed = await authoriseInvoice(invoiceId);
413	    status = authed.Status ?? status;
414	  }
415	
416	  // 4. Robyn's decision note -> History (raw API; no MCP tool).
417	  try {
418	    await addHistoryNote('Invoices', invoiceId, input.decisionNote);
419	  } catch {
420	    /* history is best-effort; never block the money moment on a note */
421	  }
422	
423	  // 5. Evidence attachments -> raw API (overwrite-by-filename is idempotent).
424	  for (const ev of input.evidence ?? []) {
425	    try {
426	      await uploadAttachment(
427	        'Invoices',
428	        invoiceId,
429	        ev.filename,
430	        new TextEncoder().encode(ev.text),
431	        ev.mimeType ?? 'text/plain',
432	      );
433	    } catch {
434	      /* attachment is best-effort evidence */
435	    }
436	  }
437	
438	  return {
439	    contactId,
440	    contactCreated,
441	    invoiceId,
442	    invoiceNumber: invoice.InvoiceNumber ?? null,
443	    status,
444	    total: invoice.Total ?? null,
445	    deepLink: await invoiceDeepLink(invoiceId),
446	    alreadyExisted: !created,
447	  };
448	}
449
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./web/lib/api.ts`

```text
1	"use client";
2	
3	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
4	import type { components, paths } from "./api-types";
5	
6	/**
7	 * The ONLY source of request/response types in web/ is lib/api-types.ts,
8	 * generated from api/openapi.json. Never hand-write a shape here.
9	 */
10	export type Schemas = components["schemas"];
11	
12	export const API_BASE =
13	  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE ?? "http://localhost:4000/api";
14	
15	/** A failed HTTP call. Carries status + best-effort parsed body. */
16	export class ApiError extends Error {
17	  status: number;
18	  body: unknown;
19	  constructor(status: number, message: string, body?: unknown) {
20	    super(message);
21	    this.name = "ApiError";
22	    this.status = status;
23	    this.body = body;
24	  }
25	}
26	
27	async function request<T>(
28	  method: string,
29	  path: string,
30	  body?: unknown,
31	  init?: RequestInit,
32	): Promise<T> {
33	  const url = path.startsWith("http") ? path : `${API_BASE}${path}`;
34	  let res: Response;
35	  try {
36	    res = await fetch(url, {
37	      method,
38	      headers: {
39	        Accept: "application/json",
40	        ...(body !== undefined ? { "Content-Type": "application/json" } : {}),
41	        ...(init?.headers ?? {}),
42	      },
43	      body: body !== undefined ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
44	      cache: "no-store",
45	      ...init,
46	    });
47	  } catch (err) {
48	    // Network / CORS / server-down. Surface a human message, never crash.
49	    throw new ApiError(
50	      0,
51	      "Cannot reach Robyn's API. Check the connection and try again.",
52	      err,
53	    );
54	  }
55	
56	  const text = await res.text();
57	  const parsed = text
58	    ? (() => {
59	        try {
60	          return JSON.parse(text);
61	        } catch {
62	          return text;
63	        }
64	      })()
65	    : undefined;
66	
67	  if (!res.ok) {
68	    const message =
69	      (parsed && typeof parsed === "object" && "message" in parsed
70	        ? String((parsed as Record<string, unknown>).message)
71	        : undefined) ?? `Request failed (${res.status})`;
72	    throw new ApiError(res.status, message, parsed);
73	  }
74	
75	  return parsed as T;
76	}
77	
78	/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
79	/*  Typed path helpers — GET response type inferred from the OpenAPI spec.      */
80	/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
81	
82	type JsonBody<T> = T extends { content: { "application/json": infer C } }
83	  ? C
84	  : never;
85	
86	/** Paths that expose a GET returning application/json. */
87	export type GetPath = {
88	  [P in keyof paths]: paths[P] extends { get: { responses: { 200: unknown } } }
89	    ? P
90	    : never;
91	}[keyof paths];
92	
93	/** Response type for a GET path (200 application/json body). */
94	export type GetResponse<P extends GetPath> = paths[P] extends {
95	  get: { responses: { 200: infer R } };
96	}
97	  ? JsonBody<R>
98	  : never;
99	
100	/** Typed GET keyed by an OpenAPI path literal. Response type is inferred. */
101	export function apiGet<P extends GetPath>(
102	  path: P,
103	  init?: RequestInit,
104	): Promise<GetResponse<P>> {
105	  return request<GetResponse<P>>("GET", path as string, undefined, init);
106	}
107	
108	/** Loosely-typed GET for dynamic URLs (path params, query strings). */
109	export function get<T>(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T> {
110	  return request<T>("GET", path, undefined, init);
111	}
112	
113	export function post<T>(
114	  path: string,
115	  body?: unknown,
116	  init?: RequestInit,
117	): Promise<T> {
118	  return request<T>("POST", path, body, init);
119	}
120	
121	export function patch<T>(
122	  path: string,
123	  body?: unknown,
124	  init?: RequestInit,
125	): Promise<T> {
126	  return request<T>("PATCH", path, body, init);
127	}
128	
129	/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
130	/*  Data hooks — native fetch with loading / error / refetch, no extra deps.    */
131	/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
132	
133	export interface UseApiState<T> {
134	  data: T | undefined;
135	  error: ApiError | undefined;
136	  isLoading: boolean;
137	  /** True on a background refetch while stale data is still shown. */
138	  isValidating: boolean;
139	  refetch: () => void;
140	}
141	
142	/**
143	 * Fetch `path` on mount (and when it changes). Returns loading/error/data plus
144	 * a `refetch`. Pass `path = null` to skip (e.g. waiting on a param).
145	 */
146	export function useApi<T>(
147	  path: string | null,
148	  options?: { refreshMs?: number },
149	): UseApiState<T> {
150	  const [data, setData] = useState<T | undefined>(undefined);
151	  const [error, setError] = useState<ApiError | undefined>(undefined);
152	  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState<boolean>(path != null);
153	  const [isValidating, setIsValidating] = useState<boolean>(false);
154	  const activeRef = useRef(0);
155	
156	  const load = useCallback(
157	    async (isRefetch: boolean) => {
158	      if (path == null) return;
159	      const ticket = ++activeRef.current;
160	      if (isRefetch) setIsValidating(true);
161	      else setIsLoading(true);
162	      try {
163	        const result = await get<T>(path);
164	        if (ticket !== activeRef.current) return;
165	        setData(result);
166	        setError(undefined);
167	      } catch (err) {
168	        if (ticket !== activeRef.current) return;
169	        setError(
170	          err instanceof ApiError
171	            ? err
172	            : new ApiError(0, "Something went wrong.", err),
173	        );
174	      } finally {
175	        if (ticket === activeRef.current) {
176	          setIsLoading(false);
177	          setIsValidating(false);
178	        }
179	      }
180	    },
181	    [path],
182	  );
183	
184	  useEffect(() => {
185	    void load(false);
186	    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
187	  }, [path]);
188	
189	  useEffect(() => {
190	    if (!options?.refreshMs || path == null) return;
191	    const id = setInterval(() => void load(true), options.refreshMs);
192	    return () => clearInterval(id);
193	    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
194	  }, [path, options?.refreshMs]);
195	
196	  const refetch = useCallback(() => void load(true), [load]);
197	
198	  return { data, error, isLoading, isValidating, refetch };
199	}
200	
201	/**
202	 * Run a one-shot mutation with in-flight + error state, for buttons.
203	 * `run()` returns the result (or throws) so callers can chain toasts/refetch.
204	 */
205	export function useAction<TArgs extends unknown[], TResult>(
206	  fn: (...args: TArgs) => Promise<TResult>,
207	) {
208	  const [isPending, setIsPending] = useState(false);
209	  const [error, setError] = useState<ApiError | undefined>(undefined);
210	
211	  const run = useCallback(
212	    async (...args: TArgs): Promise<TResult> => {
213	      setIsPending(true);
214	      setError(undefined);
215	      try {
216	        return await fn(...args);
217	      } catch (err) {
218	        const apiErr =
219	          err instanceof ApiError
220	            ? err
221	            : new ApiError(0, "Something went wrong.", err);
222	        setError(apiErr);
223	        throw apiErr;
224	      } finally {
225	        setIsPending(false);
226	      }
227	    },
228	    [fn],
229	  );
230	
231	  return { run, isPending, error };
232	}
233
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import {
2	  Inbox,
3	  Calendar,
4	  Users,
5	  FileText,
6	  Plug,
7	  type LucideIcon,
8	} from "lucide-react";
9	
10	export interface NavItem {
11	  label: string;
12	  href: string;
13	  icon: LucideIcon;
14	  /** Match child routes too (e.g. /clients/123). */
15	  matchPrefix?: boolean;
16	}
17	
18	/** The five first-class surfaces. Tasks inbox is home. */
19	export const NAV_ITEMS: NavItem[] = [
20	  { label: "Tasks inbox", href: "/", icon: Inbox },
21	  { label: "Calendar", href: "/calendar", icon: Calendar, matchPrefix: true },
22	  { label: "Clients", href: "/clients", icon: Users, matchPrefix: true },
23	  { label: "Invoices", href: "/invoices", icon: FileText, matchPrefix: true },
24	  {
25	    label: "Connections",
26	    href: "/connections",
27	    icon: Plug,
28	    matchPrefix: true,
29	  },
30	];
31	
32	export function isActive(pathname: string, item: NavItem): boolean {
33	  if (item.href === "/") return pathname === "/";
34	  return item.matchPrefix
35	    ? pathname === item.href || pathname.startsWith(`${item.href}/`)
36	    : pathname === item.href;
37	}
38
```
</details></tool-use>
