<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./api/src/modules/meetings/meetings.service.ts`

```text
1	import { Injectable, Logger, NotFoundException } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3	import { Repository } from 'typeorm';
4	import * as fs from 'node:fs';
5	import * as path from 'node:path';
6	import * as nodeIcal from 'node-ical';
7	
8	import {
9	  Meeting,
10	  MeetingAttendee,
11	  Transcript,
12	  Client,
13	  Contract,
14	  PotentialClient,
15	  Task,
16	  InvoiceProposal,
17	  ConnectionState,
18	  AuditEvent,
19	  MeetingState,
20	  InvoiceProposalState,
21	  PotentialClientState,
22	  TaskType,
23	  TaskState,
24	  TaskRefType,
25	  TranscriptSource,
26	  ConnectionKind,
27	  ConnectionStatus,
28	  AuditActor,
29	  ProvenanceKind,
30	} from '../../entities';
31	import {
32	  ProposalLine,
33	  MatchProposal,
34	  TranscriptParsed,
35	  BillingProfile,
36	  ClauseRef,
37	} from '../../entities/shapes';
38	import { EngineService } from '../engine/engine.service';
39	import { LlmService } from '../llm/llm.service';
40	import { XeroService } from '../xero/xero.service';
41	import { AuditService } from '../audit/audit.service';
42	import { EngineClient, MatchKind, ScopeItemInput } from '../engine/types';
43	import { loadConfig } from '../../config/env';
44	import {
45	  MeetingListItemDto,
46	  MeetingDetailDto,
47	  MeetingProposalDto,
48	  MeetingActionResultDto,
49	  SyncResultDto,
50	} from './dto/meeting-response.dto';
51	
52	// Robyn's own address(es). External attendees are everyone else — a block with
53	// only owner attendees reads as PERSONAL and is auto-skipped.
54	const OWNER_EMAILS: string[] = [
55	  'me@robyn.dev',
56	  ...(process.env.OWNER_EMAILS ?? '')
57	    .split(',')
58	    .map((s) => s.trim())
59	    .filter(Boolean),
60	];
61	
62	const TAX_RATE_PCT = 20; // UK VAT
63	
64	interface NormalizedEvent {
65	  gcalEventId: string;
66	  title: string;
67	  start: Date;
68	  end: Date;
69	  attendees: MeetingAttendee[];
70	}
71	
72	interface CalendarIngest {
73	  events: NormalizedEvent[];
74	  source: 'google' | 'ics';
75	  status: ConnectionStatus;
76	  label: string;
77	  detail: string;
78	}
79	
80	interface Loop1Outcome {
81	  meeting: Meeting;
82	  proposal: InvoiceProposal | null;
83	  xeroError: string | null;
84	}
85	
86	@Injectable()
87	export class MeetingsService {
88	  private readonly log = new Logger('MeetingsService');
89	
90	  constructor(
91	    @InjectRepository(Meeting) private readonly meetingRepo: Repository<Meeting>,
92	    @InjectRepository(Transcript) private readonly transcriptRepo: Repository<Transcript>,
93	    @InjectRepository(Client) private readonly clientRepo: Repository<Client>,
94	    @InjectRepository(Contract) private readonly contractRepo: Repository<Contract>,
95	    @InjectRepository(PotentialClient) private readonly pcRepo: Repository<PotentialClient>,
96	    @InjectRepository(Task) private readonly taskRepo: Repository<Task>,
97	    @InjectRepository(InvoiceProposal) private readonly proposalRepo: Repository<InvoiceProposal>,
98	    @InjectRepository(ConnectionState) private readonly connRepo: Repository<ConnectionState>,
99	    private readonly engine: EngineService,
100	    private readonly llm: LlmService,
101	    private readonly xero: XeroService,
102	    private readonly audit: AuditService,
103	  ) {}
104	
105	  // =========================================================================
106	  // Loop 1 — the heart. Deterministic; the engine decides, the LLM only parses.
107	  // =========================================================================
108	
109	  async runLoop1(meeting: Meeting): Promise<Loop1Outcome> {
110	    const clients = await this.clientRepo.find();
111	    const contracts = await this.contractRepo.find();
112	    const contractByClient = new Map<string, Contract>();
113	    for (const c of contracts) if (!contractByClient.has(c.clientId)) contractByClient.set(c.clientId, c);
114	    const engineClients: EngineClient[] = clients.map((c) => ({
115	      id: c.id,
116	      name: c.name,
117	      emails: c.emails ?? [],
118	      autonomyEnabled: c.autonomyEnabled,
119	      hasContractOnFile: contractByClient.has(c.id),
120	    }));
121	    const clientById = new Map(clients.map((c) => [c.id, c]));
122	
123	    // 1-2. Deterministic classification. LLM fuzzy proposals ONLY for the human
124	    // (unknown/ambiguous). The LLM never sets clientId.
125	    const match = this.engine.classify(meeting.attendees ?? [], engineClients, OWNER_EMAILS);
126	    if (match.kind === 'UNKNOWN' || match.kind === 'AMBIGUOUS') {
127	      try {
128	        const res = await this.llm.proposeClientMatches(
129	          (meeting.attendees ?? []).map((a) => ({ email: a.email, name: a.name })),
130	          clients.map((c) => ({ id: c.id, name: c.name, emails: c.emails ?? [] })),
131	        );
132	        meeting.matchProposals = res.proposals as MatchProposal[];
133	        await this.audit.record({
134	          actor: AuditActor.LLM,
135	          action: 'meeting.match_proposed',
136	          summary: `LLM proposed ${res.proposals.length} client match(es) for "${meeting.title}".`,
137	          subjectType: 'meeting',
138	          subjectId: meeting.id,
139	        });
140	      } catch (e) {
141	        await this.audit.record({
142	          actor: AuditActor.LLM,
143	          action: 'meeting.match_propose_failed',
144	          summary: `LLM match proposal unavailable: ${String(e).slice(0, 160)}`,
145	          subjectType: 'meeting',
146	          subjectId: meeting.id,
147	        });
148	      }
149	    }
150	
151	    // A human-confirmed clientId overrides the classifier (confirm-client flow).
152	    let matchKind: MatchKind = match.kind;
153	    let clientId: string | null = match.matchedClientId;
154	    if (meeting.clientId) {
155	      matchKind = 'MATCHED';
156	      clientId = meeting.clientId;
157	    } else if (match.kind === 'MATCHED') {
158	      meeting.clientId = match.matchedClientId;
159	      clientId = match.matchedClientId;
160	    }
161	
162	    const hasTranscript = !!meeting.transcriptId;
163	
164	    // 3. Pre-proposal decision. Non-proposal branches (skip / queue / raise task)
165	    // finish here. Only MATCHED + transcript proceeds to build a proposal.
166	    const pre = this.engine.step({ isPersonal: meeting.isPersonal, hasTranscript, matchKind, policyAuto: null });
167	
168	    if (!pre.buildProposal) {
169	      meeting.state = pre.state;
170	      if (pre.queuePotentialClient) {
171	        const unknowns = match.unknownAttendees.length ? match.unknownAttendees : match.externalAttendees;
172	        await this.queuePotentialClients(meeting, unknowns);
173	      }
174	      await this.meetingRepo.save(meeting);
175	      if (pre.raiseTask) {
176	        const client = clientId ? clientById.get(clientId) ?? null : null;
177	        await this.raiseTask(
178	          pre.raiseTask.type,
179	          TaskRefType.MEETING,
180	          meeting.id,
181	          pre.raiseTask.title,
182	          pre.raiseTask.summary,
183	          this.preTaskContext(meeting, client, match.candidateClientIds, pre.raiseTask.type),
184	        );
185	      }
186	      await this.audit.record({
187	        actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
188	        action: `meeting.${pre.state.toLowerCase()}`,
189	        summary: this.transitionSummary(meeting, pre.state),
190	        subjectType: 'meeting',
191	        subjectId: meeting.id,
192	      });
193	      return { meeting, proposal: null, xeroError: null };
194	    }
195	
196	    // 4. MATCHED + transcript => build the priced proposal with full provenance.
197	    const client = clientId ? clientById.get(clientId) : undefined;
198	    if (!client) {
199	      await this.audit.record({
200	        actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
201	        action: 'meeting.client_missing',
202	        summary: `Matched client ${clientId} no longer exists — cannot build a proposal for "${meeting.title}".`,
203	        subjectType: 'meeting',
204	        subjectId: meeting.id,
205	      });
206	      return { meeting, proposal: null, xeroError: 'Matched client not found' };
207	    }
208	    const contract = contractByClient.get(client.id) ?? null;
209	    const hasContractOnFile = !!contract;
210	    const transcript = meeting.transcriptId
211	      ? await this.transcriptRepo.findOne({ where: { id: meeting.transcriptId } })
212	      : null;
213	    const clause = this.pickClause(contract, client.billingProfile);
214	    const bp = client.billingProfile;
215	
216	    const billing = {
217	      rate: bp?.rate ?? contract?.parsed?.rate ?? null,
218	      rateUnit: bp?.rate_unit ?? contract?.parsed?.rate_unit ?? 'HOUR',
219	      currency: bp?.currency ?? contract?.parsed?.currency ?? 'GBP',
220	      clauseLabel: clause?.ref ?? bp?.provenance ?? null,
221	      clauseText: clause?.text ?? null,
222	      hasContract: hasContractOnFile,
223	    };
224	
225	    const scopeItems: ScopeItemInput[] = (transcript?.parsed?.scope_items ?? []).map((s) => ({
226	      description: s.description,
227	      estHours: Number(s.est_hours),
228	      evidenceQuote: s.evidence_quote,
229	      billable: s.billable,
230	    }));
231	
232	    let accountCode = '200';
233	    try {
234	      accountCode = await this.xero.defaultSalesAccountCode();
235	    } catch {
236	      /* Xero may not be live; the engine still prices with the default code. */
237	    }
238	
239	    const block = {
240	      label: this.blockLabel(new Date(meeting.start), new Date(meeting.end)),
241	      durationHours: Number(meeting.durationHours),
242	      meetingId: meeting.id,
243	    };
244	    const built = this.engine.buildProposal({ block, billing, scopeItems, taxRatePct: TAX_RATE_PCT, accountCode });
245	
246	    const policyResult = this.engine.policy({
247	      autonomyEnabled: client.autonomyEnabled,
248	      hasContractOnFile,
249	      matchKind: 'MATCHED',
250	      amount: built.total,
251	      contractTermsMaxAmount: null,
252	      hasUnreviewedScope: built.hasTranscriptScope,
253	    });
254	    await this.audit.record({
255	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
256	      action: 'policy.decided',
257	      summary: `Policy for "${meeting.title}": ${policyResult.auto ? 'AUTO-SEND cleared' : 'review required'}. ${policyResult.reasons.join(' ')}`.slice(0, 900),
258	      subjectType: 'meeting',
259	      subjectId: meeting.id,
260	      inputs: { policyResult },
261	    });
262	
263	    // Persist the proposal idempotently by its stable Reference.
264	    const reference = `ROBYN-${meeting.id.slice(0, 8)}`;
265	    let proposal = await this.proposalRepo.findOne({ where: { reference } });
266	    if (proposal && proposal.state === InvoiceProposalState.SENT) {
267	      meeting.state = MeetingState.SENT;
268	      await this.meetingRepo.save(meeting);
269	      return { meeting, proposal, xeroError: null };
270	    }
271	    if (!proposal) proposal = this.proposalRepo.create({ reference, meetingId: meeting.id, detectionId: null });
272	    proposal.clientId = client.id;
273	    proposal.lines = built.lines;
274	    proposal.currency = built.currency;
275	    proposal.subtotal = built.subtotal;
276	    proposal.taxTotal = built.taxTotal;
277	    proposal.total = built.total;
278	    proposal.policyResult = policyResult;
279	    proposal.state = InvoiceProposalState.DRAFT;
280	    proposal = await this.proposalRepo.save(proposal);
281	
282	    // 5. Re-run the step with the real policy verdict: auto-send or review.
283	    const decision = this.engine.step({
284	      isPersonal: meeting.isPersonal,
285	      hasTranscript: true,
286	      matchKind: 'MATCHED',
287	      policyAuto: policyResult.auto,
288	    });
289	
290	    if (decision.autoSend) {
291	      const decisionNote = this.decisionNote(client.name, block.label, policyResult, built, true);
292	      const evidence = this.buildEvidence(transcript, clause);
293	      try {
294	        const result = await this.xero.writeInvoice({
295	          clientName: client.name,
296	          clientEmail: client.emails?.[0],
297	          existingContactId: client.xeroContactId ?? undefined,
298	          reference,
299	          lines: this.toXeroLines(built.lines),
300	          currency: built.currency,
301	          authorise: true,
302	          decisionNote,
303	          evidence,
304	        });
305	        proposal.state = InvoiceProposalState.SENT;
306	        proposal.xeroInvoiceId = result.invoiceId;
307	        proposal.xeroInvoiceNumber = result.invoiceNumber;
308	        proposal.xeroDeepLink = result.deepLink;
309	        proposal.autoSent = true;
310	        proposal = await this.proposalRepo.save(proposal);
311	        if (!client.xeroContactId && result.contactId) {
312	          client.xeroContactId = result.contactId;
313	          await this.clientRepo.save(client);
314	        }
315	        meeting.state = MeetingState.SENT;
316	        await this.meetingRepo.save(meeting);
317	        await this.audit.record({
318	          actor: AuditActor.XERO,
319	          action: 'xero.invoice.sent',
320	          summary: `Auto-sent invoice ${result.invoiceNumber ?? result.invoiceId} to ${client.name} for ${built.currency} ${built.total}.`,
321	          subjectType: 'proposal',
322	          subjectId: proposal.id,
323	          inputs: { reference, invoiceId: result.invoiceId, decisionNote },
324	        });
325	        return { meeting, proposal, xeroError: null };
326	      } catch (e) {
327	        const msg = String((e as { message?: string })?.message ?? e).slice(0, 300);
328	        proposal.state = InvoiceProposalState.IN_REVIEW;
329	        proposal = await this.proposalRepo.save(proposal);
330	        meeting.state = MeetingState.INVOICE_PROPOSED;
331	        await this.meetingRepo.save(meeting);
332	        await this.raiseTask(
333	          TaskType.REVIEW_INVOICE,
334	          TaskRefType.PROPOSAL,
335	          proposal.id,
336	          'Review the invoice',
337	          `Auto-send to ${client.name} failed (${msg}). Review and approve manually.`,
338	          this.proposalTaskContext(meeting, client, proposal, built, msg),
339	        );
340	        await this.audit.record({
341	          actor: AuditActor.XERO,
342	          action: 'xero.invoice.send_failed',
343	          summary: `Auto-send to ${client.name} failed: ${msg}. Proposal held for review.`,
344	          subjectType: 'proposal',
345	          subjectId: proposal.id,
346	        });
347	        return { meeting, proposal, xeroError: msg };
348	      }
349	    }
350	
351	    // Not auto — hold for human review.
352	    proposal.state = InvoiceProposalState.IN_REVIEW;
353	    proposal = await this.proposalRepo.save(proposal);
354	    meeting.state = MeetingState.INVOICE_PROPOSED;
355	    await this.meetingRepo.save(meeting);
356	    await this.raiseTask(
357	      TaskType.REVIEW_INVOICE,
358	      TaskRefType.PROPOSAL,
359	      proposal.id,
360	      'Review the invoice',
361	      `Robyn built an invoice proposal for ${client.name} (${built.currency} ${built.total}). Approve or edit.`,
362	      this.proposalTaskContext(meeting, client, proposal, built, null),
363	    );
364	    await this.audit.record({
365	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
366	      action: 'meeting.invoice_proposed',
367	      summary: `Proposed invoice for ${client.name}: ${built.currency} ${built.total} across ${built.lines.length} line(s).`,
368	      subjectType: 'proposal',
369	      subjectId: proposal.id,
370	      inputs: { reference },
371	    });
372	    return { meeting, proposal, xeroError: null };
373	  }
374	
375	  // =========================================================================
376	  // Endpoints
377	  // =========================================================================
378	
379	  async list(state?: string): Promise<MeetingListItemDto[]> {
380	    const meetings = await this.meetingRepo.find({
381	      where: state ? { state: state as MeetingState } : {},
382	      order: { start: 'DESC' },
383	    });
384	    const clients = await this.clientRepo.find();
385	    const clientName = new Map(clients.map((c) => [c.id, c.name]));
386	    const proposals = await this.proposalRepo.find();
387	    const proposalByMeeting = new Map<string, string>();
388	    for (const p of proposals) if (p.meetingId && !proposalByMeeting.has(p.meetingId)) proposalByMeeting.set(p.meetingId, p.id);
389	    return meetings.map((m) =>
390	      this.mapListItem(
391	        m,
392	        m.clientId ? clientName.get(m.clientId) ?? null : null,
393	        proposalByMeeting.get(m.id) ?? null,
394	      ),
395	    );
396	  }
397	
398	  async detail(id: string): Promise<MeetingDetailDto> {
399	    const m = await this.getMeetingOrThrow(id);
400	    return this.buildDetail(m);
401	  }
402	
403	  async sync(): Promise<SyncResultDto> {
404	    const ingest = await this.ingestCalendar();
405	    const { imported, updated } = await this.upsertMeetings(ingest.events, ingest.source);
406	    await this.upsertCalendarConnection(ingest.status, ingest.label, ingest.detail);
407	    const processed = await this.runEligible();
408	    await this.audit.record({
409	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
410	      action: 'calendar.synced',
411	      summary: `Calendar sync (${ingest.source}): +${imported} new, ${updated} refreshed, ${processed} processed.`,
412	      subjectType: 'connection',
413	    });
414	    return {
415	      source: ingest.source,
416	      status: ingest.status,
417	      label: ingest.label,
418	      detail: ingest.detail,
419	      imported,
420	      updated,
421	      processed,
422	      lastSyncAt: new Date().toISOString(),
423	    };
424	  }
425	
426	  async importIcs(icsText: string): Promise<SyncResultDto> {
427	    const events = this.parseIcs(icsText);
428	    const { imported, updated } = await this.upsertMeetings(events, 'ics');
429	    const detail = `Imported ${events.length} event(s) from uploaded .ics.`;
430	    await this.upsertCalendarConnection(ConnectionStatus.FALLBACK, 'calendar.ics (uploaded)', detail);
431	    const processed = await this.runEligible();
432	    await this.audit.record({
433	      actor: AuditActor.HUMAN,
434	      action: 'calendar.ics_imported',
435	      summary: `.ics import: +${imported} new, ${updated} refreshed, ${processed} processed.`,
436	      subjectType: 'connection',
437	    });
438	    return {
439	      source: 'ics',
440	      status: ConnectionStatus.FALLBACK,
441	      label: 'calendar.ics (uploaded)',
442	      detail,
443	      imported,
444	      updated,
445	      processed,
446	      lastSyncAt: new Date().toISOString(),
447	    };
448	  }
449	
450	  async attachTranscript(id: string, rawText: string, source?: TranscriptSource): Promise<MeetingActionResultDto> {
451	    const meeting = await this.getMeetingOrThrow(id);
452	    const transcript = this.transcriptRepo.create({
453	      meetingId: meeting.id,
454	      rawText,
455	      source: source ?? TranscriptSource.PASTED,
456	      parsed: null,
457	    });
458	    let parsedCount = 0;
459	    try {
460	      const parsed = await this.llm.parseTranscript(rawText);
461	      transcript.parsed = parsed as TranscriptParsed;
462	      parsedCount = parsed.scope_items.length;
463	    } catch (e) {
464	      await this.audit.record({
465	        actor: AuditActor.LLM,
466	        action: 'transcript.parse_failed',
467	        summary: `Transcript parse failed for "${meeting.title}": ${String(e).slice(0, 160)}. Proceeding with base billing only.`,
468	        subjectType: 'meeting',
469	        subjectId: meeting.id,
470	      });
471	    }
472	    const saved = await this.transcriptRepo.save(transcript);
473	    meeting.transcriptId = saved.id;
474	    meeting.state = MeetingState.TRANSCRIPT_ATTACHED;
475	    await this.meetingRepo.save(meeting);
476	    await this.audit.record({
477	      actor: AuditActor.HUMAN,
478	      action: 'meeting.transcript_attached',
479	      summary: `Transcript attached to "${meeting.title}" — ${parsedCount} scope item(s) parsed.`,
480	      subjectType: 'meeting',
481	      subjectId: meeting.id,
482	    });
483	    await this.resolveTask(TaskType.PROVIDE_TRANSCRIPT, meeting.id, 'Transcript provided', AuditActor.HUMAN);
484	    const outcome = await this.runLoop1(meeting);
485	    return this.actionResult(outcome);
486	  }
487	
488	  async confirmClient(id: string, clientId: string): Promise<MeetingActionResultDto> {
489	    const meeting = await this.getMeetingOrThrow(id);
490	    const client = await this.clientRepo.findOne({ where: { id: clientId } });
491	    if (!client) throw new NotFoundException(`Client ${clientId} not found`);
492	    meeting.clientId = clientId;
493	    if (
494	      meeting.state === MeetingState.UNKNOWN_ATTENDEE ||
495	      meeting.state === MeetingState.DETECTED ||
496	      meeting.state === MeetingState.AWAITING_TRANSCRIPT ||
497	      meeting.state === MeetingState.TRANSCRIPT_ATTACHED
498	    ) {
499	      meeting.state = MeetingState.CLIENT_MATCHED;
500	    }
501	    await this.meetingRepo.save(meeting);
502	    await this.audit.record({
503	      actor: AuditActor.HUMAN,
504	      action: 'meeting.client_confirmed',
505	      summary: `Client confirmed as ${client.name} for "${meeting.title}".`,
506	      subjectType: 'meeting',
507	      subjectId: meeting.id,
508	    });
509	    await this.resolveTask(
510	      TaskType.CONFIRM_CLIENT_MATCH,
511	      meeting.id,
512	      `Confirmed client ${client.name}`,
513	      AuditActor.HUMAN,
514	    );
515	    const outcome = await this.runLoop1(meeting);
516	    return this.actionResult(outcome);
517	  }
518	
519	  async skip(id: string, reason?: string): Promise<MeetingDetailDto> {
520	    const meeting = await this.getMeetingOrThrow(id);
521	    meeting.state = MeetingState.SKIPPED;
522	    meeting.skipReason = reason ?? 'Skipped by user';
523	    await this.meetingRepo.save(meeting);
524	    await this.resolveTask(TaskType.PROVIDE_TRANSCRIPT, meeting.id, `Skipped: ${meeting.skipReason}`, AuditActor.HUMAN);
525	    await this.resolveTask(TaskType.CONFIRM_CLIENT_MATCH, meeting.id, `Skipped: ${meeting.skipReason}`, AuditActor.HUMAN);
526	    await this.audit.record({
527	      actor: AuditActor.HUMAN,
528	      action: 'meeting.skipped',
529	      summary: `Meeting "${meeting.title}" skipped: ${meeting.skipReason}.`,
530	      subjectType: 'meeting',
531	      subjectId: meeting.id,
532	    });
533	    return this.buildDetail(meeting);
534	  }
535	
536	  /** Run the Loop-1 step on every meeting that has not yet progressed. */
537	  private async runEligible(): Promise<number> {
538	    const eligible = await this.meetingRepo.find({
539	      where: [
540	        { state: MeetingState.DETECTED },
541	        { state: MeetingState.AWAITING_TRANSCRIPT },
542	        { state: MeetingState.UNKNOWN_ATTENDEE },
543	      ],
544	      order: { start: 'ASC' },
545	    });
546	    let processed = 0;
547	    for (const m of eligible) {
548	      try {
549	        await this.runLoop1(m);
550	        processed++;
551	      } catch (e) {
552	        this.log.warn(`Loop-1 failed for meeting ${m.id}: ${String(e).slice(0, 200)}`);
553	        await this.audit.record({
554	          actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
555	          action: 'meeting.loop_error',
556	          summary: `Loop-1 step failed for "${m.title}": ${String(e).slice(0, 160)}`,
557	          subjectType: 'meeting',
558	          subjectId: m.id,
559	        });
560	      }
561	    }
562	    return processed;
563	  }
564	
565	  // =========================================================================
566	  // Calendar ingest — Google read-only if configured, else the .ics fixture.
567	  // =========================================================================
568	
569	  private async ingestCalendar(): Promise<CalendarIngest> {
570	    const cfg = loadConfig();
571	    if (cfg.google.configured) {
572	      try {
573	        const events = await this.loadGoogleEvents();
574	        return {
575	          events,
576	          source: 'google',
577	          status: ConnectionStatus.LIVE,
578	          label: 'Google Calendar',
579	          detail: `Live: ${events.length} event(s) via the Google Calendar API.`,
580	        };
581	      } catch (e) {
582	        const ics = this.ingestIcsFile();
583	        ics.detail = `Google Calendar unavailable (${String(e).slice(0, 120)}) — using .ics fallback. ${ics.detail}`;
584	        return ics;
585	      }
586	    }
587	    return this.ingestIcsFile();
588	  }
589	
590	  private ingestIcsFile(): CalendarIngest {
591	    const file = this.readIcsFile();
592	    if (!file) {
593	      return {
594	        events: [],
595	        source: 'ics',
596	        status: ConnectionStatus.DOWN,
597	        label: 'calendar.ics',
598	        detail: 'No seed/data/calendar.ics found. Upload one via POST /meetings/import-ics.',
599	      };
600	    }
601	    const events = this.parseIcs(file.text);
602	    return {
603	      events,
604	      source: 'ics',
605	      status: ConnectionStatus.FALLBACK,
606	      label: 'calendar.ics',
607	      detail: `Fallback: parsed ${events.length} event(s) from ${file.path}.`,
608	    };
609	  }
610	
611	  private readIcsFile(): { text: string; path: string } | null {
612	    const cwd = process.cwd();
613	    const candidates = [
614	      path.resolve(cwd, 'seed/data/calendar.ics'),
615	      path.resolve(cwd, '../seed/data/calendar.ics'),
616	      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../seed/data/calendar.ics'),
617	      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../../seed/data/calendar.ics'),
618	    ];
619	    for (const p of candidates) {
620	      try {
621	        if (fs.existsSync(p)) return { text: fs.readFileSync(p, 'utf8'), path: p };
622	      } catch {
623	        /* keep trying candidates */
624	      }
625	    }
626	    return null;
627	  }
628	
629	  private parseIcs(text: string): NormalizedEvent[] {
630	    // node-ical's typings don't expose `sync` cleanly under CJS; use it loosely.
631	    const ical: any = nodeIcal;
632	    const data = ical.sync.parseICS(text);
633	    const events: NormalizedEvent[] = [];
634	    for (const key of Object.keys(data)) {
635	      const ev: any = data[key];
636	      if (!ev || ev.type !== 'VEVENT') continue;
637	      const start = new Date(ev.start);
638	      const end = ev.end ? new Date(ev.end) : new Date(start.getTime() + 3600000);
639	      const attendees = this.extractIcsAttendees(ev);
640	      events.push({
641	        gcalEventId: String(ev.uid ?? `${ev.summary ?? 'event'}-${start.toISOString()}`),
642	        title: String(ev.summary ?? 'Untitled meeting'),
643	        start,
644	        end,
645	        attendees,
646	      });
647	    }
648	    return events;
649	  }
650	
651	  private extractIcsAttendees(ev: any): MeetingAttendee[] {
652	    const out: MeetingAttendee[] = [];
653	    const push = (raw: any, organizer = false) => {
654	      if (!raw) return;
655	      let email = '';
656	      let name: string | undefined;
657	      if (typeof raw === 'string') {
658	        email = raw;
659	      } else if (typeof raw === 'object') {
660	        email = raw.val ?? raw.email ?? '';
661	        name = raw.params?.CN ?? raw.params?.cn ?? undefined;
662	      }
663	      email = String(email).replace(/^mailto:/i, '').trim();
664	      if (!email) return;
665	      if (!out.some((a) => a.email.toLowerCase() === email.toLowerCase())) out.push({ email, name, organizer });
666	    };
667	    const at = ev.attendee;
668	    if (Array.isArray(at)) at.forEach((a) => push(a));
669	    else push(at);
670	    push(ev.organizer, true);
671	    return out;
672	  }
673	
674	  private async loadGoogleEvents(): Promise<NormalizedEvent[]> {
675	    const accessToken = process.env.GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN;
676	    const refreshToken = process.env.GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN;
677	    if (!accessToken && !refreshToken) {
678	      throw new Error('No Google OAuth token available (set GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN / GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN)');
679	    }
680	    // Dynamic import so the build stays green even when googleapis is absent
681	    // (the .ics fallback is the demo path). The Function indirection stops
682	    // TypeScript from statically resolving the optional dependency.
683	    const dynImport = new Function('m', 'return import(m)') as unknown as (m: string) => Promise<any>;
684	    const mod = await dynImport('googleapis');
685	    const google = mod.google ?? mod.default?.google;
686	    const cfg = loadConfig();
687	    const oauth2 = new google.auth.OAuth2(cfg.google.clientId, cfg.google.clientSecret);
688	    oauth2.setCredentials({ access_token: accessToken, refresh_token: refreshToken });
689	    const calendar = google.calendar({ version: 'v3', auth: oauth2 });
690	    const calId = process.env.GOOGLE_CALENDAR_ID ?? 'primary';
691	    const now = new Date();
692	    const timeMin = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - 2, 1).toISOString();
693	    const timeMax = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() + 2, 1).toISOString();
694	    const res = await calendar.events.list({
695	      calendarId: calId,
696	      timeMin,
697	      timeMax,
698	      singleEvents: true,
699	      orderBy: 'startTime',
700	      maxResults: 250,
701	    });
702	    const items: any[] = res.data.items ?? [];
703	    return items
704	      .filter((it) => it.start)
705	      .map((it) => {
706	        const start = new Date(it.start.dateTime ?? it.start.date);
707	        const end = new Date(it.end?.dateTime ?? it.end?.date ?? start);
708	        const attendees: MeetingAttendee[] = (it.attendees ?? []).map((a: any) => ({
709	          email: a.email,
710	          name: a.displayName,
711	          organizer: !!a.organizer,
712	        }));
713	        if (it.organizer?.email && !attendees.some((x) => x.email?.toLowerCase() === it.organizer.email.toLowerCase())) {
714	          attendees.push({ email: it.organizer.email, name: it.organizer.displayName, organizer: true });
715	        }
716	        return {
717	          gcalEventId: String(it.id),
718	          title: String(it.summary ?? 'Untitled meeting'),
719	          start,
720	          end,
721	          attendees,
722	        };
723	      });
724	  }
725	
726	  private async upsertMeetings(events: NormalizedEvent[], source: string): Promise<{ imported: number; updated: number }> {
727	    let imported = 0;
728	    let updated = 0;
729	    for (const ev of events) {
730	      const durationHours = round2((ev.end.getTime() - ev.start.getTime()) / 3600000);
731	      const isPersonal = this.isPersonalMeeting(ev.attendees);
732	      let m = await this.meetingRepo.findOne({ where: { gcalEventId: ev.gcalEventId } });
733	      if (m) {
734	        m.title = ev.title;
735	        m.start = ev.start;
736	        m.end = ev.end;
737	        m.durationHours = durationHours;
738	        m.attendees = ev.attendees;
739	        m.isPersonal = isPersonal;
740	        m.source = source;
741	        await this.meetingRepo.save(m);
742	        updated++;
743	      } else {
744	        m = this.meetingRepo.create({
745	          gcalEventId: ev.gcalEventId,
746	          title: ev.title,
747	          start: ev.start,
748	          end: ev.end,
749	          durationHours,
750	          attendees: ev.attendees,
751	          isPersonal,
752	          source,
753	          state: MeetingState.DETECTED,
754	          clientId: null,
755	          transcriptId: null,
756	          matchProposals: null,
757	          skipReason: null,
758	        });
759	        await this.meetingRepo.save(m);
760	        imported++;
761	      }
762	    }
763	    return { imported, updated };
764	  }
765	
766	  private isPersonalMeeting(attendees: MeetingAttendee[]): boolean {
767	    const owner = new Set(OWNER_EMAILS.map((e) => e.toLowerCase()));
768	    const external = attendees.filter((a) => a.email && !owner.has(a.email.toLowerCase()));
769	    return external.length === 0;
770	  }
771	
772	  // =========================================================================
773	  // Tasks (owned here) + potential-client queue
774	  // =========================================================================
775	
776	  private async raiseTask(
777	    type: TaskType,
778	    refType: TaskRefType,
779	    refId: string,
780	    title: string,
781	    summary: string,
782	    context: Record<string, unknown>,
783	  ): Promise<Task> {
784	    const dedupeKey = `${type}:${refId}`;
785	    let task = await this.taskRepo.findOne({ where: { dedupeKey } });
786	    if (task) {
787	      const wasResolved = task.state === TaskState.RESOLVED;
788	      task.state = TaskState.OPEN;
789	      task.resolvedAt = null;
790	      task.resolution = null;
791	      task.title = title;
792	      task.summary = summary;
793	      task.context = context;
794	      task = await this.taskRepo.save(task);
795	      if (wasResolved) {
796	        await this.audit.record({
797	          actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
798	          action: 'task.reopened',
799	          summary: `Task re-opened: ${title}.`,
800	          subjectType: 'task',
801	          subjectId: task.id,
802	        });
803	      }
804	      return task;
805	    }
806	    task = this.taskRepo.create({
807	      type,
808	      refType,
809	      refId,
810	      dedupeKey,
811	      title,
812	      summary,
813	      context,
814	      state: TaskState.OPEN,
815	    });
816	    task = await this.taskRepo.save(task);
817	    await this.audit.record({
818	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
819	      action: 'task.raised',
820	      summary: `Task raised: ${title}.`,
821	      subjectType: 'task',
822	      subjectId: task.id,
823	      inputs: { type, refType, refId },
824	    });
825	    return task;
826	  }
827	
828	  private async resolveTask(type: TaskType, refId: string, resolution: string, actor: AuditActor): Promise<void> {
829	    const dedupeKey = `${type}:${refId}`;
830	    const task = await this.taskRepo.findOne({ where: { dedupeKey, state: TaskState.OPEN } });
831	    if (!task) return;
832	    task.state = TaskState.RESOLVED;
833	    task.resolvedAt = new Date();
834	    task.resolution = resolution;
835	    await this.taskRepo.save(task);
836	    await this.audit.record({
837	      actor,
838	      action: 'task.resolved',
839	      summary: `Task resolved: ${task.title} — ${resolution}.`,
840	      subjectType: 'task',
841	      subjectId: task.id,
842	    });
843	  }
844	
845	  private async queuePotentialClients(meeting: Meeting, attendees: MeetingAttendee[]): Promise<void> {
846	    const existing = await this.pcRepo.find();
847	    const known = new Set(existing.flatMap((p) => (p.emails ?? []).map((e) => e.toLowerCase())));
848	    for (const a of attendees) {
849	      if (!a.email) continue;
850	      const email = a.email.toLowerCase();
851	      if (known.has(email)) continue;
852	      known.add(email);
853	      const pc = this.pcRepo.create({
854	        emails: [a.email],
855	        displayName: a.name || a.email.split('@')[0],
856	        firstSeenMeetingId: meeting.id,
857	        state: PotentialClientState.QUEUED,
858	        lastPolledAt: null,
859	      });
860	      const saved = await this.pcRepo.save(pc);
861	      await this.audit.record({
862	        actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
863	        action: 'potential_client.queued',
864	        summary: `Queued potential client ${saved.displayName} (${a.email}) from "${meeting.title}".`,
865	        subjectType: 'potential_client',
866	        subjectId: saved.id,
867	      });
868	    }
869	  }
870	
871	  private preTaskContext(
872	    meeting: Meeting,
873	    client: Client | null,
874	    candidateClientIds: string[],
875	    type: TaskType,
876	  ): Record<string, unknown> {
877	    const ctx: Record<string, unknown> = {
878	      meetingId: meeting.id,
879	      meetingTitle: meeting.title,
880	      start: meeting.start,
881	      end: meeting.end,
882	      durationHours: Number(meeting.durationHours),
883	      clientId: meeting.clientId,
884	      clientName: client?.name ?? null,
885	      attendees: meeting.attendees,
886	    };
887	    if (type === TaskType.PROVIDE_TRANSCRIPT) {
888	      ctx.actionEndpoint = `/meetings/${meeting.id}/transcript`;
889	    } else if (type === TaskType.CONFIRM_CLIENT_MATCH) {
890	      ctx.actionEndpoint = `/meetings/${meeting.id}/confirm-client`;
891	      ctx.matchProposals = meeting.matchProposals;
892	      ctx.candidateClientIds = candidateClientIds;
893	    }
894	    return ctx;
895	  }
896	
897	  private proposalTaskContext(
898	    meeting: Meeting,
899	    client: Client,
900	    proposal: InvoiceProposal,
901	    built: { subtotal: number; taxTotal: number; total: number; currency: string; lines: ProposalLine[] },
902	    xeroError: string | null,
903	  ): Record<string, unknown> {
904	    return {
905	      proposalId: proposal.id,
906	      meetingId: meeting.id,
907	      meetingTitle: meeting.title,
908	      clientId: client.id,
909	      clientName: client.name,
910	      currency: built.currency,
911	      subtotal: built.subtotal,
912	      taxTotal: built.taxTotal,
913	      total: built.total,
914	      lineCount: built.lines.length,
915	      xeroError,
916	      actionEndpoint: `/proposals/${proposal.id}/approve`,
917	    };
918	  }
919	
920	  // =========================================================================
921	  // Connection state
922	  // =========================================================================
923	
924	  private async upsertCalendarConnection(status: ConnectionStatus, label: string, detail: string): Promise<void> {
925	    let row = await this.connRepo.findOne({ where: { kind: ConnectionKind.CALENDAR } });
926	    if (!row) row = this.connRepo.create({ kind: ConnectionKind.CALENDAR });
927	    row.status = status;
928	    row.label = label;
929	    row.detail = detail;
930	    row.lastSyncAt = new Date();
931	    await this.connRepo.save(row);
932	  }
933	
934	  // =========================================================================
935	  // Proposal helpers
936	  // =========================================================================
937	
938	  private pickClause(contract: Contract | null, billingProfile: BillingProfile | null): ClauseRef | null {
939	    const clauses = contract?.parsed?.clauses ?? [];
940	    if (!clauses.length) return null;
941	    const prov = billingProfile?.provenance ?? '';
942	    const found = prov ? clauses.find((c) => prov.includes(c.ref) || c.ref.includes(prov)) : undefined;
943	    return found ?? clauses[0];
944	  }
945	
946	  private toXeroLines(lines: ProposalLine[]) {
947	    return lines.map((l) => ({
948	      Description: l.description,
949	      Quantity: Number(l.quantity),
950	      UnitAmount: Number(l.unit_amount),
951	      AccountCode: l.account_code,
952	    }));
953	  }
954	
955	  private decisionNote(
956	    clientName: string,
957	    blockLabel: string,
958	    policy: { reasons: string[] },
959	    built: { lines: ProposalLine[]; subtotal: number; taxTotal: number; total: number; currency: string },
960	    auto: boolean,
961	  ): string {
962	    const prov = built.lines.flatMap((l) => l.provenance.map((p) => `${p.label}: ${p.detail}`));
963	    const parts = [
964	      `Robyn invoice proposal for ${clientName} — ${blockLabel}.`,
965	      `Lines: ${built.lines.map((l) => l.description).join('; ')}.`,
966	      `Subtotal ${built.currency} ${built.subtotal}, tax ${built.taxTotal}, total ${built.total}.`,
967	      `Provenance — ${prov.join(' | ')}.`,
968	      `Policy: ${policy.reasons.join(' ')}`,
969	      auto ? 'Autonomy ON, within terms -> auto-sent.' : 'Autonomy OFF -> human approved.',
970	    ];
971	    return parts.join(' ').slice(0, 2400);
972	  }
973	
974	  private buildEvidence(transcript: Transcript | null, clause: ClauseRef | null) {
975	    const evidence: { filename: string; text: string }[] = [];
976	    if (transcript) {
977	      const quotes = (transcript.parsed?.scope_items ?? [])
978	        .map((s) => `- ${s.description}: "${s.evidence_quote}"`)
979	        .join('\n');
980	      const text = quotes || (transcript.rawText ?? '').slice(0, 2000);
981	      evidence.push({ filename: 'robyn-transcript-evidence.txt', text: `Transcript evidence (Robyn):\n${text}` });
982	    }
983	    if (clause) {
984	      evidence.push({ filename: 'robyn-contract-clause.txt', text: `Contract ${clause.ref}:\n${clause.text}` });
985	    }
986	    return evidence;
987	  }
988	
989	  private blockLabel(start: Date, end: Date): string {
990	    const datePart = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-GB', {
991	      weekday: 'short',
992	      day: 'numeric',
993	      month: 'short',
994	      timeZone: 'Europe/London',
995	    }).format(start);
996	    const time = (x: Date) =>
997	      new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-GB', {
998	        hour: '2-digit',
999	        minute: '2-digit',
1000	        hour12: false,
1001	        timeZone: 'Europe/London',
1002	      }).format(x);
1003	    return `${datePart}, ${time(start)}–${time(end)}`;
1004	  }
1005	
1006	  // =========================================================================
1007	  // Mappers
1008	  // =========================================================================
1009	
1010	  private transitionSummary(meeting: Meeting, state: MeetingState): string {
1011	    switch (state) {
1012	      case MeetingState.SKIPPED:
1013	        return `Meeting "${meeting.title}" skipped — no external attendees (personal).`;
1014	      case MeetingState.UNKNOWN_ATTENDEE:
1015	        return `Unknown attendee on "${meeting.title}" — queued to the potential-client pipeline.`;
1016	      case MeetingState.AWAITING_TRANSCRIPT:
1017	        return `Meeting "${meeting.title}" is billable but has no transcript — raised PROVIDE_TRANSCRIPT.`;
1018	      case MeetingState.TRANSCRIPT_ATTACHED:
1019	        return `Meeting "${meeting.title}" has a transcript but an ambiguous client — raised CONFIRM_CLIENT_MATCH.`;
1020	      default:
1021	        return `Meeting "${meeting.title}" -> ${state}.`;
1022	    }
1023	  }
1024	
1025	  private async getMeetingOrThrow(id: string): Promise<Meeting> {
1026	    const m = await this.meetingRepo.findOne({ where: { id } });
1027	    if (!m) throw new NotFoundException(`Meeting ${id} not found`);
1028	    return m;
1029	  }
1030	
1031	  private mapListItem(m: Meeting, clientName: string | null, proposalId: string | null): MeetingListItemDto {
1032	    return {
1033	      id: m.id,
1034	      gcalEventId: m.gcalEventId,
1035	      title: m.title,
1036	      start: new Date(m.start).toISOString(),
1037	      end: new Date(m.end).toISOString(),
1038	      durationHours: Number(m.durationHours),
1039	      state: m.state,
1040	      clientId: m.clientId,
1041	      clientName,
1042	      attendees: m.attendees ?? [],
1043	      isPersonal: m.isPersonal,
1044	      hasTranscript: !!m.transcriptId,
1045	      proposalId,
1046	      source: m.source,
1047	    };
1048	  }
1049	
1050	  private mapProposal(p: InvoiceProposal): MeetingProposalDto {
1051	    return {
1052	      id: p.id,
1053	      state: p.state,
1054	      reference: p.reference,
1055	      currency: p.currency,
1056	      subtotal: Number(p.subtotal),
1057	      taxTotal: Number(p.taxTotal),
1058	      total: Number(p.total),
1059	      autoSent: p.autoSent,
1060	      xeroInvoiceId: p.xeroInvoiceId,
1061	      xeroInvoiceNumber: p.xeroInvoiceNumber,
1062	      xeroDeepLink: p.xeroDeepLink,
1063	      policyResult: p.policyResult,
1064	      lines: (p.lines ?? []).map((l) => ({
1065	        description: l.description,
1066	        quantity: Number(l.quantity),
1067	        unit_amount: Number(l.unit_amount),
1068	        line_amount: Number(l.line_amount),
1069	        account_code: l.account_code,
1070	        tax_type: l.tax_type,
1071	        provenance: (l.provenance ?? []).map((pr) => ({
1072	          kind: pr.kind as ProvenanceKind,
1073	          label: pr.label,
1074	          detail: pr.detail,
1075	          source_ref: pr.source_ref,
1076	        })),
1077	      })),
1078	    };
1079	  }
1080	
1081	  private async buildDetail(m: Meeting): Promise<MeetingDetailDto> {
1082	    const clientName = m.clientId
1083	      ? (await this.clientRepo.findOne({ where: { id: m.clientId } }))?.name ?? null
1084	      : null;
1085	    const transcript = m.transcriptId
1086	      ? await this.transcriptRepo.findOne({ where: { id: m.transcriptId } })
1087	      : null;
1088	    const proposal = await this.proposalRepo.findOne({
1089	      where: { meetingId: m.id },
1090	      order: { createdAt: 'DESC' },
1091	    });
1092	
1093	    const meetingAudits = await this.audit.listForSubject(m.id, 60);
1094	    let trail: AuditEvent[] = meetingAudits;
1095	    if (proposal) {
1096	      const proposalAudits = await this.audit.listForSubject(proposal.id, 60);
1097	      trail = [...meetingAudits, ...proposalAudits];
1098	    }
1099	    trail = trail
1100	      .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime())
1101	      .slice(0, 60);
1102	
1103	    const base = this.mapListItem(m, clientName, proposal?.id ?? null);
1104	    return {
1105	      ...base,
1106	      skipReason: m.skipReason,
1107	      transcript: transcript
1108	        ? {
1109	            id: transcript.id,
1110	            source: transcript.source,
1111	            rawText: transcript.rawText,
1112	            parsed: transcript.parsed
1113	              ? {
1114	                  summary: transcript.parsed.summary,
1115	                  action_points: transcript.parsed.action_points,
1116	                  scope_items: transcript.parsed.scope_items,
1117	                }
1118	              : null,
1119	          }
1120	        : null,
1121	      matchProposals: (m.matchProposals as MatchProposal[] | null) ?? null,
1122	      proposal: proposal ? this.mapProposal(proposal) : null,
1123	      auditTrail: trail.map((e) => ({
1124	        id: e.id,
1125	        actor: e.actor,
1126	        action: e.action,
1127	        summary: e.summary,
1128	        subjectType: e.subjectType,
1129	        subjectId: e.subjectId,
1130	        createdAt: new Date(e.createdAt).toISOString(),
1131	      })),
1132	    };
1133	  }
1134	
1135	  private async actionResult(outcome: Loop1Outcome): Promise<MeetingActionResultDto> {
1136	    const meeting = await this.buildDetail(outcome.meeting);
1137	    return {
1138	      meeting,
1139	      proposal: outcome.proposal ? this.mapProposal(outcome.proposal) : null,
1140	      xeroError: outcome.xeroError,
1141	    };
1142	  }
1143	}
1144	
1145	function round2(n: number): number {
1146	  return Math.round((n + Number.EPSILON) * 100) / 100;
1147	}
1148
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./api/src/config/env.ts`

```text
1	// Central env access. Required secrets are asserted non-empty at boot with
2	// named errors so a misconfigured process dies at startup, not mid-demo.
3	// Values are read from api/.env (loaded by @nestjs/config in AppModule).
4	
5	export class MissingEnvError extends Error {
6	  constructor(name: string) {
7	    super(
8	      `MissingEnv: ${name} is empty — set it in api/.env. Robyn refuses to boot ` +
9	        `without it rather than fail obscurely later.`,
10	    );
11	    this.name = 'MissingEnvError';
12	  }
13	}
14	
15	function req(name: string): string {
16	  const v = process.env[name];
17	  if (!v || v.trim() === '') throw new MissingEnvError(name);
18	  return v.trim();
19	}
20	
21	function opt(name: string, fallback = ''): string {
22	  const v = process.env[name];
23	  return v && v.trim() !== '' ? v.trim() : fallback;
24	}
25	
26	export interface RobynConfig {
27	  port: number;
28	  databaseUrl: string;
29	  anthropicApiKey: string;
30	  xero: {
31	    clientId: string;
32	    clientSecret: string;
33	    scopes: string; // XERO_SCOPES override (empty => broad-then-granular fallback)
34	    paymentAccountCode: string; // optional; needed only for Payments writes
35	  };
36	  imap: {
37	    host: string;
38	    port: number;
39	    user: string;
40	    password: string;
41	    configured: boolean;
42	  };
43	  google: {
44	    clientId: string;
45	    clientSecret: string;
46	    configured: boolean;
47	  };
48	}
49	
50	let cached: RobynConfig | null = null;
51	
52	// Assert the hard-required secrets. Xero + Anthropic + DB are mandatory; IMAP
53	// and Google are optional (documented .ics / fixture-mailbox fallbacks exist).
54	export function loadConfig(): RobynConfig {
55	  if (cached) return cached;
56	  const imapHost = opt('IMAP_HOST');
57	  const imapUser = opt('IMAP_USER');
58	  const imapPassword = opt('IMAP_PASSWORD');
59	  const googleClientId = opt('GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID');
60	  const googleClientSecret = opt('GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET');
61	
62	  cached = {
63	    port: Number(opt('PORT', '4000')),
64	    databaseUrl: req('DATABASE_URL'),
65	    anthropicApiKey: req('ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'),
66	    xero: {
67	      clientId: req('XERO_CLIENT_ID'),
68	      clientSecret: req('XERO_CLIENT_SECRET'),
69	      scopes: opt('XERO_SCOPES'),
70	      paymentAccountCode: opt('XERO_PAYMENT_ACCOUNT_CODE'),
71	    },
72	    imap: {
73	      host: imapHost,
74	      port: Number(opt('IMAP_PORT', '993')),
75	      user: imapUser,
76	      password: imapPassword,
77	      configured: Boolean(imapHost && imapUser && imapPassword),
78	    },
79	    google: {
80	      clientId: googleClientId,
81	      clientSecret: googleClientSecret,
82	      configured: Boolean(googleClientId && googleClientSecret),
83	    },
84	  };
85	  return cached;
86	}
```

 `./api/src/modules/email/email.service.ts`

```text
1	import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
3	import { In, Repository } from 'typeorm';
4	import { promises as fs } from 'node:fs';
5	import * as path from 'node:path';
6	
7	import {
8	  PotentialClient,
9	  PotentialClientState,
10	  Task,
11	  TaskType,
12	  TaskState,
13	  TaskRefType,
14	  ConnectionState,
15	  ConnectionKind,
16	  ConnectionStatus,
17	  AuditActor,
18	  AgreementEvidence,
19	} from '../../entities';
20	import { LlmService } from '../llm/llm.service';
21	import { AuditService } from '../audit/audit.service';
22	import { loadConfig } from '../../config/env';
23	import { EmailPollResultDto, DetectedAgreementDto } from './dto/email-poll.dto';
24	
25	// A normalised inbound message — the same shape whether it came from live IMAP
26	// or the fixture mailbox, so the classify path never branches on source.
27	interface InboundMessage {
28	  from: string;
29	  subject: string;
30	  body: string;
31	  date: string | null; // ISO if known
32	  messageId: string;
33	}
34	
35	const POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 30 * 60 * 1000; // 30 minutes
36	
37	// Loop 2 DETECT. Reads NEW messages FROM queued potential-client addresses ONLY
38	// (IMAP when configured, else the seeded fixture mailbox), classifies each for
39	// agreement via the LLM edge, and on agreement flips the PotentialClient to
40	// AGREEMENT_DETECTED + raises a CONFIRM_AGREEMENT task. It never promotes a
41	// client and never reads a non-queued sender — that scope widening is a bug.
42	@Injectable()
43	export class EmailService {
44	  private readonly log = new Logger('EmailService');
45	
46	  constructor(
47	    @InjectRepository(PotentialClient)
48	    private readonly pcRepo: Repository<PotentialClient>,
49	    @InjectRepository(Task)
50	    private readonly taskRepo: Repository<Task>,
51	    @InjectRepository(ConnectionState)
52	    private readonly connRepo: Repository<ConnectionState>,
53	    private readonly llm: LlmService,
54	    private readonly audit: AuditService,
55	  ) {}
56	
57	  // --- Public entry: run one poll cycle ------------------------------------
58	  async poll(): Promise<EmailPollResultDto> {
59	    const cfg = loadConfig();
60	    const now = new Date();
61	    const nextPollAt = new Date(now.getTime() + POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
62	
63	    const queued = await this.pcRepo.find({
64	      where: {
65	        state: In([PotentialClientState.QUEUED, PotentialClientState.WATCHING]),
66	      },
67	    });
68	
69	    let mode: ConnectionStatus = cfg.imap.configured
70	      ? ConnectionStatus.LIVE
71	      : ConnectionStatus.FALLBACK;
72	    let messagesRead = 0;
73	    let agreementsDetected = 0;
74	    let tasksRaised = 0;
75	    const detected: DetectedAgreementDto[] = [];
76	
77	    // In fallback we read every fixture file once, then filter per potential
78	    // client to the queued senders. This never touches a non-queued address.
79	    let fixtureMessages: InboundMessage[] | null = null;
80	    if (!cfg.imap.configured) {
81	      fixtureMessages = await this.readFixtureMailbox();
82	    }
83	
84	    for (const pc of queued) {
85	      const addrs = (pc.emails ?? [])
86	        .map((e) => this.normaliseAddress(e))
87	        .filter((e) => e.length > 0);
88	      if (addrs.length === 0) {
89	        pc.lastPolledAt = now;
90	        await this.pcRepo.save(pc);
91	        continue;
92	      }
93	
94	      let msgs: InboundMessage[] = [];
95	      if (cfg.imap.configured) {
96	        try {
97	          msgs = await this.readImapForSenders(cfg, addrs, pc.lastPolledAt);
98	        } catch (err) {
99	          // IMAP was configured but unreachable — keep local state, surface the
100	          // reason on the connection row, do NOT crash the poll.
101	          mode = ConnectionStatus.DOWN;
102	          const reason = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
103	          this.log.warn(`IMAP read failed for potential-client ${pc.id}: ${reason}`);
104	          await this.audit.record({
105	            actor: AuditActor.SYSTEM,
106	            action: 'email.imap_error',
107	            summary: `IMAP read failed while polling ${pc.displayName}: ${reason.slice(0, 200)}`,
108	            subjectType: 'potential_client',
109	            subjectId: pc.id,
110	          });
111	          msgs = [];
112	        }
113	      } else {
114	        msgs = (fixtureMessages ?? [])
115	          .filter((m) => addrs.includes(this.normaliseAddress(m.from)))
116	          .filter((m) => this.isNewMessage(m, pc.lastPolledAt));
117	      }
118	
119	      messagesRead += msgs.length;
120	
121	      for (const m of msgs) {
122	        let cls;
123	        try {
124	          cls = await this.llm.classifyAgreement(m.from, m.subject, m.body);
125	        } catch (err) {
126	          const reason = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
127	          this.log.warn(`Agreement classification failed for ${pc.id}: ${reason}`);
128	          await this.audit.record({
129	            actor: AuditActor.LLM,
130	            action: 'email.classify_error',
131	            summary: `Agreement classification failed for ${pc.displayName}: ${reason.slice(0, 200)}`,
132	            subjectType: 'potential_client',
133	            subjectId: pc.id,
134	            inputs: { from: m.from, subject: m.subject },
135	          });
136	          continue; // never guess — skip this message
137	        }
138	
139	        if (!cls.agreement) {
140	          await this.audit.record({
141	            actor: AuditActor.LLM,
142	            action: 'email.classified_no_agreement',
143	            summary: `No agreement in message from ${pc.displayName} ("${m.subject}").`,
144	            subjectType: 'potential_client',
145	            subjectId: pc.id,
146	            inputs: { from: m.from, subject: m.subject, reasoning: cls.reasoning },
147	          });
148	          continue;
149	        }
150	
151	        // Agreement detected — the money-adjacent transition. Record evidence,
152	        // flip state, raise the confirm task (idempotent), audit both edges.
153	        const quote =
154	          cls.evidence_quote && cls.evidence_quote.trim().length > 0
155	            ? cls.evidence_quote.trim()
156	            : m.subject || 'Agreement indicated in email';
157	        const evidence: AgreementEvidence = {
158	          email_msg_id: m.messageId,
159	          quote,
160	          from: m.from,
161	          subject: m.subject,
162	          received_at: m.date ?? now.toISOString(),
163	        };
164	
165	        pc.state = PotentialClientState.AGREEMENT_DETECTED;
166	        pc.evidence = evidence;
167	        await this.pcRepo.save(pc);
168	        agreementsDetected += 1;
169	
170	        await this.audit.record({
171	          actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
172	          action: 'email.agreement_detected',
173	          summary: `Agreement detected from ${pc.displayName}: "${quote}"`,
174	          subjectType: 'potential_client',
175	          subjectId: pc.id,
176	          inputs: {
177	            from: m.from,
178	            subject: m.subject,
179	            quote,
180	            reasoning: cls.reasoning,
181	            mode,
182	          },
183	        });
184	
185	        const taskId = await this.raiseConfirmAgreementTask(pc, evidence);
186	        if (taskId) tasksRaised += 1;
187	
188	        detected.push({
189	          potentialClientId: pc.id,
190	          displayName: pc.displayName,
191	          from: m.from,
192	          subject: m.subject,
193	          quote,
194	          taskId: taskId ?? undefined,
195	        });
196	
197	        break; // one agreement per potential client is enough
198	      }
199	
200	      pc.lastPolledAt = now;
201	      await this.pcRepo.save(pc);
202	    }
203	
204	    const detail = this.connectionDetail(cfg, mode);
205	    await this.upsertEmailConnection(mode, cfg, detail, now, nextPollAt);
206	
207	    await this.audit.record({
208	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
209	      action: 'email.poll',
210	      summary:
211	        `Email poll (${mode}): ${queued.length} queued, ${messagesRead} message(s) read, ` +
212	        `${agreementsDetected} agreement(s), ${tasksRaised} task(s) raised.`,
213	      subjectType: 'connection_state',
214	      inputs: {
215	        mode,
216	        polledCount: queued.length,
217	        messagesRead,
218	        agreementsDetected,
219	        tasksRaised,
220	      },
221	    });
222	
223	    return {
224	      mode,
225	      detail,
226	      polledCount: queued.length,
227	      messagesRead,
228	      agreementsDetected,
229	      tasksRaised,
230	      detected,
231	      polledAt: now.toISOString(),
232	      nextPollAt: nextPollAt.toISOString(),
233	    };
234	  }
235	
236	  // --- Task raise (idempotent by dedupeKey) --------------------------------
237	  private async raiseConfirmAgreementTask(
238	    pc: PotentialClient,
239	    evidence: AgreementEvidence,
240	  ): Promise<string | null> {
241	    const dedupeKey = `${TaskType.CONFIRM_AGREEMENT}:${pc.id}`;
242	    const existing = await this.taskRepo.findOne({
243	      where: { dedupeKey, state: TaskState.OPEN },
244	    });
245	    if (existing) return null;
246	
247	    const task = this.taskRepo.create({
248	      type: TaskType.CONFIRM_AGREEMENT,
249	      refType: TaskRefType.POTENTIAL_CLIENT,
250	      refId: pc.id,
251	      state: TaskState.OPEN,
252	      title: `Confirm new client: ${pc.displayName}`,
253	      summary: `${pc.displayName} agreed to proceed: "${evidence.quote}"`,
254	      context: {
255	        potentialClientId: pc.id,
256	        displayName: pc.displayName,
257	        quote: evidence.quote,
258	        from: evidence.from,
259	        subject: evidence.subject,
260	        emailMsgId: evidence.email_msg_id,
261	        receivedAt: evidence.received_at,
262	        actionEndpoint: `/api/potential-clients/${pc.id}/confirm`,
263	        dismissEndpoint: `/api/potential-clients/${pc.id}/dismiss`,
264	      },
265	      dedupeKey,
266	    });
267	    const saved = await this.taskRepo.save(task);
268	
269	    await this.audit.record({
270	      actor: AuditActor.ROBYN,
271	      action: 'task.raised',
272	      summary: `Raised CONFIRM_AGREEMENT task for ${pc.displayName}.`,
273	      subjectType: 'task',
274	      subjectId: saved.id,
275	      inputs: { type: TaskType.CONFIRM_AGREEMENT, potentialClientId: pc.id },
276	    });
277	    return saved.id;
278	  }
279	
280	  // --- ConnectionState upsert (one EMAIL row) ------------------------------
281	  private async upsertEmailConnection(
282	    status: ConnectionStatus,
283	    cfg: ReturnType<typeof loadConfig>,
284	    detail: string,
285	    lastSyncAt: Date,
286	    nextPollAt: Date,
287	  ): Promise<void> {
288	    let row = await this.connRepo.findOne({ where: { kind: ConnectionKind.EMAIL } });
289	    if (!row) {
290	      row = this.connRepo.create({ kind: ConnectionKind.EMAIL });
291	    }
292	    row.status = status;
293	    row.label = cfg.imap.configured ? cfg.imap.user : 'fixture mailbox';
294	    row.detail = detail;
295	    row.lastSyncAt = lastSyncAt;
296	    row.nextPollAt = nextPollAt;
297	    await this.connRepo.save(row);
298	  }
299	
300	  private connectionDetail(
301	    cfg: ReturnType<typeof loadConfig>,
302	    status: ConnectionStatus,
303	  ): string {
304	    if (status === ConnectionStatus.LIVE) {
305	      return `Connected to IMAP mailbox ${cfg.imap.user}. Reads only queued client senders.`;
306	    }
307	    if (status === ConnectionStatus.DOWN) {
308	      return `IMAP configured for ${cfg.imap.user} but unreachable this poll. Local state kept; no messages read.`;
309	    }
310	    return 'No IMAP credentials — reading the seeded fixture mailbox (seed/data/mailbox). Reads only queued client senders.';
311	  }
312	
313	  // --- Fixture mailbox reader ----------------------------------------------
314	  // Each *.json file is either a single message object or an array of them.
315	  // Field names are read defensively so a hand-written fixture still loads.
316	  private async readFixtureMailbox(): Promise<InboundMessage[]> {
317	    const dir = await this.resolveFixtureDir();
318	    if (!dir) {
319	      this.log.warn('Fixture mailbox directory not found — treating as empty.');
320	      return [];
321	    }
322	    let files: string[];
323	    try {
324	      files = (await fs.readdir(dir)).filter((f) => f.toLowerCase().endsWith('.json'));
325	    } catch {
326	      return [];
327	    }
328	
329	    const out: InboundMessage[] = [];
330	    for (const f of files) {
331	      const full = path.join(dir, f);
332	      try {
333	        const raw = await fs.readFile(full, 'utf8');
334	        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as unknown;
335	        const records = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [parsed];
336	        for (const rec of records) {
337	          const msg = this.normaliseRecord(rec, f);
338	          if (msg) out.push(msg);
339	        }
340	      } catch (err) {
341	        this.log.warn(`Skipping unreadable fixture ${f}: ${String(err).slice(0, 160)}`);
342	      }
343	    }
344	    return out;
345	  }
346	
347	  private async resolveFixtureDir(): Promise<string | null> {
348	    const candidates = [
349	      path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'seed/data/mailbox'),
350	      path.resolve(process.cwd(), '../seed/data/mailbox'),
351	      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../seed/data/mailbox'),
352	      path.resolve(__dirname, '../../../../../seed/data/mailbox'),
353	    ];
354	    for (const c of candidates) {
355	      try {
356	        const st = await fs.stat(c);
357	        if (st.isDirectory()) return c;
358	      } catch {
359	        // try next
360	      }
361	    }
362	    return null;
363	  }
364	
365	  private normaliseRecord(rec: unknown, file: string): InboundMessage | null {
366	    if (!rec || typeof rec !== 'object') return null;
367	    const r = rec as Record<string, unknown>;
368	    const str = (...keys: string[]): string => {
369	      for (const k of keys) {
370	        const v = r[k];
371	        if (typeof v === 'string' && v.trim().length > 0) return v;
372	      }
373	      return '';
374	    };
375	    const from = str('from', 'From', 'sender');
376	    if (!from) return null;
377	    const dateRaw = str('date', 'received_at', 'receivedAt', 'Date');
378	    return {
379	      from,
380	      subject: str('subject', 'Subject'),
381	      body: str('body', 'text', 'Body', 'html'),
382	      date: dateRaw ? this.toIso(dateRaw) : null,
383	      messageId: str('messageId', 'message_id', 'id', 'Message-ID') || `${file}:${from}`,
384	    };
385	  }
386	
387	  // --- IMAP reader (queued senders ONLY) -----------------------------------
388	  // Live path: one search per queued address, SINCE lastPolledAt. The search is
389	  // scoped to a specific sender so a non-queued address is never fetched.
390	  private async readImapForSenders(
391	    cfg: ReturnType<typeof loadConfig>,
392	    addrs: string[],
393	    since: Date | null,
394	  ): Promise<InboundMessage[]> {
395	    // Lazy imports so the OpenAPI export / non-IMAP boot never loads them.
396	    const { ImapFlow } = await import('imapflow');
397	    const { simpleParser } = await import('mailparser');
398	
399	    const client = new ImapFlow({
400	      host: cfg.imap.host,
401	      port: cfg.imap.port,
402	      secure: true,
403	      auth: { user: cfg.imap.user, pass: cfg.imap.password },
404	      logger: false,
405	    });
406	
407	    const out: InboundMessage[] = [];
408	    await client.connect();
409	    try {
410	      const lock = await client.getMailboxLock('INBOX');
411	      try {
412	        for (const addr of addrs) {
413	          const query: { from: string; since?: Date } = { from: addr };
414	          if (since) query.since = since;
415	          const uids = await client.search(query, { uid: true });
416	          if (!uids || uids.length === 0) continue;
417	          for await (const msg of client.fetch(
418	            uids,
419	            { envelope: true, source: true },
420	            { uid: true },
421	          )) {
422	            let subject = msg.envelope?.subject ?? '';
423	            let body = '';
424	            let messageId = msg.envelope?.messageId ?? '';
425	            let date: string | null = msg.envelope?.date
426	              ? msg.envelope.date.toISOString()
427	              : null;
428	            if (msg.source) {
429	              const parsed = await simpleParser(msg.source);
430	              if (parsed.subject) subject = parsed.subject;
431	              body = parsed.text ?? '';
432	              if (parsed.messageId) messageId = parsed.messageId;
433	              if (parsed.date) date = parsed.date.toISOString();
434	            }
435	            if (!messageId) messageId = `${addr}:${msg.uid}`;
436	            out.push({ from: addr, subject, body, date, messageId });
437	          }
438	        }
439	      } finally {
440	        lock.release();
441	      }
442	    } finally {
443	      await client.logout().catch(() => undefined);
444	    }
445	    return out;
446	  }
447	
448	  // --- helpers --------------------------------------------------------------
449	  private normaliseAddress(raw: string): string {
450	    if (!raw) return '';
451	    const angled = raw.match(/<([^>]+)>/);
452	    const addr = angled ? angled[1] : raw;
453	    return addr.trim().toLowerCase();
454	  }
455	
456	  private isNewMessage(m: InboundMessage, lastPolledAt: Date | null): boolean {
457	    if (!lastPolledAt) return true;
458	    if (!m.date) return true; // undateable fixture — treat as new
459	    const t = Date.parse(m.date);
460	    if (Number.isNaN(t)) return true;
461	    return t > lastPolledAt.getTime();
462	  }
463	
464	  private toIso(raw: string): string {
465	    const t = Date.parse(raw);
466	    return Number.isNaN(t) ? raw : new Date(t).toISOString();
467	  }
468	}
469
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
26	@ApiTags('meetings')

28	export class MeetingsController {

31	  @Get()

34	    description: 'All meetings with state, client, duration, attendees, transcript flag and linked proposal id.',
35	  })

37	  @ApiOkResponse({ type: [MeetingListItemDto] })
38	  list(@Query('state') state?: string): Promise<MeetingListItemDto[]> {
39	    return this.meetings.list(state);

46	  })

48	  @ApiOkResponse({ type: MeetingDetailDto })

50	    return this.meetings.detail(id);

105	    description: 'Marks the meeting SKIPPED (not billable) and resolves any open transcript/match task.',
106	  })
107	  @ApiParam({ name: 'id', description: 'Meeting id' })
108	  @ApiOkResponse({ type: MeetingDetailDto })
109	  skip(@Param('id') id: string, @Body() body: SkipMeetingDto): Promise<MeetingDetailDto> {
110	    return this.meetings.skip(id, body.reason);
111	  }
112	
113	  // --- Scheduled calendar sync (every 15 minutes) --------------------------
114	  @Cron('0 */15 * * * *')
115	  async calendarSync(): Promise<void> {
116	    if (!isServing()) return; // never fire during the OpenAPI export
117	    await this.meetings.sync();
118	  }
119	}
120
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	import { Entity, Column, Index } from 'typeorm';
2	import { BaseEntity } from './base.entity';
3	import { MeetingState } from './enums';
4	import { MatchProposal } from './shapes';
5	
6	export interface MeetingAttendee {
7	  email: string;
8	  name?: string;
9	  organizer?: boolean;
10	}
11	
12	@Entity('meetings')
13	export class Meeting extends BaseEntity {
14	  @Index({ unique: true })
15	  @Column({ type: 'varchar' })
16	  gcalEventId!: string; // stable id from calendar (or synthesised for .ics)
17	
18	  @Column({ type: 'varchar' })
19	  title!: string;
20	
21	  @Column({ type: 'timestamptz' })
22	  start!: Date;
23	
24	  @Column({ type: 'timestamptz' })
25	  end!: Date;
26	
27	  // Duration in hours (denormalised for the engine's maths).
28	  @Column({ type: 'numeric', precision: 6, scale: 2 })
29	  durationHours!: number;
30	
31	  @Column({ type: 'jsonb', default: () => "'[]'" })
32	  attendees!: MeetingAttendee[];
33	
34	  @Index()
35	  @Column({ type: 'uuid', nullable: true })
36	  clientId!: string | null;
37	
38	  @Index()
39	  @Column({ type: 'enum', enum: MeetingState, default: MeetingState.DETECTED })
40	  state!: MeetingState;
41	
42	  @Column({ type: 'uuid', nullable: true })
43	  transcriptId!: string | null;
44	
45	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', nullable: true })
46	  skipReason!: string | null;
47	
48	  // Fuzzy match proposals from the LLM (surfaced in CONFIRM_CLIENT_MATCH).
49	  @Column({ type: 'jsonb', nullable: true })
50	  matchProposals!: MatchProposal[] | null;
51	
52	  // 'personal' meetings (no external attendees) are auto-skipped.
53	  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false })
54	  isPersonal!: boolean;
55	
56	  @Column({ type: 'varchar', default: 'ics' })
57	  source!: string; // 'google' | 'ics'
58	}
59
```

```text
2	// writes to Xero or raises a Task. No silent third path.

6	  AWAITING_TRANSCRIPT = 'AWAITING_TRANSCRIPT',
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-07-05 00:22:12Z)**_

You are building the agentic-chat backend + agent-settings for the Robyn app at /Users/devansh/hackathonProjects/encode-xero-hack (NestJS 10 + TypeORM + Postgres, single-user hackathon demo). The product goal: the user chats with Robyn about their business — cash flow, unpaid invoices, where money is leaking — and the agent answers from REAL data via tools. Fully customisable: system prompt, skills, web search toggle, user-added MCP servers.

READ FIRST, in order: (1) CLAUDE.md at repo root — note the invariant: the LLM proposes, never decides/sends; your chat must be STRICTLY READ-ONLY (no Xero writes, no state transitions — it may reference tasks but never resolve them). (2) /Users/devansh/.claude/jobs/148140d1/tmp/study/robyn-current.md (codebase map), (3) /Users/devansh/.claude/jobs/148140d1/tmp/study/chat-charts-data.md — §1 is your tool inventory (13 read-only tools mapped to existing code), §2 the existing Anthropic plumbing to reuse, (4) /Users/devansh/.claude/jobs/148140d1/tmp/study/content-studio.md §5 for the settings shape the frontend will bind to.

BUILD:
1. Entity `AgentSettings` (api/src/entities/agent-settings.entity.ts): single row — systemPrompt (text, seed a good default: Robyn, a sharp UK freelancer finance copilot; cites real numbers from tools; GBP; concise; never invents figures), model (default 'claude-sonnet-5'), webSearchEnabled (bool, default true), mcpServers (jsonb: [{id,name,url,authToken,enabled}]), skills (jsonb: [{id,name,instructions,enabled}]). Seed row on first read.
2. Module api/src/modules/chat/ with endpoints (decorated DTOs + class-validator throughout):
   - GET /agent-settings → full settings (mask authToken values to a boolean `authConfigured` in responses — never return secrets).
   - PATCH /agent-settings → partial update (validate; skills/mcpServers replaced wholesale when provided); write an AuditEvent (audit.service pattern) naming which fields changed.
   - POST /agent-settings/mcp/test → {url, authToken?}: attempt an MCP streamable-HTTP handshake (POST JSON-RPC `initialize` then `tools/list`, Accept: application/json, text/event-stream, 5s timeout, parse either JSON or SSE-wrapped response) and return {ok, tools:[{name,description}]} or {ok:false, error}. Plain fetch, no new deps.
   - POST /chat → SSE stream (raw express @Res, flush per event; the global prefix 'api' applies). Body: {messages:[{role:'user'|'assistant', content:string}]} (client keeps history; server stateless). Emit events: {type:'text', delta}, {type:'tool', name, status:'running'|'done'|'error'}, {type:'done'}, {type:'error', message}.
3. Chat service using the EXISTING @anthropic-ai/sdk (^0.68 already in api/package.json; reuse the client-construction pattern from llm.service.ts, model from settings): 
   - System prompt = settings.systemPrompt + enabled skills appended as named sections + a hard suffix: read-only advisor, cite numbers from tool results only, GBP formatting, today's date, keep answers tight.
   - Tools: implement 10-13 read-only tools from the blueprint §1 — implement them INSIDE the chat module by injecting TypeORM repositories directly (Meeting, InvoiceProposal, Detection, Task, Client, AuditEvent) plus XeroService (XeroModule is @Global) for live reads (unpaid/overdue ACCREC invoices, payments, aged receivables). Do NOT edit other modules to export services. Validate every tool input with zod before executing; tool results as compact JSON; every tool call also emits the SSE tool event.
   - Web search: when settings.webSearchEnabled, add Anthropic's server-side web search tool ({type:'web_search_20250305', name:'web_search', max_uses:3}).
   - MCP: when enabled servers exist, pass them via the Messages API `mcp_servers` param (type:'url') with beta header 'anthropic-beta: mcp-client-2025-04-04'. If the API rejects it, emit a {type:'tool', name:'mcp', status:'error'} event and retry the turn WITHOUT mcp_servers — chat must never hard-fail because a user-added MCP is down.
   - Agent loop: stream each assistant turn (client.messages.stream), execute tool_use blocks, append tool_result blocks, continue while stop_reason==='tool_use', cap 8 rounds, overall 90s timeout, then finish with whatever text exists.
4. Optional GET /chat/starters → 4 canned questions computed cheaply (e.g. from leak-strip): nice-to-have, only if quick.

HARD RULES: do NOT edit app.module.ts, entities/index.ts, openapi.json, web/**, or the google/dashboard/xero/email modules (other agents own them this wave). No new npm deps. No servers started. Compile-check with `cd api && npx tsc --noEmit`. Follow existing DTO/controller style (dashboard module is a good template). Never log or return token/secret values.

FINAL MESSAGE: files created; exact registration lines (module for app.module.ts, entities for entities/index.ts); the final tool list with one-line descriptions; any SDK version limitations hit (e.g. if mcp_servers or web_search types aren't in ^0.68 typings and you had to cast — say so); remaining risks.
